                    if (!ah && bh) return 1;
                    var ad = (a.deadline || '').toString().slice(0, 10);
                    var bd = (b.deadline || '').toString().slice(0, 10);
                    if (ad !== bd) return ad.localeCompare(bd);
                    return (Number(a.id) || 0) - (Number(b.id) || 0);
                });
                arr.forEach(function(s, idx) {
                    var n = parseInt(s.series_index, 10);
                    if (!Number.isFinite(n) || n < 1) n = idx + 1;
                    out[String(s.id)] = pack.title + ' (' + n + '/' + total + ')';
                });
            });
            return out;
        }
        function stepTitleWithCounter(stepObj, titleCounterMap) {
            var base = stripStepTitleCounterSuffix(((stepObj && stepObj.title) || '').trim());
            if (!base) return '';
            var key = String(stepObj.id);
            return (titleCounterMap && titleCounterMap[key]) ? titleCounterMap[key] : base;
        }
        function filterDreamsByFilter(dreams) {
            if (!dreams || dreams.length === 0) return dreams || [];
            if (dreamsFilter === 'all') return dreams;
            if (dreamsFilter === 'open') return dreams.filter(function(d) { return d.is_public !== false; });
            if (dreamsFilter === 'closed') return dreams.filter(function(d) { return d.is_public === false; });
            if (dreamsFilter === 'planned' || dreamsFilter === 'in_progress' || dreamsFilter === 'done') {
                return dreams.filter(function(d) {
                    var code = d.status_code || d.status || (d.status_obj && d.status_obj.code) || (d.status_id === 1 ? 'planned' : d.status_id === 2 ? 'in_progress' : d.status_id === 3 ? 'done' : 'planned');
                    return code === dreamsFilter;
                });
            }
            return dreams;
        }
        function applyDreamsFilterUI() {
            var df = document.getElementById('dreams-filter');
            if (!df) return;
            df.querySelectorAll('.dreams-filter-btn').forEach(function(btn) {
                btn.classList.toggle('active', (btn.dataset.filter || '') === dreamsFilter);
            });
        }
        function restoreDreamScrollPosition(blockId) {
            var dreamId = dreamIdToRestoreAfterRefresh;
            var idx = currentIndexToRestoreAfterRefresh;
            dreamIdToRestoreAfterRefresh = null;
            currentIndexToRestoreAfterRefresh = null;
            if (dreamId == null && idx == null) return;
            var block = document.getElementById(blockId === 'buddy' ? 'buddy-block' : 'dreams-block');
            if (!block) return;
            var isList = block.classList.contains('dreams-mobile-list-view');
            if (isList) {
                var listEl = document.getElementById(blockId === 'buddy' ? 'buddy-mobile-list' : 'dreams-mobile-list');
                if (!listEl || listEl.children.length === 0) return;
                var card = dreamId ? listEl.querySelector('.dreams-mobile-list-card[data-dream-id="' + dreamId + '"]') : listEl.children[Math.min(Math.max(0, idx || 0), listEl.children.length - 1)];
                if (card) card.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'nearest' });
            } else {
                var swipeBlock = document.getElementById(blockId === 'buddy' ? 'buddy-mobile-swipe' : 'dreams-mobile-swipe');
                var track = swipeBlock && swipeBlock.querySelector('.dreams-mobile-track');
                var counterEl = swipeBlock && swipeBlock.querySelector('.dreams-mobile-counter');
                if (!track || !counterEl) return;
                var total = track.children.length;
                if (total <= 0) return;
                var targetIdx = 0;
                if (dreamId != null) {
                    for (var i = 0; i < total; i++) {
                        if (String(track.children[i].dataset.dreamId) === String(dreamId)) { targetIdx = i; break; }
                    }
                } else if (idx != null) {
                    targetIdx = Math.min(Math.max(0, idx), total - 1);
                }
                track.dataset.currentIndex = String(targetIdx);
                track.style.transform = 'translateX(-' + (targetIdx * 100) + '%)';
                counterEl.textContent = (targetIdx + 1) + ' / ' + total;
                var fc = document.getElementById('app-footer-counter');
                if (fc) fc.textContent = counterEl.textContent;
            }
        }
        function refreshDreamsDisplay() {
            var filtered = filterDreamsByFilter(currentUserDreamsCache);
            renderDreamsTable(filtered);
            renderDreamsMobileCards(filtered);
            renderDreamsMobileList(filtered, 'dreams');
            applyDreamsViewMode();
            var emptyEl = document.getElementById('dreams-empty');
            var tbodyEl = document.getElementById('dreams-tbody');
            if (emptyEl && tbodyEl) emptyEl.classList.toggle('hidden', filtered.length > 0);
            restoreDreamScrollPosition('dreams');
        }
        function refreshBuddyDreamsDisplay() {
            var filtered = filterDreamsByFilter(buddyDreamsCache);
            var emptyEl = document.getElementById('buddy-dreams-empty');
            if (filtered.length === 0) {
                if (emptyEl) emptyEl.classList.remove('hidden');
            } else {
                if (emptyEl) emptyEl.classList.add('hidden');
                if (currentUser && currentUser.buddy_trust) renderBuddyDreamsTableEditable(filtered); else renderBuddyDreamsTable(filtered);
            }
            renderBuddyDreamsMobileCards(filtered, currentUser && currentUser.buddy_trust);
            renderDreamsMobileList(filtered, 'buddy');
            applyDreamsViewMode();
            restoreDreamScrollPosition('buddy');
        }
        function applyDreamsViewMode() {
            var isDreams = !document.getElementById('dreams-block').classList.contains('hidden');
            var isBuddy = !document.getElementById('buddy-block').classList.contains('hidden');
            var db = document.getElementById('dreams-block');
            var bb = document.getElementById('buddy-block');
            var fc = document.getElementById('app-footer-counter');
            if (dreamsViewMode === 'list' && (isDreams || isBuddy)) {
                if (db) db.classList.add('dreams-mobile-list-view');
                if (bb) bb.classList.add('dreams-mobile-list-view');
                if (fc) fc.setAttribute('title', 'Нажмите «Мечты» в хедере для слайдера');
            } else {
                if (db) db.classList.remove('dreams-mobile-list-view');
                if (bb) bb.classList.remove('dreams-mobile-list-view');
                if (fc) fc.setAttribute('title', (isDreams || isBuddy) ? 'Нажмите для списка мечт' : 'Открыть список мечт');
            }
        }
        function openDreamsListFromFooterCounter() {
            if (!currentUser) return;
            dreamsViewMode = 'list';
            var isBuddyVisible = !document.getElementById('buddy-block').classList.contains('hidden');
            var isStepsVisible = !document.getElementById('steps-block').classList.contains('hidden');
            var preferBuddy = isBuddyVisible || (isStepsVisible && stepsViewIsBuddy) || (headerView === 'buddy' && !!(currentUser && currentUser.buddy_id));
            if (preferBuddy && currentUser && currentUser.buddy_id) {
                headerView = 'buddy';
                applyHeaderView();
                switchMenu('buddy');
            } else {
                headerView = 'me';
                applyHeaderView();
                switchMenu('dreams');
            }
        }
        function updateCabinetNavActive(section) {
            var d = document.getElementById('header-link-dreams');
            var s = document.getElementById('header-link-steps');
            var di = document.getElementById('header-link-diary');
            var v = document.getElementById('header-link-showcase');
            if (!d || !s || !v) return;
            d.classList.remove('active');
            s.classList.remove('active');
            if (di) di.classList.remove('active');
            v.classList.remove('active');
            if (section === 'dreams' || section === 'buddy') d.classList.add('active');
            else if (section === 'steps' || section === 'steps-buddy') s.classList.add('active');
            else if (section === 'diary' && di) di.classList.add('active');
            else if (section === 'showcase') v.classList.add('active');
        }
        function switchMenu(section) {
            document.getElementById('dreams-block').classList.add('hidden');
            document.getElementById('buddy-block').classList.add('hidden');
            document.getElementById('steps-block').classList.add('hidden');
            var db = document.getElementById('diary-block');
            if (db) db.classList.add('hidden');
            var sb = document.getElementById('showcase-block');
            if (sb) sb.classList.add('hidden');
            var nb = document.getElementById('notifications-block');
            if (nb) nb.classList.add('hidden');
            var peb = document.getElementById('profile-edit-block');
            if (peb) peb.classList.add('hidden');
            document.querySelectorAll('.app-menu a').forEach(function(a) { a.classList.remove('active'); });
            var titleRowEl = document.getElementById('dreams-title-row');
            var sectionTitleEl = document.getElementById('app-section-title');
            var breadcrumbsEl = document.getElementById('app-showcase-breadcrumbs');
            var dreamsFilterEl = document.getElementById('dreams-filter');
            var stepsFilterEl = document.getElementById('steps-filter');
            if (section === 'showcase') {
                if (titleRowEl) titleRowEl.classList.add('hidden');
                if (breadcrumbsEl) { breadcrumbsEl.classList.remove('hidden'); breadcrumbsEl.style.display = 'flex'; }
            } else {
                if (titleRowEl) titleRowEl.classList.remove('hidden');
                if (sectionTitleEl) {
                    sectionTitleEl.classList.remove('hidden');
                    sectionTitleEl.textContent = section === 'dreams' ? 'Мои мечты' : (section === 'buddy' ? 'Мечты бадди' : (section === 'notifications' ? 'Уведомления' : (section === 'steps' || section === 'steps-buddy' ? 'Шаги' : (section === 'diary' ? 'Дневник шагов' : (section === 'profile-edit' ? 'Настройки профиля' : 'Мои мечты')))));
                }
                if (dreamsFilterEl) dreamsFilterEl.classList.toggle('hidden', section !== 'dreams' && section !== 'buddy');
                if (stepsFilterEl) stepsFilterEl.classList.toggle('hidden', section !== 'steps' && section !== 'steps-buddy' && section !== 'diary');
                if (breadcrumbsEl) { breadcrumbsEl.classList.add('hidden'); breadcrumbsEl.style.display = 'none'; }
            }
            if (section === 'profile-edit') {
                if (peb) peb.classList.remove('hidden');
                var footerAdd = document.getElementById('app-footer-add');
                if (footerAdd) footerAdd.classList.add('hidden');
                loadProfileEditForm();
            } else if (section === 'notifications') {
                if (nb) nb.classList.remove('hidden');
                loadNotifications();
                var footerAdd = document.getElementById('app-footer-add');
                if (footerAdd) footerAdd.classList.add('hidden');
            } else if (section === 'showcase') {
                lastCabinetSection = 'dreams';
                if (sb) sb.classList.remove('hidden');
                if (!showcaseFilter || showcaseFilter === 'new') showcaseFilter = 'all';
                var curFilter = showcaseFilter || 'all';
                document.querySelectorAll('.showcase-filter-link').forEach(function(l) {
                    l.classList.toggle('active', (l.dataset.filter || '') === curFilter);
                });
                var titleEl = document.getElementById('app-showcase-title');
                if (titleEl) titleEl.classList.toggle('active', curFilter === 'all');
                var footerAdd = document.getElementById('app-footer-add');
                if (footerAdd) footerAdd.classList.add('hidden');
                loadShowcase();
            } else {
                loadShowcaseCounts();
            }
            if (section === 'dreams') {
                lastCabinetSection = 'dreams';
                dreamEditContext.ownerId = currentUser ? currentUser.id : 0;
                dreamEditContext.viewerId = null;
                document.getElementById('dreams-block').classList.remove('hidden');
                document.getElementById('menu-my-dreams').classList.add('active');
                var footerAddD = document.getElementById('app-footer-add');
                if (footerAddD) footerAddD.classList.remove('hidden');
                applyDreamsFilterUI();
                refreshDreamsDisplay();
            } else if (section === 'buddy') {
                lastCabinetSection = 'buddy';
                dreamEditContext.ownerId = currentUser ? currentUser.buddy_id : 0;
                dreamEditContext.viewerId = currentUser ? currentUser.id : null;
                document.getElementById('buddy-block').classList.remove('hidden');
                document.getElementById('menu-buddy').classList.add('active');
                var footerAddB = document.getElementById('app-footer-add'); if (footerAddB) footerAddB.classList.add('hidden');
                applyDreamsFilterUI();
                loadBuddyDreams();
            } else if (section === 'steps') {
                lastCabinetSection = 'steps';
                stepsViewIsBuddy = false;
                document.getElementById('steps-block').classList.remove('hidden');
                document.getElementById('menu-my-steps').classList.add('active');
                var footerAddS = document.getElementById('app-footer-add'); if (footerAddS) footerAddS.classList.add('hidden');
                loadSteps(currentUser ? currentUser.id : 0);
            } else if (section === 'steps-buddy') {
                lastCabinetSection = 'steps-buddy';
                stepsViewIsBuddy = true;
                document.getElementById('steps-block').classList.remove('hidden');
                document.getElementById('menu-steps-buddy').classList.add('active');
                var footerAddSb = document.getElementById('app-footer-add'); if (footerAddSb) footerAddSb.classList.add('hidden');
                loadSteps(currentUser ? currentUser.buddy_id : 0, true);
            } else if (section === 'diary') {
                lastCabinetSection = 'diary';
                var diaryEl = document.getElementById('diary-block');
                if (diaryEl) diaryEl.classList.remove('hidden');
                var footerAddDi = document.getElementById('app-footer-add');
                if (footerAddDi) footerAddDi.classList.add('hidden');
                loadStepDiary();
            }
            updateCabinetNavActive(section);
        }

        function loadProfileEditForm() {
            if (!currentUser || !currentUser.id) return;
            var telegramEl = document.getElementById('profile-edit-telegram');
            var vkEl = document.getElementById('profile-edit-vk');
            var phoneEl = document.getElementById('profile-edit-phone');
            var previewEl = document.getElementById('profile-edit-avatar-preview');
            var errEl = document.getElementById('profile-edit-error');
            var curPw = document.getElementById('profile-edit-current-password');
            var newPw = document.getElementById('profile-edit-new-password');
            var fileInput = document.getElementById('profile-edit-avatar-file');
            if (curPw) curPw.value = '';
            if (newPw) newPw.value = '';
            if (fileInput) fileInput.value = '';
            if (errEl) { errEl.classList.add('hidden'); errEl.textContent = ''; }
            if (telegramEl) telegramEl.value = (currentUser.telegram || '').trim();
            if (vkEl) vkEl.value = (currentUser.vk || '').trim();
            if (phoneEl) phoneEl.value = (currentUser.phone || '').trim();
            if (previewEl) {
                previewEl.innerHTML = '';
                if (currentUser.avatar_path) {
                    var url = API_BASE_URL + '/media/' + String(currentUser.avatar_path).replace(/^\//, '') + '?t=' + Date.now();
                    var img = document.createElement('img');
                    img.src = url;
                    img.alt = 'Аватар';
                    img.style.width = img.style.height = '100%';
                    img.style.objectFit = 'cover';
                    previewEl.appendChild(img);
                }
            }
            fetch(API_BASE_URL + '/users/me?user_id=' + currentUser.id, { cache: 'no-store' })
                .then(function(r) { return r.ok ? r.json() : Promise.reject(new Error('Не удалось загрузить профиль')); })
                .then(function(data) {
                    if (telegramEl) telegramEl.value = (data.telegram || '').trim();
                    if (vkEl) vkEl.value = (data.vk || '').trim();
                    if (phoneEl) phoneEl.value = (data.phone || '').trim();
                    if (data.avatar_path && previewEl) {
                        previewEl.innerHTML = '';
                        var img = document.createElement('img');
                        img.src = API_BASE_URL + '/media/' + String(data.avatar_path).replace(/^\//, '') + '?t=' + Date.now();
                        img.alt = 'Аватар';
                        img.style.width = img.style.height = '100%';
                        img.style.objectFit = 'cover';
                        previewEl.appendChild(img);
                    }
                })
                .catch(function() { if (errEl) { errEl.classList.remove('hidden'); errEl.textContent = 'Не удалось загрузить данные профиля.'; } });
        }

        var showcaseDreamsCache = [];
        var showcaseFilter = 'all';
        function loadNotifications() {
            if (!currentUser || !currentUser.id) return;
            fetch(API_BASE_URL + '/dreams/notifications?user_id=' + currentUser.id, { cache: 'no-store' })
                .then(function(r) { return r.json(); })
                .then(function(data) {
                    var list = document.getElementById('notifications-list');
                    var emptyEl = document.getElementById('notifications-empty');
                    if (!list) return;
                    list.innerHTML = '';
                    var notifications = data.notifications || [];
                    if (notifications.length === 0) {
                        emptyEl.classList.remove('hidden');
                        return;
                    }
                    emptyEl.classList.add('hidden');
                    notifications.forEach(function(n) {
                        var card = document.createElement('div');
                        card.className = 'showcase-card';
                        card.style.marginBottom = '12px';
                        var label = document.createElement('p');
                        label.style.fontWeight = '600';
                        label.style.marginBottom = '6px';
                        label.textContent = n.type === 'favorite' ? 'Вашу мечту добавили в избранное' : ((n.helper_names && n.helper_names.length) ? n.helper_names.join(', ') : 'Помощник') + ' завершил(и) твою мечту';
                        var dreamP = document.createElement('p');
                        dreamP.className = 'showcase-dream';
                        dreamP.style.marginBottom = '10px';
                        dreamP.textContent = (n.dream || '').slice(0, 150) + ((n.dream || '').length > 150 ? '…' : '');
                        card.appendChild(label);
                        card.appendChild(dreamP);
                        if (n.type !== 'favorite') {
                            var btnWrap = document.createElement('div');
                            btnWrap.style.display = 'flex';
                            btnWrap.style.gap = '8px';
                            btnWrap.style.flexWrap = 'wrap';
                            var acceptBtn = document.createElement('button');
                            acceptBtn.type = 'button';
                            acceptBtn.className = 'showcase-help-btn';
                            acceptBtn.textContent = 'Принять';
                            acceptBtn.addEventListener('click', function() { openAcceptCompletionModal(n.dream_id); });
                            var revisionBtn = document.createElement('button');
                            revisionBtn.type = 'button';
                            revisionBtn.className = 'showcase-revert-btn';
                            revisionBtn.style.background = '#f5f5f5'; revisionBtn.style.color = '#666'; revisionBtn.style.border = '1px solid #ccc';
                            revisionBtn.textContent = 'На доработку';
                            revisionBtn.addEventListener('click', function() { revisionCompletion(n.dream_id); });
                            btnWrap.appendChild(acceptBtn);
                            btnWrap.appendChild(revisionBtn);
                            card.appendChild(btnWrap);
                        }
                        list.appendChild(card);
                    });
                })
                .catch(function() {
                    var list = document.getElementById('notifications-list');
                    if (list) list.innerHTML = '';
                    var emptyEl = document.getElementById('notifications-empty');
                    if (emptyEl) { emptyEl.textContent = 'Не удалось загрузить уведомления.'; emptyEl.classList.remove('hidden'); }
                });
        }
        function loadShowcaseCounts() {
            if (!currentUser || !currentUser.id) return;
            fetch(API_BASE_URL + '/dreams/showcase/counts?user_id=' + currentUser.id, { cache: 'no-store' })
                .then(function(r) { return r.json(); })
                .then(function(data) {
                    document.querySelectorAll('.showcase-count').forEach(function(el) {
                        var key = el.dataset.count;
                        if (data[key] != null) el.textContent = data[key];
                    });
                    if (data.helped != null) {
                        myHeaderStats.helped = data.helped;
                        updateHelpedStat(data.helped);
                    }
                    var dot = document.getElementById('header-bell-dot');
                    if (dot) dot.classList.toggle('hidden', !(data.pending_completion > 0));
                })
                .catch(function() {});
        }
        function getCachedDreamsForFilter(filter) {
            if (!showcaseDreamsCache || showcaseDreamsCache.length === 0) return [];
            var f = (filter || 'all').toLowerCase();
            if (f === 'favorites') return showcaseDreamsCache.filter(function(d) { return d.is_favorite; });
            if (f === 'helped') return showcaseDreamsCache.filter(function(d) { return d.is_helped; });
            if (f === 'helping') return showcaseDreamsCache.filter(function(d) { return d.is_helping; });
            if (f === 'in_progress') return showcaseDreamsCache.filter(function(d) { return d.is_owner_view && (d.has_pending_completion || d.pending_completion_request); });
            return showcaseDreamsCache;
        }
        function loadShowcase() {
            var grid = document.getElementById('showcase-grid');
            var emptyEl = document.getElementById('showcase-empty');
            var errEl = document.getElementById('showcase-error');
            if (!grid) return;
            emptyEl.classList.add('hidden');
            errEl.classList.add('hidden');
            var cached = getCachedDreamsForFilter(showcaseFilter);
            if (cached.length > 0 || (currentUser && showcaseDreamsCache && showcaseDreamsCache.length > 0)) {
                renderShowcase(cached);
                if (cached.length === 0) emptyEl.classList.remove('hidden');
            } else {
                grid.innerHTML = '<p style="color:#666;">Загрузка...</p>';
            }
            var userId = currentUser ? currentUser.id : null;
            var url = API_BASE_URL + '/dreams/showcase?showcase_filter=' + (showcaseFilter || 'all');
            if (userId) url += '&user_id=' + userId;
            var fetchAbort = new AbortController();
            var timeoutId = setTimeout(function() { fetchAbort.abort(); }, 15000);
            fetch(url, { cache: 'no-store', signal: fetchAbort.signal }).then(function(r) { return r.json(); }).then(function(data) {
                clearTimeout(timeoutId);
                var counts = data.counts || {};
                document.querySelectorAll('.showcase-count').forEach(function(el) {
                    var key = el.dataset.count;
                    el.textContent = counts[key] != null ? counts[key] : 0;
                });
                if (counts.helped != null) {
                    myHeaderStats.helped = counts.helped;
                    updateHelpedStat(counts.helped);
                }
                showcaseDreamsCache = data.dreams || [];
                var curFilter = showcaseFilter || 'all';
                if (showcaseDreamsCache.length === 0 && (counts.all > 0 || counts.helped > 0 || counts.helping > 0 || counts.favorites > 0)) {
                    var nextFilter = counts.helped > 0 ? 'helped' : (counts.helping > 0 ? 'helping' : (counts.favorites > 0 ? 'favorites' : 'all'));
                    if (nextFilter !== curFilter) {
                        showcaseFilter = nextFilter;
                        document.querySelectorAll('.showcase-filter-link').forEach(function(l) {
                            l.classList.toggle('active', (l.dataset.filter || '') === showcaseFilter);
                        });
                        loadShowcase();
                        return;
                    }
                }
                renderShowcase(showcaseDreamsCache);
                if (showcaseDreamsCache.length === 0) emptyEl.classList.remove('hidden');
            }).catch(function(e) {
                clearTimeout(timeoutId);
                if (cached.length === 0) grid.innerHTML = '';
                errEl.textContent = (e && e.name === 'AbortError') ? 'Превышено время ожидания. Проверьте интернет.' : 'Не удалось загрузить витрину.';
                errEl.classList.remove('hidden');
            });
        }
        function renderShowcase(dreams) {
            var grid = document.getElementById('showcase-grid');
            var emptyEl = document.getElementById('showcase-empty');
            if (!grid) return;
            grid.innerHTML = '';
            emptyEl.classList.add('hidden');
            dreams.forEach(function(d) {
                var card = document.createElement('div');
                card.className = 'showcase-card';
                card.dataset.dreamId = d.id;
                if (d.is_owner_view) {
                    var myLabel = document.createElement('div');
                    myLabel.className = 'showcase-author';
                    myLabel.textContent = 'Моя мечта';
                    var dreamText = document.createElement('div');
                    dreamText.className = 'showcase-dream';
                    dreamText.textContent = (d.dream || '').slice(0, 200) + ((d.dream || '').length > 200 ? '…' : '');
                    card.appendChild(myLabel);
                    card.appendChild(dreamText);
                    if (d.has_pending_completion) {
                        var pendingP = document.createElement('p');
                        pendingP.style.fontSize = '12px'; pendingP.style.color = '#2e7d32'; pendingP.style.marginTop = '6px';
                        pendingP.textContent = 'Помощник(и) отметили «Готово!» — примите или отправьте на доработку.';
                        card.appendChild(pendingP);
                    }
                    var btnWrap = document.createElement('div');
                    btnWrap.className = 'showcase-btns-wrap';
                    btnWrap.style.display = 'flex'; btnWrap.style.gap = '8px'; btnWrap.style.marginTop = '8px'; btnWrap.style.flexWrap = 'wrap';
                    var acceptBtn = document.createElement('button');
                    acceptBtn.type = 'button';
                    acceptBtn.className = 'showcase-help-btn';
                    acceptBtn.textContent = 'Принять';
                    acceptBtn.addEventListener('click', function() { openAcceptCompletionModal(d.id); });
                    var declineBtn = document.createElement('button');
                    declineBtn.type = 'button';
                    declineBtn.className = 'showcase-revert-btn';
                    declineBtn.style.background = '#f5f5f5'; declineBtn.style.color = '#666'; declineBtn.style.border = '1px solid #ccc';
                    declineBtn.textContent = 'Отказаться';
                    declineBtn.addEventListener('click', function() { declineHelp(d.id); });
                    btnWrap.appendChild(acceptBtn);
                    btnWrap.appendChild(declineBtn);
                    card.appendChild(btnWrap);
                    grid.appendChild(card);
                } else {
                var author = document.createElement('div');
                author.className = 'showcase-author';
                author.textContent = '👤 ' + (d.user_name || 'Участник') + (d.date ? ' · ' + formatDeadlineDisplay(String(d.date).slice(0, 10)) : '');
                var dreamText = document.createElement('div');
                dreamText.className = 'showcase-dream';
                dreamText.textContent = (d.dream || '').slice(0, 200) + ((d.dream || '').length > 200 ? '…' : '');
                card.appendChild(author);
                card.appendChild(dreamText);
                if (d.price != null && d.price !== '') {
                    var priceEl = document.createElement('div');
                    priceEl.style.fontSize = '0.9em';
                    priceEl.style.color = '#888';
                    priceEl.textContent = '💰 ' + d.price;
                    card.appendChild(priceEl);
                }
                var btnWrap = document.createElement('div');
                btnWrap.className = 'showcase-btns-wrap';
                btnWrap.style.display = 'flex';
                btnWrap.style.alignItems = 'center';
                btnWrap.style.gap = '8px';
                btnWrap.style.marginTop = '8px';
                btnWrap.style.flexWrap = 'wrap';
                if (d.is_helping || d.is_helped) {
                    if (d.is_helping) {
                        if (d.pending_completion_request) {
                            var sentBtn = document.createElement('button');
                            sentBtn.type = 'button';
                            sentBtn.className = 'showcase-sent-btn';
                            sentBtn.textContent = 'Отправлено';
                            sentBtn.disabled = true;
                            btnWrap.appendChild(sentBtn);
                        } else {
                            var readyBtn = document.createElement('button');
                            readyBtn.type = 'button';
                            readyBtn.className = 'showcase-help-btn';
                            readyBtn.textContent = 'Готово!';
                            readyBtn.addEventListener('click', function() { requestCompletion(d); });
                            btnWrap.appendChild(readyBtn);
                        }
                    }
                    var revertBtn = document.createElement('button');
                    revertBtn.type = 'button';
                    revertBtn.className = 'showcase-revert-btn';
                    revertBtn.textContent = '↩ Вернуть';
                    revertBtn.style.background = '#f5f5f5';
                    revertBtn.style.color = '#666';
                    revertBtn.style.border = '1px solid #ccc';
                    revertBtn.addEventListener('click', function() { revertHelp(d.id); });
                    btnWrap.appendChild(revertBtn);
                } else {
                    var helpBtn = document.createElement('button');
                    helpBtn.type = 'button';
                    helpBtn.className = 'showcase-help-btn';
                    helpBtn.style.flex = '0 1 auto';
                    helpBtn.style.maxWidth = '180px';
                    helpBtn.textContent = '🤝 Хочу помочь!';
                    helpBtn.addEventListener('click', function() { openHelpModal(d); });
                    btnWrap.appendChild(helpBtn);
                }
                var favWrap = document.createElement('span');
                favWrap.style.display = 'inline-flex';
                favWrap.style.alignItems = 'center';
                favWrap.style.gap = '4px';
                var favBtn = document.createElement('button');
                favBtn.type = 'button';
                favBtn.className = 'showcase-fav' + (d.is_favorite ? ' showcase-fav-liked' : '');
                favBtn.title = d.is_favorite ? 'Убрать из избранного' : 'В избранное';
                favBtn.textContent = '♥';
                favBtn.addEventListener('click', function(e) { e.stopPropagation(); toggleShowcaseFavorite(d.id, favBtn, countSpan); });
                var countSpan = document.createElement('span');
                countSpan.className = 'showcase-fav-count';
                countSpan.style.fontSize = '0.9em';
                countSpan.style.color = '#666';
                var fc = (d.favorites_count != null ? d.favorites_count : 0);
                countSpan.textContent = (fc >= 2) ? String(fc) : '';
                favWrap.appendChild(favBtn);
                favWrap.appendChild(countSpan);
                btnWrap.appendChild(favWrap);
                card.appendChild(btnWrap);
                grid.appendChild(card);
                recordDreamView(d.id);
                }
            });
        }
        function recordDreamView(dreamId) {
            if (!currentUser || !currentUser.id) return;
            fetch(API_BASE_URL + '/dreams/' + dreamId + '/view', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                body: JSON.stringify({ user_id: currentUser.id })
            }).catch(function() {});
        }
        function updateShowcaseCount(key, delta) {
            var el = document.querySelector('.showcase-count[data-count="' + key + '"]');
            if (el) { var n = parseInt(el.textContent, 10) || 0; el.textContent = Math.max(0, n + delta); }
        }
        function toggleShowcaseFavorite(dreamId, btnEl, countEl) {
            if (!currentUser || !currentUser.id) return;
            var isFav = btnEl.classList.contains('showcase-fav-liked');
            var url = API_BASE_URL + '/dreams/' + dreamId + '/favorite';
            function applyUnliked() {
                var d = showcaseDreamsCache.find(function(x) { return x.id === dreamId; });
                if (d) { d.is_favorite = false; if (d.favorites_count != null && d.favorites_count > 0) d.favorites_count--; }
                updateShowcaseCount('favorites', -1);
                renderShowcase(showcaseDreamsCache);
            }
            function applyLiked() {
                var d = showcaseDreamsCache.find(function(x) { return x.id === dreamId; });
                if (d) { d.is_favorite = true; d.favorites_count = (d.favorites_count || 0) + 1; }
                updateShowcaseCount('favorites', 1);
                renderShowcase(showcaseDreamsCache);
            }
            if (isFav) {
                applyUnliked();
                fetch(url + '?user_id=' + currentUser.id, { method: 'DELETE' })
                    .then(function(r) { if (!r.ok) throw new Error(r.statusText); })
                    .catch(function() { applyLiked(); showToast('Не удалось убрать из избранного.'); });
            } else {
                applyLiked();
                fetch(url, { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ user_id: currentUser.id }) })
                    .then(function(r) { if (!r.ok) return r.json().then(function(j) { throw new Error(j.detail || r.statusText); }); })
                    .catch(function() { applyUnliked(); showToast('Не удалось добавить в избранное.'); });
            }
        }
        function showToast(message) {
            var container = document.getElementById('toast-container');
            if (!container) return;
            var el = document.createElement('div');
            el.className = 'toast';
            el.textContent = message;
            container.appendChild(el);
            container.classList.remove('hidden');
            setTimeout(function() {
                el.remove();
                if (container.children.length === 0) container.classList.add('hidden');
            }, 3500);
        }
        function requestCompletion(dream) {
            if (!currentUser || !currentUser.id) return;
            fetch(API_BASE_URL + '/dreams/' + dream.id + '/completion-request', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                body: JSON.stringify({ user_id: currentUser.id })
            }).then(function(r) {
                if (!r.ok) return;
                return r.json();
            }).then(function(data) {
                if (!data) return;
                var d = showcaseDreamsCache.find(function(x) { return x.id === dream.id; });
                if (d) {
                    d.pending_completion_request = true;
                    renderShowcase(showcaseDreamsCache);
                }
                var ownerName = (data && data.owner_name) ? data.owner_name : 'получателя';
                showToast('Ваше сообщение отправлено, ждём ответа от «' + ownerName + '»');
            });
        }
        function markAsHelped(dreamId) {
            if (!currentUser || !currentUser.id) return;
            fetch(API_BASE_URL + '/dreams/' + dreamId + '/helped', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                body: JSON.stringify({ user_id: currentUser.id })
            }).then(function(r) {
                if (!r.ok) return;
                var d = showcaseDreamsCache.find(function(x) { return x.id === dreamId; });
                if (d) {
                    if (d.is_helping) updateShowcaseCount('helping', -1);
                    d.is_helping = false;
                    d.is_helped = true;
                    updateShowcaseCount('helped', 1);
                    renderShowcase(showcaseDreamsCache);
                }
            });
        }
        function revertHelp(dreamId) {
            if (!currentUser || !currentUser.id) return;
            fetch(API_BASE_URL + '/dreams/' + dreamId + '/helped?user_id=' + encodeURIComponent(currentUser.id), {
                method: 'DELETE'
            }).then(function(r) {
                if (!r.ok) return;
                var d = showcaseDreamsCache.find(function(x) { return x.id === dreamId; });
                if (d) {
                    if (d.is_helping) updateShowcaseCount('helping', -1);
                    if (d.is_helped) updateShowcaseCount('helped', -1);
                    d.is_helping = false;
                    d.is_helped = false;
                    showcaseDreamsCache = showcaseDreamsCache.filter(function(x) { return x.id !== dreamId; });
                    renderShowcase(showcaseDreamsCache);
                }
            });
        }
        var pendingAcceptDreamId = null;
        function openAcceptCompletionModal(dreamId) {
            pendingAcceptDreamId = dreamId;
            var modal = document.getElementById('modal-accept-completion');
            if (modal) modal.classList.remove('hidden');
        }
        function closeAcceptCompletionModal() {
            pendingAcceptDreamId = null;
            var modal = document.getElementById('modal-accept-completion');
            if (modal) modal.classList.add('hidden');
        }
        function doAcceptCompletion(dreamId, moveToDone) {
            if (!currentUser || !currentUser.id) return;
            closeAcceptCompletionModal();
            fetch(API_BASE_URL + '/dreams/' + dreamId + '/accept-completion', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                body: JSON.stringify({ user_id: currentUser.id, move_to_done: moveToDone })
            }).then(function(r) {
                if (!r.ok) return;
                showcaseDreamsCache = showcaseDreamsCache.filter(function(x) { return x.id !== dreamId; });
                if (showcaseFilter === 'in_progress') renderShowcase(showcaseDreamsCache);
                loadShowcaseCounts();
                loadNotifications();
                showToast(moveToDone ? 'Мечта перемещена в завершённые.' : 'Исполнение засчитано, мечта остаётся в личных.');
            });
        }
        function acceptCompletion(dreamId) {
            openAcceptCompletionModal(dreamId);
        }
        (function initAcceptCompletionModal() {
            var btnDone = document.getElementById('modal-accept-move-done');
            var btnList = document.getElementById('modal-accept-keep-list');
            var btnCancel = document.getElementById('modal-accept-cancel');
            if (btnDone) btnDone.addEventListener('click', function() { if (pendingAcceptDreamId != null) doAcceptCompletion(pendingAcceptDreamId, true); });
            if (btnList) btnList.addEventListener('click', function() { if (pendingAcceptDreamId != null) doAcceptCompletion(pendingAcceptDreamId, false); });
            if (btnCancel) btnCancel.addEventListener('click', closeAcceptCompletionModal);
        })();
        function revisionCompletion(dreamId) {
            if (!currentUser || !currentUser.id) return;
            fetch(API_BASE_URL + '/dreams/' + dreamId + '/revision', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                body: JSON.stringify({ user_id: currentUser.id })
            }).then(function(r) {
                if (!r.ok) return;
                loadShowcaseCounts();
                loadNotifications();
                if (showcaseFilter === 'in_progress') loadShowcase();
                showToast('Отправлено на доработку.');
            });
        }
        function declineHelp(dreamId) {
            if (!currentUser || !currentUser.id) return;
            fetch(API_BASE_URL + '/dreams/' + dreamId + '/decline-help', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                body: JSON.stringify({ user_id: currentUser.id })
            }).then(function(r) {
                if (!r.ok) return;
                showcaseDreamsCache = showcaseDreamsCache.filter(function(x) { return x.id !== dreamId; });
                if (showcaseFilter === 'in_progress') renderShowcase(showcaseDreamsCache);
                loadShowcaseCounts();
                loadNotifications();
                showToast('Помощь отклонена.');
            });
        }
        var currentHelpDream = null;
        function openHelpModal(dream) {
            currentHelpDream = dream;
            var authorEl = document.getElementById('modal-help-author');
            var dreamTextEl = document.getElementById('modal-help-dream-text');
            var contactBtns = document.getElementById('modal-help-contact-buttons');
            var contactFallback = document.getElementById('modal-help-contact-fallback');
            var msg = (function() {
                var hn = (currentUser && (currentUser.full_name || '').trim()) || '...';
                return 'Привет ' + (dream.user_name || 'тебя') + '. Меня зовут ' + hn + '. Я хочу помочь тебе в осуществлении мечты: «' + (dream.dream || '') + '», которую я увидел в «Завтраке исполняющем желания».';
            })();
            var messageEl = document.getElementById('modal-help-message');
            if (messageEl) messageEl.value = msg;
            if (authorEl) authorEl.textContent = (dream.user_name || 'Участник') + (dream.city ? ', ' + dream.city : '');
            if (dreamTextEl) dreamTextEl.textContent = (dream.dream || 'Нет описания') + (dream.deadline ? '\n\nДедлайн: до ' + formatDeadlineDisplay(String(dream.deadline).slice(0, 10)) : '');
            contactBtns.innerHTML = '';
            contactFallback.textContent = 'Загрузка контактов…';
            document.getElementById('modal-help-dream').classList.remove('hidden');
            fetch(API_BASE_URL + '/dreams/' + dream.id + '/help-intent', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ user_id: currentUser.id }) }).catch(function() {});
            var d = showcaseDreamsCache.find(function(x) { return x.id === dream.id; });
            if (d && !d.is_helping) { d.is_helping = true; updateShowcaseCount('helping', 1); }
            function renderContactButtons(contact) {
                contactFallback.textContent = '';
                var buttons = [];
                var phone = (contact.phone || '').toString().replace(/\D/g, '');
                if (phone.length >= 10) {
                    var waPhone = (contact.phone || '').toString().replace(/^\+/, '').replace(/\D/g, '');
                    buttons.push({ url: 'https://wa.me/' + waPhone + '?text=' + encodeURIComponent(msg), label: 'WhatsApp' });
                }
                var tg = (contact.telegram || '').trim();
                if (tg) {
                    var username = tg.replace(/^@/, '').replace(/^https?:\/\/t\.me\//i, '');
                    if (username) buttons.push({ url: 'https://t.me/' + username + '?text=' + encodeURIComponent(msg), label: 'Telegram' });
                }
                var vk = (contact.vk || '').trim();
                if (vk) {
                    var vkUrl = vk;
                    if (!/^https?:\/\//i.test(vkUrl)) vkUrl = 'https://' + vkUrl;
                    buttons.push({ url: vkUrl, label: 'VK' });
                }
                if (buttons.length > 0) {
                    buttons.forEach(function(b) {
                        var a = document.createElement('a');
                        a.href = b.url;
                        a.target = '_blank';
                        a.rel = 'noopener';
                        a.textContent = b.label;
                        contactBtns.appendChild(a);
                    });
                } else {
                    contactFallback.textContent = 'Автор не оставил контактов. Скопируйте сообщение и отправьте удобным способом.';
                }
            }
            var ctrl = new AbortController();
            var timeout = setTimeout(function() { ctrl.abort(); }, 5000);
            fetch(API_BASE_URL + '/dreams/' + dream.id + '/contact', { cache: 'no-store', signal: ctrl.signal })
                .then(function(r) { return r.ok ? r.json() : Promise.reject(); })
                .then(function(contact) {
                    clearTimeout(timeout);
                    renderContactButtons(contact);
                })
                .catch(function() {
                    clearTimeout(timeout);
                    renderContactButtons({ telegram: dream.telegram, vk: dream.vk, phone: dream.phone });
                });
        }
        function updateHelpModalMessage() {
            if (!currentHelpDream) return;
            var messageEl = document.getElementById('modal-help-message');
            var helperName = (currentUser && (currentUser.full_name || '').trim()) || '...';
            var msg = 'Привет ' + (currentHelpDream.user_name || 'тебя') + '. Меня зовут ' + helperName + '. Я хочу помочь тебе в осуществлении мечты: «' + (currentHelpDream.dream || '') + '», которую я увидел в «Завтраке исполняющем желания».';
            if (messageEl) messageEl.value = msg;
        }
        function closeHelpModal() {
            document.getElementById('modal-help-dream').classList.add('hidden');
            currentHelpDream = null;
        }
        (function initShowcase() {
            var showcaseTitle = document.getElementById('app-showcase-title');
            if (showcaseTitle) {
                showcaseTitle.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    if (!currentUser) return;
                    showcaseFilter = 'all';
                    document.querySelectorAll('.showcase-filter-link').forEach(function(l) { l.classList.remove('active'); });
                    showcaseTitle.classList.add('active');
                    if (document.getElementById('showcase-block').classList.contains('hidden')) {
                        switchMenu('showcase');
                    } else {
                        loadShowcase();
                    }
                });
            }
            document.querySelectorAll('.showcase-filter-link').forEach(function(link) {
                link.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    document.querySelectorAll('.showcase-filter-link').forEach(function(l) { l.classList.remove('active'); });
                    if (showcaseTitle) showcaseTitle.classList.remove('active');
                    this.classList.add('active');
                    showcaseFilter = this.dataset.filter || 'all';
                    if (document.getElementById('showcase-block').classList.contains('hidden')) {
                        switchMenu('showcase');
                    } else {
                        loadShowcase();
                    }
                });
            });
            document.getElementById('modal-help-close').addEventListener('click', closeHelpModal);
            document.getElementById('modal-help-dream').addEventListener('click', function(e) { if (e.target === this) closeHelpModal(); });
            document.getElementById('modal-help-copy').addEventListener('click', function() {
                var msg = document.getElementById('modal-help-message');
                if (!msg) return;
                navigator.clipboard.writeText(msg.value).then(function() {
                    var fb = document.getElementById('modal-help-copy-feedback');
                    if (fb) { fb.textContent = 'Скопировано!'; setTimeout(function() { fb.textContent = ''; }, 2000); }
                }).catch(function() {
                    msg.select();
                    document.execCommand('copy');
                    var fb = document.getElementById('modal-help-copy-feedback');
                    if (fb) { fb.textContent = 'Скопировано!'; setTimeout(function() { fb.textContent = ''; }, 2000); }
                });
            });
            document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) { if (e.key === 'Escape' && document.getElementById('modal-help-dream') && !document.getElementById('modal-help-dream').classList.contains('hidden')) closeHelpModal(); });
        })();

        var stepsFlatCache = [];
        var stepsViewUserId = null;
        async function loadSteps(userId, isBuddy) {
            var listEl = document.getElementById('steps-list');
            var emptyEl = document.getElementById('steps-empty');
            var errEl = document.getElementById('steps-error');
            var deletedWrap = document.getElementById('steps-deleted-wrap');
            var deletedList = document.getElementById('steps-deleted-list');
            var titleEl = document.querySelector('.steps-section-title');
            listEl.innerHTML = '';
            deletedList.innerHTML = '';
            emptyEl.classList.add('hidden');
            errEl.classList.add('hidden');
            deletedWrap.classList.add('hidden');
            if (!currentUser) return;
            var uid = userId == null ? 0 : Number(userId);
            stepsViewUserId = uid;
            if (!uid) {
                stepsFlatCache = [];
                if (titleEl) titleEl.textContent = isBuddy ? 'Шаги бадди' : 'Все шаги';
                renderStepsList(getStepsFilterActive(), isBuddy);
                return;
            }
            if (titleEl) titleEl.textContent = isBuddy ? ('Шаги бадди: ' + ((currentUser.buddy_name || '').trim() || 'Бадди')) : 'Все шаги';
            try {
                var res = await fetch(API_BASE_URL + '/dreams?user_id=' + uid, { cache: 'no-store' });
                if (res.status === 401) { clearSessionAndShowLogin('Сессия истекла. Войдите снова.'); return; }
                if (!res.ok) { errEl.textContent = 'Ошибка загрузки'; errEl.classList.remove('hidden'); return; }
                var data = await res.json();
                var dreams = data.dreams || [];
                stepsFlatCache = [];
                var today = new Date();
                var todayStr = today.toISOString().slice(0, 10);
                var currentYear = today.getFullYear();
                function lastDayOfMonth(month0, year) {
                    var d = new Date(year, month0 + 1, 0);
                    return year + '-' + String(d.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0') + '-' + String(d.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
                }
                var defaultPlan = 17000;
                dreams.forEach(function(d) {
                    var steps = d.steps || [];
                    var dreamTitle = (d.dream || d.title || '').trim().slice(0, 60) || 'Мечта';
                    var isFinGoal = steps.length > 0 && steps[0].plan_amount != null;
                    if (isFinGoal) {
                        for (var monthIdx = 0; monthIdx < steps.length && monthIdx < 12; monthIdx++) {
                            var s = steps[monthIdx];
                            if (!s || s.deleted) continue;
                            var deadlineStr = lastDayOfMonth(monthIdx, currentYear);
                            var prevCompleted = monthIdx > 0 && (steps[monthIdx - 1].completed || (steps[monthIdx - 1].fact_amount != null && steps[monthIdx - 1].fact_amount !== ''));
                            var showStep = (deadlineStr <= todayStr) || prevCompleted;
                            if (!showStep) continue;
                            var isEarly = deadlineStr > todayStr;
                            var N;
                            if (isEarly) {
                                N = (s.plan_amount != null ? s.plan_amount : defaultPlan);
                            } else {
                                var cumPlan = 0, cumFactPrev = 0;
                                for (var i = 0; i <= monthIdx; i++) cumPlan += (steps[i].plan_amount != null ? steps[i].plan_amount : defaultPlan);
                                for (var j = 0; j < monthIdx; j++) cumFactPrev += (steps[j].fact_amount != null ? Number(steps[j].fact_amount) : 0);
                                N = Math.round((cumPlan - cumFactPrev) / 1000) * 1000;
                                if (N < 0) N = 0;
                            }
                            stepsFlatCache.push({
                                dream_id: d.id,
                                dream_title: dreamTitle,
                                id: s.id,
                                title: 'Внеси ' + (N / 1000) + ' т.р.',
                                completed: s.completed,
                                deadline: deadlineStr,
                                deleted: s.deleted || false,
                                isFinStep: true,
                                amountN: N,
                                waived: false,
                                completed_late: false
                            });
                        }
                    } else {
                    steps.forEach(function(s) {
                        stepsFlatCache.push({
                            dream_id: d.id,
                            dream_title: dreamTitle,
                            id: s.id,
                            title: s.title || '',
                            completed: s.completed,
                            deadline: s.deadline || null,
                            deleted: s.deleted || false,
                            start_time: s.start_time || null,
                            end_time: s.end_time || null,
                            series_id: s.series_id || null,
                            series_index: s.series_index || null,
                            series_total: s.series_total || null,
                            waived: !!s.waived,
                            completed_late: !!s.completed_late
                        });
                    });
                    }
                });
                renderStepsList(getStepsFilterActive(), isBuddy);
            } catch (e) {
                console.error('loadSteps', e);
                errEl.textContent = 'Ошибка загрузки';
                errEl.classList.remove('hidden');
            }
        }
        function getStepsFilterActive() {
            var activeBtn = document.querySelector('#steps-filter .dreams-filter-btn.active');
            return [activeBtn ? (activeBtn.dataset.filter || 'current') : 'current'];
        }
        function stepTimeMinutes(val) {
            if (!val) return null;
            var parts = String(val).slice(0, 5).split(':');
            if (parts.length < 2) return null;
            var hh = parseInt(parts[0], 10), mm = parseInt(parts[1], 10);
            if (isNaN(hh) || isNaN(mm)) return null;
            return hh * 60 + mm;
        }
        function stepMaxTimeMinutes(step) {
            var a = stepTimeMinutes(step && step.start_time);
            var b = stepTimeMinutes(step && step.end_time);
            if (a == null && b == null) return null;
            if (a == null) return b;
            if (b == null) return a;
            return Math.max(a, b);
        }
        function stepOverdueBoundaryUtcMs(deadlineStr, step) {
            if (!deadlineStr || !step) return null;
            var d = String(deadlineStr).slice(0, 10);
            if (!/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/.test(d)) return null;
            var mm = stepMaxTimeMinutes(step);
            var y = parseInt(d.slice(0, 4), 10), mo = parseInt(d.slice(5, 7), 10) - 1, day = parseInt(d.slice(8, 10), 10);
            if (mm == null)
                return Date.UTC(y, mo, day) + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000;
            var hh = Math.floor(mm / 60), m = mm % 60;
            return Date.UTC(y, mo, day, hh, m, 0) + 60 * 1000;
        }
        function stepIsOverdueUtc(step) {
            if (!step || step.completed || step.deleted || step.waived) return false;
            var ms = stepOverdueBoundaryUtcMs(step.deadline, step);
            if (ms == null) return false;
            return Date.now() >= ms;
        }
        /** Для подписей модалок: «11 просроченных шагов» / «1 просроченный шаг» / «3 просроченных шага». */
        function overdueStepsPhraseRu(n) {
            var k = Math.floor(Math.abs(Number(n))) || 0;
            if (k < 1) return '0 просроченных шагов';
            var m100 = k % 100, m10 = k % 10;
            if (m100 >= 11 && m100 <= 14) return k + ' просроченных шагов';
            if (m10 === 1) return '1 просроченный шаг';
            if (m10 >= 2 && m10 <= 4) return k + ' просроченных шага';
            return k + ' просроченных шагов';
        }
        /** Подсказка ✓ в компактной серии (только просроченные экземпляры). */
        function overdueSeriesMarkDoneTitleRu(n) {
            var k = Math.floor(Math.abs(Number(n))) || 0;
            if (k < 1) return 'Выполнено';
            var m100 = k % 100, m10 = k % 10;
            var frag;
            if (m100 >= 11 && m100 <= 14) frag = k + ' просроченных';
            else if (m10 === 1) frag = '1 просроченный';
            else if (m10 >= 2 && m10 <= 4) frag = k + ' просроченных';
            else frag = k + ' просроченных';
            return 'Отметить ' + frag + ' как выполненные';
        }
        /** Подсказка − в компактной серии. */
        function overdueSeriesMarkWaiveTitleRu(n) {
            var k = Math.floor(Math.abs(Number(n))) || 0;
            if (k < 1) return 'Не выполнен';
            var m100 = k % 100, m10 = k % 10;
            var frag;
            if (m100 >= 11 && m100 <= 14) frag = k + ' просроченных';
            else if (m10 === 1) frag = '1 просроченный';
            else if (m10 >= 2 && m10 <= 4) frag = k + ' просроченных';
            else frag = k + ' просроченных';
            return 'Отметить ' + frag + ' как не выполненные';
        }
        var stepWaivedModal = { dreamId: 0, stepId: 0 };
        function updateStepWaivedSaveButtonState() {
            var ta = document.getElementById('step-waived-note-text');
            var saveBtn = document.getElementById('step-waived-save');
            if (!saveBtn) return;
            var has = !!(ta && (ta.value || '').trim().length);
            saveBtn.disabled = !has;
        }
        function openStepWaivedModal(dreamId, stepId) {
            stepWaivedModal.dreamId = dreamId;
            stepWaivedModal.stepId = stepId;
            var ta = document.getElementById('step-waived-note-text');
            if (ta) ta.value = '';
            updateStepWaivedSaveButtonState();
            var m = document.getElementById('modal-step-waived');
            if (m) m.classList.remove('hidden');
        }
        function closeStepWaivedModal() {
            var m = document.getElementById('modal-step-waived');
            if (m) m.classList.add('hidden');
            stepWaivedModal = { dreamId: 0, stepId: 0 };
        }
        async function loadStepDiary() {
            var list = document.getElementById('diary-events-list');
            var empty = document.getElementById('diary-events-empty');
            var err = document.getElementById('diary-events-error');
            if (!list || !currentUser) return;
            list.innerHTML = '';
            if (empty) empty.classList.add('hidden');
            if (err) { err.classList.add('hidden'); err.textContent = ''; }
            try {
                var res = await fetch(API_BASE_URL + '/steps/events?user_id=' + encodeURIComponent(currentUser.id) + '&limit=200', { cache: 'no-store' });
                if (!res.ok) throw new Error('bad');
                var data = await res.json();
                var ev = data.events || [];
                if (empty) empty.classList.toggle('hidden', ev.length > 0);
                ev.forEach(function(e) {
                    var li = document.createElement('li');
                    var t = e.created_at ? String(e.created_at).replace('T', ' ').slice(0, 16) : '';
                    li.textContent = (t ? t + ' — ' : '') + (e.step_title || '') + ' — ' + (e.message || e.event_type || '');
                    list.appendChild(li);
                });
            } catch (e) {
                if (err) { err.textContent = 'Не удалось загрузить дневник.'; err.classList.remove('hidden'); }
            }
        }
        function renderStepsList(activeFilters, isBuddy) {
            var listEl = document.getElementById('steps-list');
            var emptyEl = document.getElementById('steps-empty');
            var deletedWrap = document.getElementById('steps-deleted-wrap');
            var deletedEmptyEl = document.getElementById('steps-deleted-empty');
            var filters = Array.isArray(activeFilters) ? activeFilters : [activeFilters];
            var canManage = !isBuddy || !!(currentUser && currentUser.buddy_trust);

            var showDeleted = canManage && filters.indexOf('deleted') !== -1;
            if (showDeleted) {
                deletedWrap.classList.remove('hidden');
                listEl.innerHTML = '';
                emptyEl.classList.add('hidden');
                var deletedList = stepsFlatCache.filter(function(s) { return s.deleted; });
                if (deletedList.length === 0) {
                    if (deletedEmptyEl) deletedEmptyEl.classList.remove('hidden');
                    document.getElementById('steps-deleted-list').innerHTML = '';
                } else {
                    if (deletedEmptyEl) deletedEmptyEl.classList.add('hidden');
                    renderStepsDeletedList();
                }
            } else {
                deletedWrap.classList.add('hidden');
            }

            var today = new Date();
            var todayStr = today.toISOString().slice(0, 10);
            var in7Days = new Date(today);
            in7Days.setDate(in7Days.getDate() + 7);
            var in7DaysStr = in7Days.toISOString().slice(0, 10);

            var list = sortStepsByDeadline(stepsFlatCache.filter(function(s) {
                if (s.deleted) return false;
                if (filters.indexOf('all') !== -1) return true;
                var dl = (s.deadline || '').toString().slice(0, 10);
                var isCurrent = dl && dl >= todayStr && dl <= in7DaysStr && !s.completed && !s.waived;
                var isOverdue = stepIsOverdueUtc(s);
                var isCompleted = s.completed;
                var isWaived = !!s.waived;
                if (filters.indexOf('current') !== -1 && isCurrent) return true;
                if (filters.indexOf('overdue') !== -1 && isOverdue) return true;
                if (filters.indexOf('waived') !== -1 && isWaived) return true;
                if (filters.indexOf('completed') !== -1 && isCompleted) return true;
                return false;
            }));
            var titleCounterMap = buildStepTitleCounterMap(list, stepsFlatCache.filter(function(s) { return s && !s.deleted; }));
            listEl.innerHTML = '';
            if (list.length === 0) {
                emptyEl.classList.remove('hidden');
                return;
            }
            emptyEl.classList.add('hidden');
            var lastDividerIso = null;
            list.forEach(function(s) {
                var dayKey = (s.deadline || '').toString().slice(0, 10);
                if (/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/.test(dayKey) && dayKey !== lastDividerIso) {
                    var divLi = document.createElement('li');
                    divLi.className = 'step-day-divider';
                    divLi.setAttribute('role', 'separator');
                    divLi.textContent = formatStepsListDayDivider(dayKey);
                    listEl.appendChild(divLi);
                    lastDividerIso = dayKey;
                }
                var li = document.createElement('li');
                li.className = 'step-item-plain step-unified-line' + (s.completed ? ' completed' : '') + (s.waived ? ' step-waived' : '');
                li.dataset.dreamId = s.dream_id;
                li.dataset.stepId = s.id;
                li.innerHTML = buildUnifiedStepRowHtml(s.dream_id, s, titleCounterMap, { canManage: canManage });
                listEl.appendChild(li);
                var inner = li.querySelector('.step-unified-inner');
                if (inner) wireUnifiedStepRow(inner, s.dream_id, s, {
                    canManage: canManage,
                    isReadOnly: !canManage,
                    useAccordionDelete: false,
                    onRefresh: function() {
                        dreamIdToRestoreAfterRefresh = s.dream_id;
                        refreshAfterDreamChange();
                    }
                });
            });
        }
        function renderStepsDeletedList() {
            var deletedList = document.getElementById('steps-deleted-list');
            var list = sortStepsByDeadline(stepsFlatCache.filter(function(s) { return s.deleted; }));
            deletedList.innerHTML = '';
            var lastDelDividerIso = null;
            list.forEach(function(s) {
                var dayKey = (s.deadline || '').toString().slice(0, 10);
                if (/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/.test(dayKey) && dayKey !== lastDelDividerIso) {
                    var divLi = document.createElement('li');
                    divLi.className = 'step-day-divider';
                    divLi.setAttribute('role', 'separator');
                    divLi.textContent = formatStepsListDayDivider(dayKey);
                    deletedList.appendChild(divLi);
                    lastDelDividerIso = dayKey;
                }
                var li = document.createElement('li');
                li.className = 'step-item-plain step-unified-line';
                li.dataset.dreamId = s.dream_id;
                li.dataset.stepId = s.id;
                li.innerHTML = '<div class="step-unified-inner"><div class="step-actions-left"></div><div class="step-main-col"><span class="step-title-wrap"><span class="step-title-text">' + escapeHtml(s.title) + '</span></span>' + buildStepTimeUnderTitleHtml(s) + '</div><div class="step-actions-right"><span class="step-restore" role="button" tabindex="0" title="Восстановить шаг">Восстановить</span></div></div>';
                deletedList.appendChild(li);
                li.querySelector('.step-restore').addEventListener('click', function() { setStepDeleted(s.dream_id, s.id, false); });
            });
        }
        async function setStepDeleted(dreamId, stepId, deleted) {
            try {
                var url = API_BASE_URL + '/dreams/' + dreamId + '/steps/' + stepId + '?' + dreamApiUserParams();
                var res = await fetch(url, { method: 'PATCH', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ deleted: deleted }) });
                if (!res.ok) { alert('Ошибка'); return; }
                var s = stepsFlatCache.find(function(x) { return x.dream_id === dreamId && x.id === stepId; });
                if (s) s.deleted = deleted;
                dreamIdToRestoreAfterRefresh = dreamId;
                refreshAfterDreamChange();
            } catch (e) { alert('Ошибка сети'); }
        }
        var stepCommentModal = { dreamId: 0, stepId: 0 };
        function updateStepCommentSaveState() {
            var ta = document.getElementById('step-comment-note-text');
            var saveBtn = document.getElementById('step-comment-save');
            if (!saveBtn) return;
            saveBtn.disabled = !(ta && (ta.value || '').trim().length);
        }
        function openStepCommentModal(dreamId, stepId) {
            stepCommentModal = { dreamId: dreamId, stepId: stepId };
            var ta = document.getElementById('step-comment-note-text');
            if (ta) ta.value = '';
            updateStepCommentSaveState();
            var m = document.getElementById('modal-step-comment');
            if (m) m.classList.remove('hidden');
        }
        function closeStepCommentModal() {
            var m = document.getElementById('modal-step-comment');
            if (m) m.classList.add('hidden');
            stepCommentModal = { dreamId: 0, stepId: 0 };
        }
        var stepMoveModal = { dreamId: 0, stepId: 0 };
        function updateStepMoveButtonsState() {
            var dateIn = document.getElementById('step-move-deadline');
            var noteTa = document.getElementById('step-move-note-text');
            var saveBtn = document.getElementById('step-move-save');
            var skipBtn = document.getElementById('step-move-skip');
            if (!dateIn || !saveBtn || !skipBtn) return;
            var iso = uiDateToIso((dateIn.value || '').trim());
            var dateOk = !!iso;
            skipBtn.disabled = !dateOk;
            saveBtn.disabled = !dateOk;
        }
        function openStepMoveModal(dreamId, stepId, currentDeadline) {
            stepMoveModal = { dreamId: dreamId, stepId: stepId };
            var dateIn = document.getElementById('step-move-deadline');
            var noteTa = document.getElementById('step-move-note-text');
            if (noteTa) noteTa.value = '';
            if (dateIn) {
                var iso = (currentDeadline || '').toString().slice(0, 10);
                dateIn.value = /^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/.test(iso) ? isoToUiDate(iso) : '';
                dateIn.classList.remove('island-date-field-invalid');
            }
            updateStepMoveButtonsState();
            document.getElementById('modal-step-move').classList.remove('hidden');
        }
        function closeStepMoveModal() {
            document.getElementById('modal-step-move').classList.add('hidden');
            stepMoveModal = { dreamId: 0, stepId: 0 };
        }
        var stepDoneLateModal = { dreamId: 0, stepId: 0, doneBtn: null };
        function updateStepDoneLateSaveState() {
            var ta = document.getElementById('step-done-late-note-text');
            var saveBtn = document.getElementById('step-done-late-save');
            if (!saveBtn) return;
            saveBtn.disabled = !(ta && (ta.value || '').trim().length);
        }
        function openStepDoneLateModal(dreamId, stepId, doneBtnEl) {
            stepDoneLateModal = { dreamId: dreamId, stepId: stepId, doneBtn: doneBtnEl || null };
            var ta = document.getElementById('step-done-late-note-text');
            if (ta) ta.value = '';
            updateStepDoneLateSaveState();
            document.getElementById('modal-step-done-late').classList.remove('hidden');
        }
        function closeStepDoneLateModal() {
            document.getElementById('modal-step-done-late').classList.add('hidden');
            stepDoneLateModal = { dreamId: 0, stepId: 0, doneBtn: null };
        }
        var stepSeriesConfirmModal = { onConfirm: null };
        function openStepSeriesConfirmModal(text, onConfirm) {
            var txt = document.getElementById('step-series-confirm-text');
            if (txt) txt.textContent = text || 'Подтверди действие для серии шагов.';
            stepSeriesConfirmModal.onConfirm = typeof onConfirm === 'function' ? onConfirm : null;
            var m = document.getElementById('modal-step-series-confirm');
            if (m) m.classList.remove('hidden');
        }
        function closeStepSeriesConfirmModal() {
            var m = document.getElementById('modal-step-series-confirm');
            if (m) m.classList.add('hidden');
            stepSeriesConfirmModal.onConfirm = null;
        }
        function confirmStepSeriesConfirmModal() {
            var fn = stepSeriesConfirmModal.onConfirm;
            closeStepSeriesConfirmModal();
            if (typeof fn === 'function') fn();
        }
        var stepSeriesDeleteModal = { seriesObj: null, dreamId: 0, onRefresh: null };
        function utcTodayIsoDate() {
            var d = new Date();
            return d.getUTCFullYear() + '-' + String(d.getUTCMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0') + '-' + String(d.getUTCDate()).padStart(2, '0');
        }
        function stepDeadlineDateIso(step) {
            return (step && step.deadline) ? String(step.deadline).slice(0, 10) : '';
        }
        /** Серия: шаги для частичного удаления по календарной дате дедлайна (UTC). Прошлые — строго до сегодня; будущие — сегодня и позже. */
        function compactSeriesStepsForDeleteScope(seriesObj, scope) {
            var all = (seriesObj && seriesObj.steps) ? seriesObj.steps.slice().filter(function(st) { return st && !st.deleted; }) : [];
            if (scope === 'all') return all;
            var today = utcTodayIsoDate();
            if (scope === 'past')
                return all.filter(function(st) {
                    var ds = stepDeadlineDateIso(st);
                    return /^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/.test(ds) && ds < today;
                });
            if (scope === 'future')
                return all.filter(function(st) {
                    var ds = stepDeadlineDateIso(st);
                    return /^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/.test(ds) && ds >= today;
                });
            return all;
        }
        function openStepSeriesDeleteModal(seriesObj, dreamId, onRefresh) {
            stepSeriesDeleteModal.seriesObj = seriesObj;
            stepSeriesDeleteModal.dreamId = dreamId;
            stepSeriesDeleteModal.onRefresh = typeof onRefresh === 'function' ? onRefresh : null;
            var lead = document.getElementById('step-series-delete-lead');
            if (lead) lead.textContent = 'Серия «' + (seriesObj && seriesObj.title ? seriesObj.title : '') + '».';
            var nAll = compactSeriesStepsForDeleteScope(seriesObj, 'all').length;
            var nPast = compactSeriesStepsForDeleteScope(seriesObj, 'past').length;
            var nFut = compactSeriesStepsForDeleteScope(seriesObj, 'future').length;
            var bAll = document.getElementById('step-series-delete-all');
            var bPast = document.getElementById('step-series-delete-past');
            var bFut = document.getElementById('step-series-delete-future');
            if (bAll) bAll.disabled = nAll === 0;
            if (bPast) bPast.disabled = nPast === 0;
            if (bFut) bFut.disabled = nFut === 0;
            var m = document.getElementById('modal-step-series-delete');
            if (m) m.classList.remove('hidden');
        }
        function closeStepSeriesDeleteModal() {
            var m = document.getElementById('modal-step-series-delete');
            if (m) m.classList.add('hidden');
            stepSeriesDeleteModal = { seriesObj: null, dreamId: 0, onRefresh: null };
        }
        function runStepSeriesDeleteScope(scope) {
            var ctx = stepSeriesDeleteModal;
            var g = ctx.seriesObj;
            var dreamId = ctx.dreamId;
            var onr = ctx.onRefresh;
            closeStepSeriesDeleteModal();
            if (!g) return;
            var targets = compactSeriesStepsForDeleteScope(g, scope);
            if (!targets.length) {
                alert('Нет шагов в выбранной категории');
                return;
            }
            Promise.all(targets.map(function(st) {
                var did = st.dream_id || g.dream_id || dreamId;
                return patchStep(did, st.id, { deleted: true }).then(function() { st.deleted = true; });
            })).then(function() { if (onr) onr(); }).catch(function() { alert('Не удалось сохранить'); });
        }
        var finStepModalContext = null;
        function openFinStepConfirmModal(stepObj, checkboxEl, doneBtnEl) {
            finStepModalContext = { step: stepObj, checkbox: checkboxEl || null, doneBtn: doneBtnEl || null };
            var N = stepObj.amountN != null ? stepObj.amountN : 0;
            var textEl = document.getElementById('modal-fin-step-text');
            var otherWrap = document.getElementById('modal-fin-step-other-wrap');
            var amountInput = document.getElementById('modal-fin-step-amount');
            var btnYes = document.getElementById('modal-fin-step-btn-yes');
            var btnOther = document.getElementById('modal-fin-step-btn-other');
            var btnSave = document.getElementById('modal-fin-step-btn-save');
            var btnCancel = document.getElementById('modal-fin-step-btn-cancel');
            textEl.textContent = 'Я правильно понимаю, что ты вносишь сумму ровно ' + formatNum(Math.round(N)) + ' руб?';
            otherWrap.classList.add('hidden');
            amountInput.value = N;
            btnYes.classList.remove('hidden');
            btnOther.classList.remove('hidden');
            btnSave.classList.add('hidden');
            btnCancel.classList.add('hidden');
            document.getElementById('modal-fin-step-confirm').classList.remove('hidden');
        }
        function closeFinStepConfirmModal() {
            document.getElementById('modal-fin-step-confirm').classList.add('hidden');
