            var checked = [].map.call(overlay.querySelectorAll('.modal-add-step-day-btn.selected'), function(b) { return parseInt(b.dataset.day, 10); });
            if (!checked.length) return null;
            var dates = [];
            var d = new Date(from);
            while (d <= to) {
                if (checked.indexOf(d.getDay()) !== -1) {
                    dates.push(d.getFullYear() + '-' + String(d.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0') + '-' + String(d.getDate()).padStart(2, '0'));
                }
                d.setDate(d.getDate() + 1);
            }
            return dates.length ? dates : null;
        }
        function getSeriesDateBounds(stepObj) {
            var members = getSeriesMembersForCalendarBounds(stepObj);
            var isos = members.map(function(s) { return (s.deadline || '').toString().slice(0, 10); }).filter(Boolean).sort();
            if (!isos.length) return { min: null, max: null };
            return { min: isos[0], max: isos[isos.length - 1] };
        }
        /** В модалке edit-series подставить в поля «Начало» / «Конец» фактический период серии из кэша. */
        function fillEditSeriesPeriodFromBounds() {
            var overlay = document.getElementById('modal-add-step');
            if (!overlay || overlay.dataset.stepModalUi !== 'edit-series') return;
            var fromIn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-date-from');
            var toIn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-date-to');
            var dateSingleIn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-date-single');
            var minStored = (overlay.dataset.seriesBoundsMinIso || '').trim();
            var maxStored = (overlay.dataset.seriesBoundsMaxIso || '').trim();
            var scope = getEditModalScope();
            var singleUi = dateSingleIn && dateSingleIn.value ? dateSingleIn.value.trim() : '';
            if (scope === 'single') {
                if (fromIn) fromIn.value = (minStored ? (isoToUiDate(minStored) || '') : '') || singleUi || '';
                if (toIn) toIn.value = maxStored ? (isoToUiDate(maxStored) || '') : (singleUi || '');
                return;
            }
            if (minStored && maxStored) {
                if (fromIn) fromIn.value = isoToUiDate(minStored) || '';
                if (toIn) toIn.value = isoToUiDate(maxStored) || '';
                return;
            }
            var dreamId = parseInt(overlay.dataset.dreamId, 10);
            var stepId = parseInt(overlay.dataset.stepId, 10);
            if (!dreamId || !stepId) return;
            var ref = getSeriesModalRefStep(overlay);
            if (!ref) return;
            var bounds = getSeriesDateBounds(ref);
            var endUi = bounds.max ? isoToUiDate(bounds.max) : (dateSingleIn && dateSingleIn.value ? dateSingleIn.value.trim() : '');
            var startUi = bounds.min ? isoToUiDate(bounds.min) : endUi;
            if (fromIn) fromIn.value = startUi || '';
            if (toIn) toIn.value = endUi || '';
        }
        /** Какие дни недели встречаются среди дедлайнов серии — для предвыбора кнопок. */
        function inferSeriesWeekdaySelection(stepObj) {
            var members = getSeriesMembersForCalendarBounds(stepObj);
            var days = {};
            members.forEach(function(s) {
                var iso = (s.deadline || '').toString().slice(0, 10);
                if (!iso) return;
                var d = isoToDate(iso);
                if (d) days[d.getDay()] = true;
            });
            var keys = Object.keys(days);
            if (!keys.length) return null;
            return keys.map(function(k) { return parseInt(k, 10); });
        }
        /** Пересчёт N для «N шагов» и dataset.seriesTotal по периоду и дням недели (режим edit-series). */
        function recalcEditSeriesSeriesTotal() {
            var overlay = document.getElementById('modal-add-step');
            if (!overlay || overlay.dataset.stepModalUi !== 'edit-series') return;
            var fromIn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-date-from');
            var toIn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-date-to');
            var scopeAll = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-scope-all');
            var fromUi = fromIn && fromIn.value ? fromIn.value.trim() : '';
            var toUi = toIn && toIn.value ? toIn.value.trim() : '';
            if (!fromUi || !toUi) return;
            var fromStr = uiDateToIso(fromUi);
            var toStr = uiDateToIso(toUi);
            if (!fromStr || !toStr) return;
            var from = isoToDate(fromStr);
            var to = isoToDate(toStr);
            if (!from || !to || from > to) return;
            var checked = [].map.call(overlay.querySelectorAll('.modal-add-step-day-btn.selected'), function(b) { return parseInt(b.dataset.day, 10); });
            var dreamId = parseInt(overlay.dataset.dreamId, 10);
            var stepId = parseInt(overlay.dataset.stepId, 10);
            if (!dreamId || !stepId) return;
            var ref = getSeriesModalRefStep(overlay);
            if (!ref) return;
            var members = getSeriesMembersForEdit(ref);
            var n = members.filter(function(m) {
                var iso = (m.deadline || '').toString().slice(0, 10);
                if (!iso) return false;
                var d = isoToDate(iso);
                if (!d) return false;
                if (d < from || d > to) return false;
                return checked.indexOf(d.getDay()) !== -1;
            }).length;
            if (n < 1) n = 1;
            overlay.dataset.seriesTotal = String(n);
            if (scopeAll) scopeAll.textContent = stepsCountWordRu(n);
        }
        function openAddStepModal(dreamId, opts) {
            opts = opts || {};
            var overlay = document.getElementById('modal-add-step');
            if (!overlay) return;
            overlay.dataset.stepModalUi = 'create';
            overlay.dataset.mode = 'create';
            overlay.dataset.dreamId = String(dreamId);
            delete overlay.dataset.stepId;
            delete overlay.dataset.isSeriesStep;
            delete overlay.dataset.seriesTotal;
            delete overlay.dataset.editScope;
            delete overlay.dataset.seriesMemberCount;
            delete overlay.dataset.seriesBoundsMinIso;
            delete overlay.dataset.seriesBoundsMaxIso;
            delete overlay._seriesStepsForEdit;
            var titleIn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-title-input');
            var dateSingleIn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-date-single');
            var repeatBtn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-repeat');
            var fromIn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-date-from');
            var toIn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-date-to');
            var timeFromIn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-time-from');
            var timeToIn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-time-to');
            var modalTitle = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-title');
            var createBtn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-create');
            var repeatOnlyWrap = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-repeat-only-wrap');
            var editScopeBtns = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-edit-scope-btns');
            var singleDateLbl = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-date-single-label');
            if (singleDateLbl) singleDateLbl.textContent = 'Выполнить до';
            if (titleIn) titleIn.value = '';
            if (repeatBtn) repeatBtn.classList.remove('active');
            if (repeatBtn) repeatBtn.disabled = false;
            if (modalTitle) modalTitle.textContent = 'Добавить шаг';
            if (createBtn) createBtn.textContent = 'Создать';
            if (repeatOnlyWrap) repeatOnlyWrap.classList.remove('hidden');
            if (editScopeBtns) editScopeBtns.classList.add('hidden');
            var today = new Date();
            var todayIso = today.getFullYear() + '-' + String(today.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0') + '-' + String(today.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
            var todayStr = isoToUiDate(todayIso);
            if (dateSingleIn) dateSingleIn.value = todayStr;
            if (fromIn) fromIn.value = todayStr;
            if (toIn) toIn.value = '';
            if (timeFromIn) timeFromIn.value = '';
            if (timeToIn) timeToIn.value = '';
            overlay.querySelectorAll('.modal-add-step-day-btn').forEach(function(btn) { btn.classList.add('selected'); });
            if (!opts.prepareForEdit) {
                syncAddStepModalRepeatState();
                updateAddStepModalCount();
                overlay.classList.remove('hidden');
                if (titleIn) titleIn.focus();
            }
        }
        function openEditStepModal(stepObj) {
            var overlay = document.getElementById('modal-add-step');
            if (!overlay || !stepObj) return;
            openAddStepModal(stepObj.dream_id, { prepareForEdit: true });
            delete overlay._seriesStepsForEdit;
            if (stepObj._seriesSteps && stepObj._seriesSteps.length) overlay._seriesStepsForEdit = stepObj._seriesSteps;
            overlay.dataset.mode = 'edit';
            overlay.dataset.stepId = String(stepObj.id);
            var memberCount = countStepSeriesMembers(stepObj);
            var seriesTotalRaw = parseInt(stepObj.series_total, 10) || 0;
            if (seriesTotalRaw <= 1 && memberCount > 1) seriesTotalRaw = memberCount;
            var isSeriesStep = memberCount > 1;
            overlay.dataset.isSeriesStep = isSeriesStep ? '1' : '0';
            overlay.dataset.seriesTotal = String(seriesTotalRaw || 0);
            overlay.dataset.stepModalUi = isSeriesStep ? 'edit-series' : 'edit-single';
            var modalTitle = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-title');
            var createBtn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-create');
            var titleIn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-title-input');
            var dateSingleIn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-date-single');
            var timeFromIn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-time-from');
            var timeToIn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-time-to');
            var repeatBtn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-repeat');
            var repeatOnlyWrap = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-repeat-only-wrap');
            var editScopeBtns = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-edit-scope-btns');
            var scopeOne = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-scope-one');
            var scopeAll = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-scope-all');
            var singleDateLbl = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-date-single-label');
            if (singleDateLbl) singleDateLbl.textContent = isSeriesStep ? 'Шаг за' : 'Выполнить до';
            var editDateUi = stepObj.deadline ? formatDeadlineDisplay(String(stepObj.deadline).slice(0, 10)) : '';
            if (modalTitle) modalTitle.textContent = editDateUi ? ('Редактировать шаг за ' + editDateUi) : 'Редактировать шаг';
            if (createBtn) createBtn.textContent = 'Сохранить';
            if (titleIn) titleIn.value = stripStepTitleCounterSuffix((stepObj.title || '').trim());
            if (dateSingleIn) dateSingleIn.value = editDateUi;
            if (timeFromIn) timeFromIn.value = formatTimeHM(stepObj.start_time || '');
            if (timeToIn) timeToIn.value = formatTimeHM(stepObj.end_time || '');
            if (repeatBtn) { repeatBtn.classList.remove('active'); repeatBtn.disabled = !!isSeriesStep; }
            var fromIn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-date-from');
            var toIn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-date-to');
            if (isSeriesStep) {
                if (repeatOnlyWrap) repeatOnlyWrap.classList.add('hidden');
                if (editScopeBtns) editScopeBtns.classList.remove('hidden');
                var bounds = getSeriesDateBounds(stepObj);
                var endUi = bounds.max ? isoToUiDate(bounds.max) : (dateSingleIn && dateSingleIn.value ? dateSingleIn.value.trim() : '');
                var startUi = (bounds.min ? isoToUiDate(bounds.min) : '') || (dateSingleIn && dateSingleIn.value ? dateSingleIn.value.trim() : '') || endUi;
                if (fromIn) fromIn.value = startUi || '';
                if (toIn) toIn.value = endUi || '';
                var inferred = inferSeriesWeekdaySelection(stepObj);
                overlay.querySelectorAll('.modal-add-step-day-btn').forEach(function(btn) {
                    var day = parseInt(btn.dataset.day, 10);
                    if (inferred && inferred.length) btn.classList.toggle('selected', inferred.indexOf(day) !== -1);
                    else btn.classList.add('selected');
                });
                var modalRef = Object.assign({}, stepObj, overlay._seriesStepsForEdit && overlay._seriesStepsForEdit.length ? { _seriesSteps: overlay._seriesStepsForEdit } : {});
                var editableTotal = getSeriesMembersForEdit(modalRef).length;
                var totalLbl = Math.max(1, editableTotal || seriesTotalRaw || 0);
                if (scopeOne) { scopeOne.textContent = stepsCountWordRu(1); scopeOne.classList.add('active'); }
                if (scopeAll) { scopeAll.textContent = stepsCountWordRu(totalLbl); scopeAll.classList.remove('active'); }
                overlay.dataset.editScope = 'single';
                overlay.dataset.seriesMemberCount = String(totalLbl);
                if (bounds.min && bounds.max) {
                    overlay.dataset.seriesBoundsMinIso = bounds.min;
                    overlay.dataset.seriesBoundsMaxIso = bounds.max;
                } else {
                    var fi = fromIn && fromIn.value ? uiDateToIso(fromIn.value.trim()) : '';
                    var ti = toIn && toIn.value ? uiDateToIso(toIn.value.trim()) : '';
                    if (fi == null) fi = '';
                    if (ti == null) ti = '';
                    if (fi && ti) {
                        overlay.dataset.seriesBoundsMinIso = fi;
                        overlay.dataset.seriesBoundsMaxIso = ti;
                    } else if (fi) {
                        overlay.dataset.seriesBoundsMinIso = fi;
                        overlay.dataset.seriesBoundsMaxIso = fi;
                    } else if (ti) {
                        overlay.dataset.seriesBoundsMinIso = ti;
                        overlay.dataset.seriesBoundsMaxIso = ti;
                    } else {
                        delete overlay.dataset.seriesBoundsMinIso;
                        delete overlay.dataset.seriesBoundsMaxIso;
                    }
                }
            } else {
                if (repeatOnlyWrap) repeatOnlyWrap.classList.add('hidden');
                if (editScopeBtns) editScopeBtns.classList.add('hidden');
                if (fromIn) fromIn.value = '';
                if (toIn) toIn.value = '';
            }
            syncAddStepModalRepeatState();
            updateAddStepModalCount();
            overlay.classList.remove('hidden');
            if (titleIn) titleIn.focus();
        }
        function openAddStepFinanceModal(dreamId, dream) {
            var overlay = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-finance');
            if (!overlay) return;
            overlay.dataset.dreamId = String(dreamId);
            var amountIn = document.getElementById('modal-fin-target-amount');
            var endIn = document.getElementById('modal-fin-end-date');
            var dueIn = document.getElementById('modal-fin-due-day');
            if (amountIn) amountIn.value = (dream && dream.price != null && dream.price > 0) ? String(Math.round(dream.price)) : '';
            if (endIn) {
                var eoy = new Date();
                if (eoy.getMonth() >= 10) eoy.setFullYear(eoy.getFullYear() + 1);
                eoy.setMonth(11); eoy.setDate(31);
                var eoyIso = eoy.getFullYear() + '-12-31';
                endIn.value = isoToUiDate(eoyIso);
            }
            if (dueIn) dueIn.value = '31';
            updateFinanceEqualHint();
            overlay.classList.remove('hidden');
            if (amountIn) amountIn.focus();
        }
        function closeAddStepFinanceModal() {
            islandCalClose();
            var overlay = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-finance');
            if (overlay) overlay.classList.add('hidden');
        }
        function updateFinanceEqualHint() {
            var amountIn = document.getElementById('modal-fin-target-amount');
            var hintEl = document.getElementById('modal-fin-equal-hint');
            if (!hintEl) return;
            var v = amountIn && amountIn.value ? parseFloat(amountIn.value) : NaN;
            if (isNaN(v) || v <= 0) { hintEl.textContent = ''; return; }
            var perMonth = Math.round(v / 12 / 1000) * 1000;
            hintEl.textContent = 'При равных долях: ≈ ' + (perMonth >= 1000 ? (perMonth / 1000) + ' т.р.' : perMonth + ' ₽') + ' в месяц';
        }
        function closeAddStepModal() {
            islandCalClose();
            var overlay = document.getElementById('modal-add-step');
            if (overlay) {
                overlay.classList.add('hidden');
                delete overlay._seriesStepsForEdit;
            }
            var bulkOv = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-bulk-end-confirm');
            if (bulkOv) bulkOv.classList.add('hidden');
            bulkEndConfirmState = null;
        }
        function openFinishAllSeriesConfirm() {
            var overlay = document.getElementById('modal-add-step');
            if (!overlay || overlay.classList.contains('hidden') || overlay.dataset.stepModalUi !== 'edit-series') return;
            var dreamId = parseInt(overlay.dataset.dreamId, 10);
            var stepId = parseInt(overlay.dataset.stepId, 10);
            if (!dreamId || !stepId) return;
            var ref = getSeriesModalRefStep(overlay);
            if (!ref) {
                alert('Не удалось найти шаг в кэше. Обнови страницу и открой редактирование снова.');
                return;
            }
            var members = getSeriesMembersForEdit(ref).filter(function(s) { return s && !s.deleted; });
            var cutoff = (ref.deadline || '').toString().slice(0, 10);
            if (!cutoff) {
                alert('У открытого шага нет даты — операция недоступна.');
                return;
            }
            var targets = members.filter(function(m) {
                var d = (m.deadline || '').toString().slice(0, 10);
                return d && d >= cutoff;
            });
            if (targets.length === 0) {
                alert('Нет шагов для удаления с этой даты.');
                return;
            }
            bulkEndConfirmState = { dreamId: dreamId, targets: targets };
            var txt = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-bulk-end-text');
            if (txt) {
                txt.textContent = 'Удалить ' + stepsCountWordRu(targets.length) + ' с ' + formatDeadlineDisplay(cutoff) + ' включительно?';
            }
            var bulkOv = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-bulk-end-confirm');
            if (bulkOv) bulkOv.classList.remove('hidden');
        }
        function closeFinishAllSeriesConfirm() {
            var bulkOv = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-bulk-end-confirm');
            if (bulkOv) bulkOv.classList.add('hidden');
            bulkEndConfirmState = null;
        }
        function executeFinishAllSeriesDeletes() {
            if (!bulkEndConfirmState || !bulkEndConfirmState.targets || !bulkEndConfirmState.targets.length) {
                closeFinishAllSeriesConfirm();
                return;
            }
            var dreamId = bulkEndConfirmState.dreamId;
            var targets = bulkEndConfirmState.targets.slice();
            bulkEndConfirmState = null;
            var bulkOv = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-bulk-end-confirm');
            if (bulkOv) bulkOv.classList.add('hidden');
            var yesBtn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-bulk-end-yes');
            if (yesBtn) yesBtn.disabled = true;
            Promise.all(targets.map(function(m) {
                return patchStep(dreamId, m.id, { deleted: true });
            })).then(function() {
                targets.forEach(function(m) {
                    var s = stepsFlatCache.find(function(x) { return x && x.id === m.id && x.dream_id === dreamId; });
                    if (s) s.deleted = true;
                    var d = (currentUserDreamsCache || []).find(function(x) { return Number(x.id) === dreamId; });
                    if (d && d.steps) {
                        var st = d.steps.find(function(x) { return x.id === m.id; });
                        if (st) st.deleted = true;
                    }
                    d = (buddyDreamsCache || []).find(function(x) { return Number(x.id) === dreamId; });
                    if (d && d.steps) {
                        var st2 = d.steps.find(function(x) { return x.id === m.id; });
                        if (st2) st2.deleted = true;
                    }
                });
                closeAddStepModal();
                dreamIdToRestoreAfterRefresh = dreamId;
                refreshAfterDreamChange();
            }).catch(function(err) {
                alert(err && err.message ? err.message : 'Ошибка при удалении шагов');
            }).finally(function() {
                if (yesBtn) yesBtn.disabled = false;
            });
        }
        function syncAddStepModalRepeatState() {
            var overlay = document.getElementById('modal-add-step');
            var repeatBtn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-repeat');
            var singleBlock = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-single-block');
            var block = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-repeat-block');
            var dateSingleIn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-date-single');
            var fromIn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-date-from');
            var datesScopeWrap = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-dates-scope-wrap');
            var midColumn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-mid-column');
            var fromWrap = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-date-from-wrap');
            var toWrap = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-date-to-wrap');
            var timeFromWrap = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-time-from-wrap');
            var timeToWrap = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-time-to-wrap');
            var timeFromSlot = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-time-from-slot');
            var timeToSlot = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-time-to-slot');
            var timeFromGroup = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-time-from-group');
            var timeToGroup = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-time-to-group');
            var timeInner = document.querySelector('#modal-add-step-inline-times .modal-add-step-time-bordered-inner');
            var inlineTimes = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-inline-times');
            var editScopeBtns = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-edit-scope-btns');
            if (!repeatBtn || !block || !midColumn || !inlineTimes) return;
            var isEditSeries = overlay && overlay.dataset.stepModalUi === 'edit-series';
            var isRepeat = repeatBtn.classList.contains('active');
            var showPeriod = isRepeat || isEditSeries;
            function forceDisplay(el, visible, displayMode) {
                if (!el) return;
                el.style.display = visible ? (displayMode || 'block') : 'none';
            }
            if (singleBlock) {
                singleBlock.classList.toggle('disabled', isRepeat && !isEditSeries);
                singleBlock.classList.toggle('hidden', isEditSeries);
            }
            if (dateSingleIn) dateSingleIn.disabled = (isRepeat && !isEditSeries) || isEditSeries;
            block.classList.toggle('disabled', !showPeriod);
            if (datesScopeWrap) datesScopeWrap.classList.toggle('hidden', !showPeriod);
            if (fromWrap) fromWrap.classList.toggle('hidden', !showPeriod);
            if (toWrap) toWrap.classList.toggle('hidden', !showPeriod);
            if (isEditSeries) {
                // После «Добавить шаг» с «Повторять» inlineTimes оказывается в datesScopeWrap.
                // В edit-series поля времени переносятся в timeFromSlot/timeToSlot строки row-exec;
                // если inlineTimes оставить в видимом datesScopeWrap — дубли и наслоение (аккордеон мечты).
                if (inlineTimes && midColumn && inlineTimes.parentElement !== midColumn) {
                    midColumn.appendChild(inlineTimes);
                }
                if (timeFromWrap) timeFromWrap.classList.remove('hidden');
                if (timeToWrap) timeToWrap.classList.remove('hidden');
                if (timeFromSlot && timeFromGroup && timeFromGroup.parentElement !== timeFromSlot) timeFromSlot.appendChild(timeFromGroup);
                if (timeToSlot && timeToGroup && timeToGroup.parentElement !== timeToSlot) timeToSlot.appendChild(timeToGroup);
                if (midColumn) midColumn.classList.add('hidden');
                // Жёсткая синхронизация для всех контуров (ЛК/бадди):
                // в edit-series всегда только 4 блока в верхней строке.
                forceDisplay(singleBlock, false);
                forceDisplay(midColumn, false);
                forceDisplay(fromWrap, true, 'flex');
                forceDisplay(toWrap, true, 'flex');
                forceDisplay(timeFromWrap, true, 'flex');
                forceDisplay(timeToWrap, true, 'flex');
            } else {
                if (timeFromWrap) timeFromWrap.classList.add('hidden');
                if (timeToWrap) timeToWrap.classList.add('hidden');
                if (timeInner && timeFromGroup && timeFromGroup.parentElement !== timeInner) timeInner.appendChild(timeFromGroup);
                if (timeInner && timeToGroup && timeToGroup.parentElement !== timeInner) timeInner.appendChild(timeToGroup);
                forceDisplay(singleBlock, true, 'flex');
                forceDisplay(timeFromWrap, false);
                forceDisplay(timeToWrap, false);
            }
            if (showPeriod && !isEditSeries) {
                if (datesScopeWrap && editScopeBtns && inlineTimes.parentElement !== datesScopeWrap) {
                    datesScopeWrap.insertBefore(inlineTimes, editScopeBtns);
                }
                if (midColumn) midColumn.classList.add('hidden');
                forceDisplay(midColumn, false);
                forceDisplay(fromWrap, true, 'flex');
                forceDisplay(toWrap, true, 'flex');
            } else if (!isEditSeries) {
                if (inlineTimes.parentElement !== midColumn) midColumn.appendChild(inlineTimes);
                if (midColumn) midColumn.classList.remove('hidden');
                forceDisplay(midColumn, true, 'flex');
                forceDisplay(fromWrap, false);
                forceDisplay(toWrap, false);
            }
            if (isRepeat && fromIn && dateSingleIn && dateSingleIn.value) fromIn.value = dateSingleIn.value;
            syncAddStepModalDaysState();
        }
        function syncAddStepModalDaysState() {
            var overlay = document.getElementById('modal-add-step');
            var repeatBtn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-repeat');
            var toIn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-date-to');
            var wrap = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-days-wrap');
            var labelEl = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-days-label');
            if (!overlay || !wrap || !labelEl) return;
            var isEditSeries = overlay.dataset.stepModalUi === 'edit-series';
            var seriesAllScope = isEditSeries && getEditModalScope() === 'all_series';
            var canPickDays = (repeatBtn && repeatBtn.classList.contains('active')) || seriesAllScope;
            if (!canPickDays) {
                wrap.classList.add('disabled');
                overlay.querySelectorAll('.modal-add-step-day-btn').forEach(function(btn) { btn.disabled = true; });
                if (isEditSeries && getEditModalScope() === 'single') {
                    labelEl.textContent = 'Дни недели недоступны при правке одного шага серии';
                }
                return;
            }
            var hasEndDate = toIn && (toIn.value || '').trim() !== '';
            wrap.classList.toggle('disabled', !hasEndDate);
            overlay.querySelectorAll('.modal-add-step-day-btn').forEach(function(btn) {
                btn.disabled = !hasEndDate;
            });
            labelEl.textContent = hasEndDate ? 'Дни недели (все активны — нажмите, чтобы исключить день)' : 'Укажите дату окончания, чтобы выбрать дни недели';
        }
        function updateAddStepModalCount() {
            var overlay = document.getElementById('modal-add-step');
            var repeatBtn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-repeat');
            var dateSingleIn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-date-single');
            var fromIn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-date-from');
            var toIn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-date-to');
            var timeFromIn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-time-from');
            var timeToIn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-time-to');
            var countEl = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-count');
            if (!overlay || !countEl) return;
            var mode = overlay.dataset.mode || 'create';
            if (mode === 'edit' && overlay.dataset.isSeriesStep === '1') {
                syncAddStepModalDaysState();
                recalcEditSeriesSeriesTotal();
                var total = parseInt(overlay.dataset.seriesTotal, 10);
                if (!isFinite(total) || total < 1) {
                    total = parseInt(overlay.dataset.seriesMemberCount, 10) || 1;
                }
                var scope = getEditModalScope();
                var n = scope === 'all_series' ? total : 1;
                countEl.textContent = editStepPreviewLineRu(n);
                return;
            }
            syncAddStepModalDaysState();
            if (mode === 'edit') {
                var dsEdit = dateSingleIn && dateSingleIn.value ? dateSingleIn.value.trim() : '';
                countEl.textContent = dsEdit ? editStepPreviewLineRu(1) : '';
                return;
            }
            if (!repeatBtn || !repeatBtn.classList.contains('active')) {
                var ds = dateSingleIn && dateSingleIn.value ? dateSingleIn.value.trim() : '';
                countEl.textContent = ds ? 'Будет создан 1 шаг' : '';
                return;
            }
            var fromUi = fromIn && fromIn.value ? fromIn.value.trim() : '';
            var toUi = toIn && toIn.value ? toIn.value.trim() : '';
            var checked = [].map.call(overlay.querySelectorAll('.modal-add-step-day-btn.selected'), function(b) { return parseInt(b.dataset.day, 10); });
            if (!fromUi || !toUi) { countEl.textContent = ''; return; }
            var fromStr = uiDateToIso(fromUi);
            var toStr = uiDateToIso(toUi);
            if (!fromStr || !toStr) { countEl.textContent = 'Формат дат: дд.мм.гг'; return; }
            var from = isoToDate(fromStr);
            var to = isoToDate(toStr);
            if (!from || !to) { countEl.textContent = 'Формат дат: дд.мм.гг'; return; }
            if (from > to) { countEl.textContent = 'Укажите период: дата начала ≤ дата окончания'; return; }
            var n = 0;
            var d = new Date(from);
            while (d <= to) {
                if (checked.indexOf(d.getDay()) !== -1) n++;
                d.setDate(d.getDate() + 1);
            }
            countEl.textContent = 'Будет создано шагов: ' + n;
        }
        function initAddStepModal() {
            var overlay = document.getElementById('modal-add-step');
            if (!overlay) return;
            var repeatBtn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-repeat');
            var dateSingleIn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-date-single');
            var fromIn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-date-from');
            var toIn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-date-to');
            var timeFromIn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-time-from');
            var timeToIn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-time-to');
            var cancelBtn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-cancel');
            var createBtn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-create');
            function update() { updateAddStepModalCount(); }
            if (repeatBtn) repeatBtn.addEventListener('click', function() { repeatBtn.classList.toggle('active'); syncAddStepModalRepeatState(); update(); });
            var scopeOneBtn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-scope-one');
            var scopeAllBtn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-scope-all');
            function editScopeClick(isAll) {
                var ov = document.getElementById('modal-add-step');
                if (ov && ov.dataset.stepModalUi === 'edit-series') {
                    ov.dataset.editScope = isAll ? 'all_series' : 'single';
                }
                if (scopeOneBtn) scopeOneBtn.classList.toggle('active', !isAll);
                if (scopeAllBtn) scopeAllBtn.classList.toggle('active', !!isAll);
                if (ov && ov.dataset.stepModalUi === 'edit-series') {
                    fillEditSeriesPeriodFromBounds();
                    syncAddStepModalRepeatState();
                }
                update();
            }
            if (scopeOneBtn) scopeOneBtn.addEventListener('click', function() { editScopeClick(false); });
            if (scopeAllBtn) scopeAllBtn.addEventListener('click', function() { editScopeClick(true); });
            var finishAllBtn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-finish-all-series');
            if (finishAllBtn) finishAllBtn.addEventListener('click', function(ev) { ev.stopPropagation(); openFinishAllSeriesConfirm(); });
            var bulkEndOv = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-bulk-end-confirm');
            var bulkEndNo = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-bulk-end-no');
            var bulkEndYes = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-bulk-end-yes');
            if (bulkEndNo) bulkEndNo.addEventListener('click', function(ev) { ev.stopPropagation(); closeFinishAllSeriesConfirm(); });
            if (bulkEndYes) bulkEndYes.addEventListener('click', function(ev) { ev.stopPropagation(); executeFinishAllSeriesDeletes(); });
            if (bulkEndOv) bulkEndOv.addEventListener('click', function(ev) { if (ev.target === bulkEndOv) closeFinishAllSeriesConfirm(); });
            if (dateSingleIn) { dateSingleIn.addEventListener('input', update); dateSingleIn.addEventListener('change', update); }
            if (fromIn) { fromIn.addEventListener('input', update); fromIn.addEventListener('change', update); }
            if (toIn) { toIn.addEventListener('input', update); toIn.addEventListener('change', update); }
            overlay.querySelectorAll('.modal-add-step-day-btn').forEach(function(btn) {
                btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                    if (btn.disabled) return;
                    btn.classList.toggle('selected');
                    update();
                });
            });
            if (cancelBtn) cancelBtn.addEventListener('click', closeAddStepModal);
            overlay.addEventListener('click', function(ev) { if (ev.target === overlay) closeAddStepModal(); });
            if (createBtn) createBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                var dreamId = overlay.dataset.dreamId;
                if (!dreamId) return;
                var mode = overlay.dataset.mode || 'create';
                var stepId = overlay.dataset.stepId;
                var isSeriesStep = overlay.dataset.isSeriesStep === '1';
                var titleIn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-title-input');
                var title = (titleIn && titleIn.value) ? titleIn.value.trim() : '';
                if (!title) { alert('Введите название шага'); return; }
                if (mode === 'edit') {
                    if (!stepId) return;
                    var dateUiEdit = dateSingleIn && dateSingleIn.value ? dateSingleIn.value.trim() : '';
                    if (!dateUiEdit) { alert('Укажите дату шага'); return; }
                    var dateStrEdit = uiDateToIso(dateUiEdit);
                    if (!dateStrEdit) { alert('Неверный формат даты. Используй дд.мм.гг'); return; }
                    var timeFromRawEdit = timeFromIn && timeFromIn.value ? timeFromIn.value.trim() : '';
                    var timeToRawEdit = timeToIn && timeToIn.value ? timeToIn.value.trim() : '';
                    var timeFromEdit = timeFromRawEdit ? normalizeTime24Input(timeFromRawEdit) : '';
                    var timeToEdit = timeToRawEdit ? normalizeTime24Input(timeToRawEdit) : '';
                    if (timeFromRawEdit && !timeFromEdit) { alert('Неверный формат времени начала. Используй HH:MM (00:00–23:59)'); return; }
                    if (timeToRawEdit && !timeToEdit) { alert('Неверный формат времени окончания. Используй HH:MM (00:00–23:59)'); return; }
                    if (timeFromEdit && timeToEdit && timeFromEdit > timeToEdit) { alert('Время начала должно быть не позже времени окончания'); return; }
                    var isRepeatInEdit = repeatBtn && repeatBtn.classList.contains('active');
                    if (!isSeriesStep && isRepeatInEdit) {
                        var fromUiEdit = fromIn && fromIn.value ? fromIn.value.trim() : '';
                        var toUiEdit = toIn && toIn.value ? toIn.value.trim() : '';
                        if (!fromUiEdit || !toUiEdit) { alert('Укажите дату начала и дату окончания'); return; }
                        var fromIsoEdit = uiDateToIso(fromUiEdit);
                        var toIsoEdit = uiDateToIso(toUiEdit);
                        if (!fromIsoEdit || !toIsoEdit) { alert('Неверный формат дат. Используй дд.мм.гг'); return; }
                        var fromDateEdit = isoToDate(fromIsoEdit);
                        var toDateEdit = isoToDate(toIsoEdit);
                        if (!fromDateEdit || !toDateEdit || fromDateEdit > toDateEdit) { alert('Дата начала должна быть не позже даты окончания'); return; }
                        var checkedEdit = [].map.call(overlay.querySelectorAll('.modal-add-step-day-btn.selected'), function(b) { return parseInt(b.dataset.day, 10); });
                        var allDates = [];
                        var it = new Date(fromDateEdit);
                        while (it <= toDateEdit) {
                            if (checkedEdit.indexOf(it.getDay()) !== -1) allDates.push(it.getFullYear() + '-' + String(it.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0') + '-' + String(it.getDate()).padStart(2, '0'));
                            it.setDate(it.getDate() + 1);
                        }
                        if (allDates.length === 0) { alert('Выберите хотя бы один день недели и проверьте период.'); return; }
                        var currentIso = dateStrEdit;
                        var extraDates = allDates.filter(function(d) { return d !== currentIso; });
                        var seriesId = (window.crypto && typeof window.crypto.randomUUID === 'function') ? window.crypto.randomUUID() : ('series-' + Date.now() + '-' + Math.floor(Math.random() * 100000));
                        var totalSeries = 1 + extraDates.length;
                        createBtn.disabled = true;
                        createBtn.textContent = 'Сохраняем… 0 / ' + totalSeries;
                        patchStep(dreamId, stepId, {
                            title: title,
                            deadline: currentIso,
                            start_time: timeFromEdit || null,
                            end_time: timeToEdit || null,
                            series_id: seriesId,
                            series_index: 1,
                            series_total: totalSeries
                        }).then(function() {
                            var done = 1;
                            createBtn.textContent = 'Сохраняем… ' + done + ' / ' + totalSeries;
                            var promises = extraDates.map(function(dateIso, idx) {
                                return addStepPromise(dreamId, title, dateIso, timeFromEdit, timeToEdit, seriesId, idx + 2, totalSeries).then(function() {
                                    done++;
                                    createBtn.textContent = 'Сохраняем… ' + done + ' / ' + totalSeries;
                                });
                            });
                            return Promise.all(promises);
                        }).then(function() {
                            closeAddStepModal();
                            createBtn.disabled = false;
                            createBtn.textContent = 'Сохранить';
                            dreamIdToRestoreAfterRefresh = parseInt(dreamId, 10) || dreamId;
                            refreshAfterDreamChange();
                        }).catch(function(err) {
                            createBtn.disabled = false;
                            createBtn.textContent = 'Сохранить';
                            alert(err && err.message ? err.message : 'Ошибка при сохранении шага');
                        });
                        return;
                    }
                    createBtn.disabled = true;
                    var scopeVal = isSeriesStep ? getEditModalScope() : 'single';
                    if (isSeriesStep && scopeVal === 'all_series') {
                        var periodDates = buildModalPeriodIsoDateList(overlay);
                        if (!periodDates || !periodDates.length) {
                            createBtn.disabled = false;
                            alert('Укажи период: дату начала, дату окончания и хотя бы один день недели.');
                            return;
                        }
                        var refStep = getSeriesModalRefStep(overlay);
                        if (!refStep) {
                            createBtn.disabled = false;
                            alert('Не удалось найти шаг в кэше. Обнови страницу и открой редактирование снова.');
                            return;
                        }
                        var members = getSeriesMembersForEdit(refStep).slice().sort(function(a, b) {
                            var da = (a.deadline || '').toString().slice(0, 10);
                            var db = (b.deadline || '').toString().slice(0, 10);
                            if (da !== db) return da.localeCompare(db);
                            return (Number(a.id) || 0) - (Number(b.id) || 0);
                        });
                        if (periodDates.length !== members.length) {
                            createBtn.disabled = false;
                            alert('В серии ' + members.length + ' шагов, а в выбранном периоде ' + periodDates.length + ' дат. Подбери дату начала, окончания и дни недели так, чтобы число совпало со счётчиком внизу модалки.');
                            return;
                        }
                        var totalM = members.length;
                        var doneM = 0;
                        createBtn.textContent = 'Сохраняем… 0 / ' + totalM;
                        Promise.all(members.map(function(m, i) {
                            var oneBody = {
                                title: title,
                                deadline: periodDates[i],
                                scope: 'single',
                                series_index: i + 1,
                                series_total: totalM
                            };
                            if (timeFromRawEdit) oneBody.start_time = timeFromEdit;
                            if (timeToRawEdit) oneBody.end_time = timeToEdit;
                            return patchStep(dreamId, m.id, oneBody).then(function() {
                                doneM++;
                                createBtn.textContent = 'Сохраняем… ' + doneM + ' / ' + totalM;
                            });
                        })).then(function() {
                            closeAddStepModal();
                            createBtn.disabled = false;
                            createBtn.textContent = 'Сохранить';
                            dreamIdToRestoreAfterRefresh = parseInt(dreamId, 10) || dreamId;
                            refreshAfterDreamChange();
                        }).catch(function(err) {
                            createBtn.disabled = false;
                            createBtn.textContent = 'Сохранить';
                            alert(err && err.message ? err.message : 'Ошибка при сохранении серии');
                        });
                        return;
                    }
                    createBtn.textContent = 'Сохраняем…';
                    var patchBody = { title: title, scope: scopeVal };
                    if (timeFromRawEdit) patchBody.start_time = timeFromEdit;
                    if (timeToRawEdit) patchBody.end_time = timeToEdit;
                    if (scopeVal === 'single') patchBody.deadline = dateStrEdit;
                    patchStep(dreamId, stepId, patchBody).then(function() {
                        closeAddStepModal();
                        createBtn.disabled = false;
                        createBtn.textContent = 'Сохранить';
                        dreamIdToRestoreAfterRefresh = parseInt(dreamId, 10) || dreamId;
                        refreshAfterDreamChange();
                    }).catch(function(err) {
                        createBtn.disabled = false;
                        createBtn.textContent = 'Сохранить';
                        alert(err && err.message ? err.message : 'Ошибка при сохранении шага');
                    });
                    return;
                }
                var isRepeat = repeatBtn && repeatBtn.classList.contains('active');
                if (!isRepeat) {
                    var dateUi = dateSingleIn && dateSingleIn.value ? dateSingleIn.value.trim() : '';
                    if (!dateUi) { alert('Укажите дату шага'); return; }
                    var dateStr = uiDateToIso(dateUi);
                    if (!dateStr) { alert('Неверный формат даты. Используй дд.мм.гг'); return; }
                    var timeFromRaw = timeFromIn && timeFromIn.value ? timeFromIn.value.trim() : '';
                    var timeToRaw = timeToIn && timeToIn.value ? timeToIn.value.trim() : '';
                    var timeFromStr = timeFromRaw ? normalizeTime24Input(timeFromRaw) : '';
                    var timeToStr = timeToRaw ? normalizeTime24Input(timeToRaw) : '';
                    if (timeFromRaw && !timeFromStr) { alert('Неверный формат времени начала. Используй HH:MM (00:00–23:59)'); return; }
                    if (timeToRaw && !timeToStr) { alert('Неверный формат времени окончания. Используй HH:MM (00:00–23:59)'); return; }
                    if (timeFromStr && timeToStr && timeFromStr > timeToStr) { alert('Время начала должно быть не позже времени окончания'); return; }
                    createBtn.disabled = true;
                    createBtn.textContent = 'Создаём…';
                    addStepPromise(dreamId, title, dateStr, timeFromStr, timeToStr).then(function() {
                        closeAddStepModal();
                        createBtn.disabled = false;
                        createBtn.textContent = 'Создать';
                        dreamIdToRestoreAfterRefresh = parseInt(dreamId, 10) || dreamId;
                        refreshAfterDreamChange();
                    }).catch(function(err) {
                        createBtn.disabled = false;
                        createBtn.textContent = 'Создать';
                        alert(err && err.message ? err.message : 'Ошибка при создании шага');
                    });
                    return;
                }
                var fromUi = fromIn && fromIn.value ? fromIn.value.trim() : '';
                var toUi = toIn && toIn.value ? toIn.value.trim() : '';
                if (!fromUi || !toUi) { alert('Укажите дату начала и дату окончания'); return; }
                var fromStr = uiDateToIso(fromUi);
                var toStr = uiDateToIso(toUi);
                if (!fromStr || !toStr) { alert('Неверный формат дат. Используй дд.мм.гг'); return; }
                var from = isoToDate(fromStr);
                var to = isoToDate(toStr);
                if (!from || !to) { alert('Неверный формат дат. Используй дд.мм.гг'); return; }
                if (from > to) { alert('Дата начала должна быть не позже даты окончания'); return; }
                var checked = [].map.call(overlay.querySelectorAll('.modal-add-step-day-btn.selected'), function(b) { return parseInt(b.dataset.day, 10); });
                var dates = [];
                var d = new Date(from);
                while (d <= to) {
                    if (checked.indexOf(d.getDay()) !== -1) dates.push(d.getFullYear() + '-' + String(d.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0') + '-' + String(d.getDate()).padStart(2, '0'));
                    d.setDate(d.getDate() + 1);
                }
                if (dates.length === 0) { alert('Выберите хотя бы один день недели и проверьте период.'); return; }
                var repTimeFromRaw = timeFromIn && timeFromIn.value ? timeFromIn.value.trim() : '';
                var repTimeToRaw = timeToIn && timeToIn.value ? timeToIn.value.trim() : '';
                var repTimeFrom = repTimeFromRaw ? normalizeTime24Input(repTimeFromRaw) : '';
                var repTimeTo = repTimeToRaw ? normalizeTime24Input(repTimeToRaw) : '';
                if (repTimeFromRaw && !repTimeFrom) { alert('Неверный формат времени начала. Используй HH:MM (00:00–23:59)'); return; }
                if (repTimeToRaw && !repTimeTo) { alert('Неверный формат времени окончания. Используй HH:MM (00:00–23:59)'); return; }
                if (repTimeFrom && repTimeTo && repTimeFrom > repTimeTo) { alert('Время начала должно быть не позже времени окончания'); return; }
                var total = dates.length;
                var seriesIdCreate = (window.crypto && typeof window.crypto.randomUUID === 'function') ? window.crypto.randomUUID() : ('series-' + Date.now() + '-' + Math.floor(Math.random() * 100000));
                createBtn.disabled = true;
                createBtn.dataset.restoreText = 'Создать';
                createBtn.textContent = 'Создаём… 0 / ' + total;
                var done = 0;
                function onOneDone() { done++; createBtn.textContent = 'Создаём… ' + done + ' / ' + total; }
                var promises = dates.map(function(dateStr, idx) {
                    return addStepPromise(dreamId, title, dateStr, repTimeFrom, repTimeTo, seriesIdCreate, idx + 1, total).then(function(data) { onOneDone(); return data; });
                });
                Promise.all(promises).then(function() {
                    closeAddStepModal();
                    createBtn.disabled = false;
                    createBtn.textContent = 'Создать';
                    dreamIdToRestoreAfterRefresh = parseInt(dreamId, 10) || dreamId;
                    refreshAfterDreamChange();
                }).catch(function(err) {
                    createBtn.disabled = false;
                    createBtn.textContent = createBtn.dataset.restoreText || 'Создать';
                    alert(err && err.message ? err.message : 'Ошибка при создании шагов');
                });
            });
        }
        function addStepPromise(dreamId, title, deadline, startTime, endTime, seriesId, seriesIndex, seriesTotal) {
            var body = { title: title };
            if (deadline) body.deadline = deadline;
            if (startTime) body.start_time = startTime;
            if (endTime) body.end_time = endTime;
            if (seriesId) body.series_id = seriesId;
            if (seriesIndex) body.series_index = seriesIndex;
            if (seriesTotal) body.series_total = seriesTotal;
            return fetch(API_BASE_URL + '/dreams/' + dreamId + '/steps?' + dreamApiUserParams(), { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(body) })
                .then(function(res) { if (!res.ok) return res.json().then(function(e) { throw new Error(e.detail || 'Ошибка'); }); return res.json(); })
                .catch(function(e) { if (e instanceof Error) throw e; throw new Error('Ошибка сети'); });
        }
        var FIN_MONTH_NAMES = ['Январь', 'Февраль', 'Март', 'Апрель', 'Май', 'Июнь', 'Июль', 'Август', 'Сентябрь', 'Октябрь', 'Ноябрь', 'Декабрь'];
        function initAddStepFinanceModal() {
            var overlay = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-finance');
            if (!overlay) return;
            var amountIn = document.getElementById('modal-fin-target-amount');
            var endIn = document.getElementById('modal-fin-end-date');
            var dueIn = document.getElementById('modal-fin-due-day');
            var cancelBtn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-finance-cancel');
            var createBtn = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-finance-create');
            var monthlyContainer = document.getElementById('modal-fin-monthly-amounts');
            if (monthlyContainer) {
                monthlyContainer.innerHTML = '';
                FIN_MONTH_NAMES.forEach(function(name, idx) {
                    var row = document.createElement('div');
                    row.style.display = 'flex';
                    row.style.alignItems = 'center';
                    row.style.gap = '10px';
                    row.style.marginBottom = '6px';
                    var label = document.createElement('label');
                    label.textContent = name;
                    label.style.margin = '0';
                    label.style.minWidth = '85px';
                    label.style.fontSize = '13px';
                    var input = document.createElement('input');
                    input.type = 'number';
                    input.min = '0';
                    input.step = '1000';
                    input.placeholder = '0';
                    input.className = 'modal-fin-month-inp';
                    input.dataset.month = String(idx);
                    input.style.maxWidth = '140px';
                    input.style.padding = '6px 8px';
                    row.appendChild(label);
                    row.appendChild(input);
                    monthlyContainer.appendChild(row);
                });
            }
            overlay.querySelectorAll('.modal-deadline-hints a[data-fin-end]').forEach(function(a) {
                a.addEventListener('click', function(ev) {
                    ev.preventDefault();
                    if (!endIn) return;
                    if (this.dataset.finEnd === '12months') {
                        var d = new Date();
                        d.setMonth(d.getMonth() + 12);
                        var iso12 = d.getFullYear() + '-' + String(d.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0') + '-' + String(d.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
                        endIn.value = isoToUiDate(iso12);
                    } else if (this.dataset.finEnd === 'eoy') {
                        var y = new Date().getFullYear();
                        if (new Date().getMonth() >= 10) y++;
                        endIn.value = isoToUiDate(y + '-12-31');
                    }
                });
            });
            if (amountIn) amountIn.addEventListener('input', updateFinanceEqualHint);
            if (amountIn) amountIn.addEventListener('change', updateFinanceEqualHint);
            var dueDayLastLink = document.getElementById('modal-fin-due-day-last');
            if (dueDayLastLink && dueIn) dueDayLastLink.addEventListener('click', function(ev) { ev.preventDefault(); dueIn.value = '31'; });
            var customBlock = document.getElementById('modal-fin-custom-block');
            var equalHintEl = document.getElementById('modal-fin-equal-hint');
            overlay.querySelectorAll('input[name="modal-fin-distribution"]').forEach(function(radio) {
                radio.addEventListener('change', function() {
                    var isCustom = this.value === 'custom';
                    if (customBlock) customBlock.classList.toggle('hidden', !isCustom);
                    if (equalHintEl) equalHintEl.style.display = isCustom ? 'none' : '';
                });
            });
            if (cancelBtn) cancelBtn.addEventListener('click', closeAddStepFinanceModal);
            overlay.addEventListener('click', function(ev) { if (ev.target === overlay) closeAddStepFinanceModal(); });
            if (createBtn) createBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                var dreamId = overlay.dataset.dreamId;
                if (!dreamId) return;
                var targetAmount = amountIn && amountIn.value ? parseFloat(amountIn.value) : NaN;
                if (isNaN(targetAmount) || targetAmount <= 0) { alert('Введите нужную сумму'); return; }
                var endDateUi = endIn && endIn.value ? endIn.value.trim() : '';
                if (!endDateUi) { alert('Укажите дату окончания срока'); return; }
                var endDate = uiDateToIso(endDateUi);
                if (!endDate) { alert('Неверный формат даты окончания. Используй дд.мм.гг'); return; }
                var dueDay = dueIn && dueIn.value ? parseInt(dueIn.value, 10) : 31;
                if (isNaN(dueDay) || dueDay < 1) dueDay = 1;
                if (dueDay > 31) dueDay = 31;
                var distRadio = overlay.querySelector('input[name="modal-fin-distribution"]:checked');
                var distribution = (distRadio && distRadio.value) || 'equal';
                var body = { target_amount: targetAmount, end_date: endDate, due_day: dueDay, distribution: distribution };
                if (distribution === 'custom') {
                    var inputs = overlay.querySelectorAll('.modal-fin-month-inp');
                    var amounts = [];
                    for (var i = 0; i < 12; i++) {
                        var inp = overlay.querySelector('.modal-fin-month-inp[data-month="' + i + '"]');
                        var v = (inp && inp.value && inp.value.trim()) ? parseFloat(inp.value) : 0;
                        amounts.push(isNaN(v) || v < 0 ? 0 : v);
                    }
                    var sum = amounts.reduce(function(a, b) { return a + b; }, 0);
                    if (sum <= 0) { alert('Введите хотя бы одну сумму по месяцам'); return; }
                    body.monthly_amounts = amounts;
                }
                createBtn.disabled = true;
                createBtn.textContent = 'Создаём…';
                fetch(API_BASE_URL + '/dreams/' + dreamId + '/steps/finance?' + dreamApiUserParams(), {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                    body: JSON.stringify(body)
                })
                .then(function(res) {
                    if (!res.ok) return res.json().then(function(e) { throw new Error(e.detail || 'Ошибка'); });
                    return res.json();
                })
                .then(function() {
                    closeAddStepFinanceModal();
                    dreamIdToRestoreAfterRefresh = parseInt(dreamId, 10) || dreamId;
                    refreshAfterDreamChange();
                })
                .catch(function(e) {
                    alert(e && e.message ? e.message : 'Ошибка при создании шагов');
                })
                .finally(function() {
                    createBtn.disabled = false;
                    createBtn.textContent = 'Создать шаги';
                });
            });
        }
        async function addStep(dreamId, title, deadline, onDone, optBtn) {
            try {
                var body = { title: title };
                if (deadline) body.deadline = deadline;
                var res = await fetch(API_BASE_URL + '/dreams/' + dreamId + '/steps?' + dreamApiUserParams(), { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(body) });
                if (!res.ok) { var e = await res.json(); alert(e.detail || 'Ошибка'); if (optBtn) { optBtn.disabled = false; if (optBtn.dataset.restoreText) optBtn.textContent = optBtn.dataset.restoreText; } return; }
                var data = await res.json();
                onDone(data);
            } catch (e) { alert('Ошибка сети'); if (optBtn) { optBtn.disabled = false; if (optBtn.dataset.restoreText) optBtn.textContent = optBtn.dataset.restoreText; } }
        }
        async function saveStepCompleted(dreamId, stepId, completed) {
            try {
                var res = await fetch(API_BASE_URL + '/dreams/' + dreamId + '/steps/' + stepId + '?' + dreamApiUserParams(), { method: 'PATCH', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ completed: completed }) });
                var data = await res.json().catch(function() { return {}; });
                if (!res.ok) throw new Error((data && data.detail) || 'Ошибка');
                var row = stepsFlatCache.find(function(x) { return x.dream_id === dreamId && x.id === stepId; });
                if (row && data.step) {
                    row.completed = !!data.step.completed;
                    row.completed_late = !!data.step.completed_late;
                    row.waived = !!data.step.waived;
                }
            } catch (e) {
                alert((e && e.message) || 'Ошибка сети');
                throw e;
            }
        }
        async function patchStep(dreamId, stepId, body) {
            try {
                var res = await fetch(API_BASE_URL + '/dreams/' + dreamId + '/steps/' + stepId + '?' + dreamApiUserParams(), { method: 'PATCH', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(body) });
                var data = await res.json().catch(function() { return {}; });
                if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.detail || 'Ошибка');
                var row = stepsFlatCache.find(function(x) { return x.dream_id === dreamId && x.id === stepId; });
                if (row && data.step) {
                    if (data.step.completed !== undefined) row.completed = !!data.step.completed;
                    if (data.step.completed_late !== undefined) row.completed_late = !!data.step.completed_late;
                    if (data.step.waived !== undefined) row.waived = !!data.step.waived;
                    if (data.step.deadline !== undefined && data.step.deadline !== null) row.deadline = data.step.deadline;
                }
                return data;
            } catch (e) {
                if (e instanceof Error) throw e;
                throw new Error('Ошибка сети');
            }
        }

        function escapeHtml(s) { var div = document.createElement('div'); div.textContent = s; return div.innerHTML; }
        function escapeAttr(s) { return String(s).replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/"/g,'&quot;').replace(/'/g,'&#39;').replace(/</g,'&lt;'); }

        function formatNum(n) { return String(n).replace(/\B(?=(\d{3})+(?!\d))/g, '\u202f'); }
        async function loadLandingStats() {
            var fulfilledEl = document.getElementById('landing-fulfilled');
            var remainingEl = document.getElementById('landing-remaining');
            var usersEl = document.getElementById('landing-users');
            if (!fulfilledEl || !remainingEl || !usersEl) return;
            var data = null;
            var urls = [API_BASE_URL + '/landing_stats'];
            if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.location && window.location.origin)
                urls.push(window.location.origin + '/landing_stats');
            for (var i = 0; i < urls.length; i++) {
                try {
                    var res = await fetch(urls[i], { cache: 'no-store' });
                    if (res.ok) { data = await res.json(); break; }
                } catch (e) {}
            }
            if (data) {
                var fulfilled = data.fulfilled_dreams || 0;
                var remaining = Math.max(0, 1000000 - fulfilled);
                fulfilledEl.textContent = formatNum(fulfilled);
                remainingEl.textContent = formatNum(remaining);
                usersEl.textContent = formatNum(data.users_count || 0);
            } else {
                fulfilledEl.textContent = '0';
                remainingEl.textContent = '1\u202f000\u202f000';
                usersEl.textContent = '0';
            }
        }

        document.addEventListener('click', function(ev) {
            if (!ev.target.closest('.status-picker')) document.querySelectorAll('.status-picker-dropdown.open').forEach(function(d) { d.classList.remove('open'); });
        });
        document.addEventListener('keydown', function(ev) {
            if (ev.key !== 'Escape') return;
            var mNew = document.getElementById('modal-new-dream');
            var mEdit = document.getElementById('modal-edit-dream');
            var mBuddy = document.getElementById('modal-add-buddy');
            var mAddStep = document.getElementById('modal-add-step');
            var mFin = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-finance');
            var mBulkEnd = document.getElementById('modal-add-step-bulk-end-confirm');
            var islandCalPop = document.getElementById('island-date-calendar-popover');
            if (islandCalPop && !islandCalPop.classList.contains('hidden')) { islandCalClose(); ev.preventDefault(); return; }
            if (mFin && !mFin.classList.contains('hidden')) { closeAddStepFinanceModal(); ev.preventDefault(); return; }
            if (mNew && !mNew.classList.contains('hidden')) { closeNewDreamModal(); ev.preventDefault(); return; }
            if (mEdit && !mEdit.classList.contains('hidden')) { closeEditDreamModal(); ev.preventDefault(); return; }
            if (mBuddy && !mBuddy.classList.contains('hidden')) { closeAddBuddyModal(); ev.preventDefault(); return; }
            if (mBulkEnd && !mBulkEnd.classList.contains('hidden')) { closeFinishAllSeriesConfirm(); ev.preventDefault(); return; }
            var mStepWaived = document.getElementById('modal-step-waived');
            if (mStepWaived && !mStepWaived.classList.contains('hidden')) { closeStepWaivedModal(); ev.preventDefault(); return; }
            var mStepComment = document.getElementById('modal-step-comment');
            if (mStepComment && !mStepComment.classList.contains('hidden')) { closeStepCommentModal(); ev.preventDefault(); return; }
            var mStepMove = document.getElementById('modal-step-move');
            if (mStepMove && !mStepMove.classList.contains('hidden')) { closeStepMoveModal(); ev.preventDefault(); return; }
            var mStepDoneLate = document.getElementById('modal-step-done-late');
            if (mStepDoneLate && !mStepDoneLate.classList.contains('hidden')) { closeStepDoneLateModal(); ev.preventDefault(); return; }
            var mStepSeriesConfirm = document.getElementById('modal-step-series-confirm');
            if (mStepSeriesConfirm && !mStepSeriesConfirm.classList.contains('hidden')) { closeStepSeriesConfirmModal(); ev.preventDefault(); return; }
            var mStepSeriesDel = document.getElementById('modal-step-series-delete');
            if (mStepSeriesDel && !mStepSeriesDel.classList.contains('hidden')) { closeStepSeriesDeleteModal(); ev.preventDefault(); return; }
            if (mAddStep && !mAddStep.classList.contains('hidden')) { closeAddStepModal(); ev.preventDefault(); }
        });
        initAddStepModal();
        initAddStepFinanceModal();
        initIslandDateCalendar();

        function logout() {
            currentUser = null;
            try { localStorage.removeItem('savedUser'); } catch (e) {}
            document.getElementById('profile-view').classList.add('hidden');
            document.getElementById('landing-view').classList.remove('hidden');
            document.body.classList.add('landing-visible');
            document.body.classList.remove('profile-visible');
            document.getElementById('page-title').classList.add('hidden');
            document.getElementById('login-form').classList.add('hidden');
            document.getElementById('register-form').classList.add('hidden');
            var lp = document.getElementById('login-phone');
            if (lp) lp.value = '';
            var lc = document.getElementById('login-country');
            if (lc) lc.value = '+7';
            var ll = document.getElementById('login-country-label');
            var lcode = document.getElementById('login-country-code');
            if (ll) ll.textContent = 'Россия';
            if (lcode) lcode.textContent = '+7';
            document.getElementById('password').value = '';
            loadLandingStats();
        }

        function clearSessionAndShowLogin(message) {
            currentUser = null;
            try { localStorage.removeItem('savedUser'); } catch (e) {}
            document.getElementById('profile-view').classList.add('hidden');
            document.getElementById('landing-view').classList.remove('hidden');
            document.body.classList.add('landing-visible');
            document.body.classList.remove('profile-visible');
            document.getElementById('login-form').classList.remove('hidden');
            document.getElementById('register-form').classList.add('hidden');
            var errEl = document.getElementById('login-error');
            if (errEl) { errEl.textContent = message || 'Сессия истекла. Войдите снова.'; errEl.classList.remove('hidden'); }
            loadLandingStats();
        }

        var COUNTRY_LIST = [
            { name: 'Россия', code: '+7', iso2: 'RU' }, { name: 'Беларусь', code: '+375', iso2: 'BY' }, { name: 'Германия', code: '+49', iso2: 'DE' }, { name: 'США', code: '+1', iso2: 'US' }, { name: 'Великобритания', code: '+44', iso2: 'GB' }, { name: 'Франция', code: '+33', iso2: 'FR' }, { name: 'Италия', code: '+39', iso2: 'IT' }, { name: 'Испания', code: '+34', iso2: 'ES' }, { name: 'Австрия', code: '+43', iso2: 'AT' }, { name: 'Швейцария', code: '+41', iso2: 'CH' }, { name: 'Польша', code: '+48', iso2: 'PL' }, { name: 'Чехия', code: '+420', iso2: 'CZ' }, { name: 'Словакия', code: '+421', iso2: 'SK' }, { name: 'Латвия', code: '+371', iso2: 'LV' }, { name: 'Литва', code: '+370', iso2: 'LT' }, { name: 'Эстония', code: '+372', iso2: 'EE' }, { name: 'Казахстан', code: '+7-7', iso2: 'KZ' }, { name: 'Украина', code: '+380', iso2: 'UA' }, { name: 'Грузия', code: '+995', iso2: 'GE' }, { name: 'Узбекистан', code: '+998', iso2: 'UZ' }, { name: 'Китай', code: '+86', iso2: 'CN' }, { name: 'Япония', code: '+81', iso2: 'JP' }, { name: 'Корея', code: '+82', iso2: 'KR' }, { name: 'Индия', code: '+91', iso2: 'IN' }, { name: 'Австралия', code: '+61', iso2: 'AU' }, { name: 'Новая Зеландия', code: '+64', iso2: 'NZ' }, { name: 'Бразилия', code: '+55', iso2: 'BR' }, { name: 'Мексика', code: '+52', iso2: 'MX' }, { name: 'Турция', code: '+90', iso2: 'TR' }, { name: 'ОАЭ', code: '+971', iso2: 'AE' }
        ];
        function countryFlag(iso2) {
            if (!iso2 || iso2.length !== 2) return '';
            return String.fromCodePoint.apply(null, [].map.call(iso2.toUpperCase(), function(c) { return 0x1F1E6 - 65 + c.charCodeAt(0); }));
        }
        function getCountryNameByCode(code) {
            var c = COUNTRY_LIST.find(function(x) { return x.code === code; });
            return c ? c.name : code;
        }
        var PHONE_PLACEHOLDERS = { '+7': '900 000 00 00', '+7-7': '701 123 45 67', '+375': '29 123 45 67', '+49': '151 12345678', '+1': '202 555 0123', '+44': '7700 900000', '+33': '6 12 34 56 78', '+39': '312 345 6789', '+34': '612 34 56 78', '+43': '650 1234567', '+41': '78 123 45 67', '+48': '512 345 678', '+420': '601 123 456', '+421': '901 123 456', '+371': '21 123 456', '+370': '612 34567', '+372': '5123 4567', '+380': '50 123 45 67', '+995': '555 12 34 56', '+998': '90 123 45 67', '+86': '138 0000 0000', '+81': '90 1234 5678', '+82': '10 1234 5678', '+91': '98765 43210', '+61': '412 345 678', '+64': '21 123 4567', '+55': '11 91234 5678', '+52': '55 1234 5678', '+90': '532 000 00 00', '+971': '50 123 4567' };
        function getPhonePlaceholder(code) { return PHONE_PLACEHOLDERS[code] || '000 000 00 00'; }
        function updatePhonePlaceholders() {
            var regCode = (document.getElementById('reg-country') && document.getElementById('reg-country').value) || '+7';
            var loginCode = (document.getElementById('login-country') && document.getElementById('login-country').value) || '+7';
            var rp = document.getElementById('reg-phone');
            var lp = document.getElementById('login-phone');
            if (rp) rp.placeholder = getPhonePlaceholder(regCode);
            if (lp) lp.placeholder = getPhonePlaceholder(loginCode);
        }
        var usedPhonePrefixes = [];
        function openCountryModal() {
            var modal = document.getElementById('modal-country-select');
            var list = document.getElementById('modal-country-list');
            var search = document.getElementById('modal-country-search');
            if (!modal || !list) return;
            search.value = '';
            renderCountryList('');
            modal.classList.remove('hidden');
            fetch(API_BASE_URL + '/users/phone-prefixes', { cache: 'no-store' }).then(function(r) { return r.ok ? r.json() : {}; }).then(function(d) { usedPhonePrefixes = (d && d.prefixes) ? d.prefixes : []; var s = document.getElementById('modal-country-search'); renderCountryList(s ? s.value : ''); }).catch(function() {});
            search.focus();
        }
        function closeCountryModal() { document.getElementById('modal-country-select').classList.add('hidden'); }
        function renderCountryList(filter) {
            var list = document.getElementById('modal-country-list');
            if (!list) return;
            var q = (filter || '').toLowerCase().trim();
            var items = COUNTRY_LIST.filter(function(c) { return !q || c.name.toLowerCase().indexOf(q) !== -1 || c.code.indexOf(q) !== -1; });
            items.sort(function(a, b) {
                var aUsed = usedPhonePrefixes.indexOf(a.code) !== -1;
                var bUsed = usedPhonePrefixes.indexOf(b.code) !== -1;
                if (aUsed && !bUsed) return -1;
                if (!aUsed && bUsed) return 1;
                return 0;
            });
            list.innerHTML = items.map(function(c) {
                var flag = (c.iso2 && countryFlag(c.iso2)) ? '<span class="country-flag">' + countryFlag(c.iso2) + '</span>' : '';
                var usedClass = usedPhonePrefixes.indexOf(c.code) !== -1 ? ' country-used' : '';
                return '<li class="' + usedClass + '" data-code="' + c.code.replace(/"/g, '&quot;') + '">' + flag + c.name + ' <span class="code">' + c.code + '</span></li>';
            }).join('');
            list.querySelectorAll('li').forEach(function(li) {
                li.addEventListener('click', function() {
                    var code = this.getAttribute('data-code');
                    var country = COUNTRY_LIST.find(function(x) { return x.code === code; });
                    var sel = document.getElementById('reg-country');
                    var label = document.getElementById('reg-country-label');
                    var codeEl = document.getElementById('reg-country-code');
                    if (sel) sel.value = code;
                    if (label && country) label.textContent = country.name;
                    if (codeEl) codeEl.textContent = code;
                    var loginSel = document.getElementById('login-country');
                    var loginLabel = document.getElementById('login-country-label');
                    var loginCodeEl = document.getElementById('login-country-code');
                    if (loginSel) loginSel.value = code;
                    if (loginLabel && country) loginLabel.textContent = country.name;
                    if (loginCodeEl) loginCodeEl.textContent = code;
                    updatePhonePlaceholders();
                    closeCountryModal();
                });
            });
        }
        function regShowStep1() {
            document.getElementById('tg-step-2').classList.remove('active');
            document.getElementById('tg-step-1').classList.add('active');
        }
        function regStep1Continue() {
            var countryEl = document.getElementById('reg-country');
            var countryCode = (countryEl && countryEl.value) || '+7';
            var rawPhone = document.getElementById('reg-phone').value.trim();
            var digits = rawPhone.replace(/\D/g, '');
            if (countryCode === '+7' && digits.length >= 11 && digits.charAt(0) === '8') digits = digits.slice(1);
            var err = document.getElementById('reg-step1-error');
            err.classList.remove('visible');
            err.textContent = '';
            if (!validatePhoneLength(countryCode, digits)) {
                if (countryCode === '+7') err.textContent = 'Введите 10 цифр номера (например 900 123 45 67).';
                else if (countryCode === '+375') err.textContent = 'Введите 9 цифр номера.';
                else if (countryCode === '+49') err.textContent = 'Введите 10–11 цифр номера.';
                else err.textContent = 'Некорректная длина номера.';
                err.classList.add('visible');
                return;
            }
            document.getElementById('tg-step-1').classList.remove('active');
            document.getElementById('tg-step-2').classList.add('active');
        }
        function showRegisterForm() {
            var card = document.querySelector('.landing-card');
            if (card) card.classList.add('register-visible');
            document.getElementById('login-form').classList.add('hidden');
            document.getElementById('login-error').classList.add('hidden');
            document.getElementById('register-form').classList.remove('hidden');
            document.getElementById('register-error').classList.add('hidden');
            document.getElementById('reg-name').value = '';
            document.getElementById('reg-surname').value = '';
            document.getElementById('reg-phone').value = '';
            document.getElementById('reg-country').value = '+7';
            var label = document.getElementById('reg-country-label');
            var codeEl = document.getElementById('reg-country-code');
            if (label) label.textContent = 'Россия';
            if (codeEl) codeEl.textContent = '+7';
            document.getElementById('reg-password').value = '';
            var rep = document.getElementById('reg-password-repeat');
            if (rep) rep.value = '';
            var regBtn = document.getElementById('register-btn');
            if (regBtn) { regBtn.disabled = false; regBtn.textContent = 'Зарегистрироваться'; }
            document.getElementById('register-error-tg').classList.remove('visible');
            document.getElementById('reg-step1-error').classList.remove('visible');
            updatePhonePlaceholders();
            regShowStep1();
        }

        function showLoginForm() {
            var card = document.querySelector('.landing-card');
            if (card) card.classList.remove('register-visible');
