                    list.appendChild(li);
                });
            } catch (e) {
                if (err) { err.textContent = 'Не удалось загрузить дневник.'; err.classList.remove('hidden'); }
            }
        }
        function renderStepsList(activeFilters, isBuddy) {
            var listEl = document.getElementById('steps-list');
            var emptyEl = document.getElementById('steps-empty');
            var deletedWrap = document.getElementById('steps-deleted-wrap');
            var deletedEmptyEl = document.getElementById('steps-deleted-empty');
            var filters = Array.isArray(activeFilters) ? activeFilters : [activeFilters];
            var canManage = !isBuddy || !!(currentUser && currentUser.buddy_trust);

            var showDeleted = canManage && filters.indexOf('deleted') !== -1;
            if (showDeleted) {
                deletedWrap.classList.remove('hidden');
                listEl.innerHTML = '';
                emptyEl.classList.add('hidden');
                var deletedList = stepsFlatCache.filter(function(s) { return s.deleted; });
                if (deletedList.length === 0) {
                    if (deletedEmptyEl) deletedEmptyEl.classList.remove('hidden');
                    document.getElementById('steps-deleted-list').innerHTML = '';
                } else {
                    if (deletedEmptyEl) deletedEmptyEl.classList.add('hidden');
                    renderStepsDeletedList();
                }
            } else {
                deletedWrap.classList.add('hidden');
            }

            var today = new Date();
            var todayStr = today.toISOString().slice(0, 10);
            var in7Days = new Date(today);
            in7Days.setDate(in7Days.getDate() + 7);
            var in7DaysStr = in7Days.toISOString().slice(0, 10);

            var list = sortStepsByDeadline(stepsFlatCache.filter(function(s) {
                if (s.deleted) return false;
                if (filters.indexOf('all') !== -1) return true;
                var dl = (s.deadline || '').toString().slice(0, 10);
                var isCurrent = dl && dl >= todayStr && dl <= in7DaysStr && !s.completed && !s.waived;
                var isOverdue = stepIsOverdueUtc(s);
                var isCompleted = s.completed;
                var isWaived = !!s.waived;
                if (filters.indexOf('current') !== -1 && isCurrent) return true;
                if (filters.indexOf('overdue') !== -1 && isOverdue) return true;
                if (filters.indexOf('waived') !== -1 && isWaived) return true;
                if (filters.indexOf('completed') !== -1 && isCompleted) return true;
                return false;
            }));
            var titleCounterMap = buildStepTitleCounterMap(list, stepsFlatCache.filter(function(s) { return s && !s.deleted; }));
            listEl.innerHTML = '';
            if (list.length === 0) {
                emptyEl.classList.remove('hidden');
                return;
            }
            emptyEl.classList.add('hidden');
            var lastDividerIso = null;
            list.forEach(function(s) {
                var dayKey = (s.deadline || '').toString().slice(0, 10);
                if (/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/.test(dayKey) && dayKey !== lastDividerIso) {
                    var divLi = document.createElement('li');
                    divLi.className = 'step-day-divider';
                    divLi.setAttribute('role', 'separator');
                    divLi.textContent = formatStepsListDayDivider(dayKey);
                    listEl.appendChild(divLi);
                    lastDividerIso = dayKey;
                }
                var li = document.createElement('li');
                li.className = 'step-item-plain step-unified-line' + (s.completed ? ' completed' : '') + (s.waived ? ' step-waived' : '');
                li.dataset.dreamId = s.dream_id;
                li.dataset.stepId = s.id;
                li.innerHTML = buildUnifiedStepRowHtml(s.dream_id, s, titleCounterMap, { canManage: canManage });
                listEl.appendChild(li);
                var inner = li.querySelector('.step-unified-inner');
                if (inner) wireUnifiedStepRow(inner, s.dream_id, s, {
                    canManage: canManage,
                    isReadOnly: !canManage,
                    useAccordionDelete: false,
                    onRefresh: function() {
                        dreamIdToRestoreAfterRefresh = s.dream_id;
                        refreshAfterDreamChange();
                    }
                });
            });
        }
        function renderStepsDeletedList() {
            var deletedList = document.getElementById('steps-deleted-list');
            var list = sortStepsByDeadline(stepsFlatCache.filter(function(s) { return s.deleted; }));
            deletedList.innerHTML = '';
            var lastDelDividerIso = null;
            list.forEach(function(s) {
                var dayKey = (s.deadline || '').toString().slice(0, 10);
                if (/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/.test(dayKey) && dayKey !== lastDelDividerIso) {
                    var divLi = document.createElement('li');
                    divLi.className = 'step-day-divider';
                    divLi.setAttribute('role', 'separator');
                    divLi.textContent = formatStepsListDayDivider(dayKey);
                    deletedList.appendChild(divLi);
                    lastDelDividerIso = dayKey;
                }
                var li = document.createElement('li');
                li.className = 'step-item-plain step-unified-line';
                li.dataset.dreamId = s.dream_id;
                li.dataset.stepId = s.id;
                li.innerHTML = '<div class="step-unified-inner"><div class="step-actions-left"></div><div class="step-main-col"><span class="step-title-wrap"><span class="step-title-text">' + escapeHtml(s.title) + '</span></span>' + buildStepTimeUnderTitleHtml(s) + '</div><div class="step-actions-right"><span class="step-restore" role="button" tabindex="0" title="Восстановить шаг">Восстановить</span></div></div>';
                deletedList.appendChild(li);
                li.querySelector('.step-restore').addEventListener('click', function() { setStepDeleted(s.dream_id, s.id, false); });
            });
        }
        async function setStepDeleted(dreamId, stepId, deleted) {
            try {
                var url = API_BASE_URL + '/dreams/' + dreamId + '/steps/' + stepId + '?' + dreamApiUserParams();
                var res = await fetch(url, { method: 'PATCH', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ deleted: deleted }) });
                if (!res.ok) { alert('Ошибка'); return; }
                var s = stepsFlatCache.find(function(x) { return x.dream_id === dreamId && x.id === stepId; });
                if (s) s.deleted = deleted;
                dreamIdToRestoreAfterRefresh = dreamId;
                refreshAfterDreamChange();
            } catch (e) { alert('Ошибка сети'); }
        }
        var stepCommentModal = { dreamId: 0, stepId: 0 };
        function updateStepCommentSaveState() {
            var ta = document.getElementById('step-comment-note-text');
            var saveBtn = document.getElementById('step-comment-save');
            if (!saveBtn) return;
            saveBtn.disabled = !(ta && (ta.value || '').trim().length);
        }
        function openStepCommentModal(dreamId, stepId) {
            stepCommentModal = { dreamId: dreamId, stepId: stepId };
            var ta = document.getElementById('step-comment-note-text');
            if (ta) ta.value = '';
            updateStepCommentSaveState();
            var m = document.getElementById('modal-step-comment');
            if (m) m.classList.remove('hidden');
        }
        function closeStepCommentModal() {
            var m = document.getElementById('modal-step-comment');
            if (m) m.classList.add('hidden');
            stepCommentModal = { dreamId: 0, stepId: 0 };
        }
        var stepMoveModal = { dreamId: 0, stepId: 0 };
        function updateStepMoveButtonsState() {
            var dateIn = document.getElementById('step-move-deadline');
            var noteTa = document.getElementById('step-move-note-text');
            var saveBtn = document.getElementById('step-move-save');
            var skipBtn = document.getElementById('step-move-skip');
            if (!dateIn || !saveBtn || !skipBtn) return;
            var iso = uiDateToIso((dateIn.value || '').trim());
            var dateOk = !!iso;
            skipBtn.disabled = !dateOk;
            saveBtn.disabled = !dateOk;
        }
        function openStepMoveModal(dreamId, stepId, currentDeadline) {
            stepMoveModal = { dreamId: dreamId, stepId: stepId };
            var dateIn = document.getElementById('step-move-deadline');
            var noteTa = document.getElementById('step-move-note-text');
            if (noteTa) noteTa.value = '';
            if (dateIn) {
                var iso = (currentDeadline || '').toString().slice(0, 10);
                dateIn.value = /^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/.test(iso) ? isoToUiDate(iso) : '';
                dateIn.classList.remove('island-date-field-invalid');
            }
            updateStepMoveButtonsState();
            document.getElementById('modal-step-move').classList.remove('hidden');
        }
        function closeStepMoveModal() {
            document.getElementById('modal-step-move').classList.add('hidden');
            stepMoveModal = { dreamId: 0, stepId: 0 };
        }
        var stepDoneLateModal = { dreamId: 0, stepId: 0, doneBtn: null };
        function updateStepDoneLateSaveState() {
            var ta = document.getElementById('step-done-late-note-text');
            var saveBtn = document.getElementById('step-done-late-save');
            if (!saveBtn) return;
            saveBtn.disabled = !(ta && (ta.value || '').trim().length);
        }
        function openStepDoneLateModal(dreamId, stepId, doneBtnEl) {
            stepDoneLateModal = { dreamId: dreamId, stepId: stepId, doneBtn: doneBtnEl || null };
            var ta = document.getElementById('step-done-late-note-text');
            if (ta) ta.value = '';
            updateStepDoneLateSaveState();
            document.getElementById('modal-step-done-late').classList.remove('hidden');
        }
        function closeStepDoneLateModal() {
            document.getElementById('modal-step-done-late').classList.add('hidden');
            stepDoneLateModal = { dreamId: 0, stepId: 0, doneBtn: null };
        }
        var stepSeriesConfirmModal = { onConfirm: null };
        function openStepSeriesConfirmModal(text, onConfirm) {
            var txt = document.getElementById('step-series-confirm-text');
            if (txt) txt.textContent = text || 'Подтверди действие для серии шагов.';
            stepSeriesConfirmModal.onConfirm = typeof onConfirm === 'function' ? onConfirm : null;
            var m = document.getElementById('modal-step-series-confirm');
            if (m) m.classList.remove('hidden');
        }
        function closeStepSeriesConfirmModal() {
            var m = document.getElementById('modal-step-series-confirm');
            if (m) m.classList.add('hidden');
            stepSeriesConfirmModal.onConfirm = null;
        }
        function confirmStepSeriesConfirmModal() {
            var fn = stepSeriesConfirmModal.onConfirm;
            closeStepSeriesConfirmModal();
            if (typeof fn === 'function') fn();
        }
        var stepSeriesDeleteModal = { seriesObj: null, dreamId: 0, onRefresh: null };
        function utcTodayIsoDate() {
            var d = new Date();
            return d.getUTCFullYear() + '-' + String(d.getUTCMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0') + '-' + String(d.getUTCDate()).padStart(2, '0');
        }
        function stepDeadlineDateIso(step) {
            return (step && step.deadline) ? String(step.deadline).slice(0, 10) : '';
        }
        /** Серия: шаги для частичного удаления по календарной дате дедлайна (UTC). Прошлые — строго до сегодня; будущие — сегодня и позже. */
        function compactSeriesStepsForDeleteScope(seriesObj, scope) {
            var all = (seriesObj && seriesObj.steps) ? seriesObj.steps.slice().filter(function(st) { return st && !st.deleted; }) : [];
            if (scope === 'all') return all;
            var today = utcTodayIsoDate();
            if (scope === 'past')
                return all.filter(function(st) {
                    var ds = stepDeadlineDateIso(st);
                    return /^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/.test(ds) && ds < today;
                });
            if (scope === 'future')
                return all.filter(function(st) {
                    var ds = stepDeadlineDateIso(st);
                    return /^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/.test(ds) && ds >= today;
                });
            return all;
        }
        function openStepSeriesDeleteModal(seriesObj, dreamId, onRefresh) {
            stepSeriesDeleteModal.seriesObj = seriesObj;
            stepSeriesDeleteModal.dreamId = dreamId;
            stepSeriesDeleteModal.onRefresh = typeof onRefresh === 'function' ? onRefresh : null;
            var lead = document.getElementById('step-series-delete-lead');
            if (lead) lead.textContent = 'Серия «' + (seriesObj && seriesObj.title ? seriesObj.title : '') + '».';
            var nAll = compactSeriesStepsForDeleteScope(seriesObj, 'all').length;
            var nPast = compactSeriesStepsForDeleteScope(seriesObj, 'past').length;
            var nFut = compactSeriesStepsForDeleteScope(seriesObj, 'future').length;
            var bAll = document.getElementById('step-series-delete-all');
            var bPast = document.getElementById('step-series-delete-past');
            var bFut = document.getElementById('step-series-delete-future');
            if (bAll) bAll.disabled = nAll === 0;
            if (bPast) bPast.disabled = nPast === 0;
            if (bFut) bFut.disabled = nFut === 0;
            var m = document.getElementById('modal-step-series-delete');
            if (m) m.classList.remove('hidden');
        }
        function closeStepSeriesDeleteModal() {
            var m = document.getElementById('modal-step-series-delete');
            if (m) m.classList.add('hidden');
            stepSeriesDeleteModal = { seriesObj: null, dreamId: 0, onRefresh: null };
        }
        function runStepSeriesDeleteScope(scope) {
            var ctx = stepSeriesDeleteModal;
            var g = ctx.seriesObj;
            var dreamId = ctx.dreamId;
            var onr = ctx.onRefresh;
            closeStepSeriesDeleteModal();
            if (!g) return;
            var targets = compactSeriesStepsForDeleteScope(g, scope);
            if (!targets.length) {
                alert('Нет шагов в выбранной категории');
                return;
            }
            Promise.all(targets.map(function(st) {
                var did = st.dream_id || g.dream_id || dreamId;
                return patchStep(did, st.id, { deleted: true }).then(function() { st.deleted = true; });
            })).then(function() { if (onr) onr(); }).catch(function() { alert('Не удалось сохранить'); });
        }
        var finStepModalContext = null;
        function openFinStepConfirmModal(stepObj, checkboxEl, doneBtnEl) {
            finStepModalContext = { step: stepObj, checkbox: checkboxEl || null, doneBtn: doneBtnEl || null };
            var N = stepObj.amountN != null ? stepObj.amountN : 0;
            var textEl = document.getElementById('modal-fin-step-text');
            var otherWrap = document.getElementById('modal-fin-step-other-wrap');
            var amountInput = document.getElementById('modal-fin-step-amount');
            var btnYes = document.getElementById('modal-fin-step-btn-yes');
            var btnOther = document.getElementById('modal-fin-step-btn-other');
            var btnSave = document.getElementById('modal-fin-step-btn-save');
            var btnCancel = document.getElementById('modal-fin-step-btn-cancel');
            textEl.textContent = 'Я правильно понимаю, что ты вносишь сумму ровно ' + formatNum(Math.round(N)) + ' руб?';
            otherWrap.classList.add('hidden');
            amountInput.value = N;
            btnYes.classList.remove('hidden');
            btnOther.classList.remove('hidden');
            btnSave.classList.add('hidden');
            btnCancel.classList.add('hidden');
            document.getElementById('modal-fin-step-confirm').classList.remove('hidden');
        }
        function closeFinStepConfirmModal() {
            document.getElementById('modal-fin-step-confirm').classList.add('hidden');
            if (finStepModalContext && finStepModalContext.checkbox) finStepModalContext.checkbox.checked = false;
            if (finStepModalContext && finStepModalContext.doneBtn) finStepModalContext.doneBtn.classList.remove('step-done-on');
            finStepModalContext = null;
        }
        function confirmFinStepAmount(amount) {
            if (!finStepModalContext) return;
            var dreamId = finStepModalContext.step.dream_id;
            var stepId = finStepModalContext.step.id;
            fetch(API_BASE_URL + '/dreams/' + dreamId + '/steps/' + stepId + '?' + dreamApiUserParams(), { method: 'PATCH', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ completed: true, fact_amount: amount }) })
                .then(function(r) {
                    if (!r.ok) return Promise.reject();
                    document.getElementById('modal-fin-step-confirm').classList.add('hidden');
                    finStepModalContext = null;
                    dreamIdToRestoreAfterRefresh = dreamId;
                    refreshAfterDreamChange();
                })
                .catch(function() { alert('Ошибка сохранения'); });
        }
        (function setupFinStepModal() {
            var overlay = document.getElementById('modal-fin-step-confirm');
            var btnYes = document.getElementById('modal-fin-step-btn-yes');
            var btnOther = document.getElementById('modal-fin-step-btn-other');
            var btnSave = document.getElementById('modal-fin-step-btn-save');
            var btnCancel = document.getElementById('modal-fin-step-btn-cancel');
            var otherWrap = document.getElementById('modal-fin-step-other-wrap');
            var amountInput = document.getElementById('modal-fin-step-amount');
            btnYes.addEventListener('click', function() {
                if (finStepModalContext) confirmFinStepAmount(finStepModalContext.step.amountN);
            });
            btnOther.addEventListener('click', function() {
                otherWrap.classList.remove('hidden');
                btnYes.classList.add('hidden');
                btnOther.classList.add('hidden');
                btnSave.classList.remove('hidden');
                btnCancel.classList.remove('hidden');
                amountInput.focus();
            });
            btnSave.addEventListener('click', function() {
                var val = amountInput.value.trim();
                var num = val === '' ? 0 : parseFloat(val.replace(/\s/g, '').replace(',', '.'));
                if (isNaN(num)) num = 0;
                confirmFinStepAmount(num);
            });
            btnCancel.addEventListener('click', closeFinStepConfirmModal);
            overlay.addEventListener('click', function(e) { if (e.target === overlay) closeFinStepConfirmModal(); });
        })();
        (function setupStepsFilterButtons() {
            var wrap = document.getElementById('steps-filter');
            if (!wrap) return;
            wrap.querySelectorAll('.dreams-filter-btn').forEach(function(btn) {
                btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                    wrap.querySelectorAll('.dreams-filter-btn').forEach(function(x) { x.classList.remove('active'); });
                    btn.classList.add('active');
                    if (stepsFlatCache.length) renderStepsList(getStepsFilterActive(), stepsViewIsBuddy);
                });
            });
        })();
        async function loadBuddyDreams() {
            var titleEl = document.getElementById('buddy-title');
            var tbodyEl = document.getElementById('buddy-dreams-tbody');
            var emptyEl = document.getElementById('buddy-dreams-empty');
            var errEl = document.getElementById('buddy-dreams-error');
            var tableEl = document.getElementById('buddy-dreams-table');
            titleEl.textContent = '';
            tbodyEl.innerHTML = '';
            emptyEl.classList.add('hidden');
            errEl.classList.add('hidden');
            if (!currentUser || !currentUser.buddy_id) {
                titleEl.textContent = 'У вас пока нет бадди';
                emptyEl.textContent = 'Бадди не назначен.';
                emptyEl.classList.remove('hidden');
                buddyDreamsCache = [];
                renderBuddyDreamsMobileCards([]);
                renderDreamsMobileList([], 'buddy');
                applyDreamsViewMode();
                return;
            }
            var buddyName = (currentUser.buddy_name || '').trim() || 'Бадди';
            titleEl.textContent = 'Мечты бадди: ' + buddyName;
            dreamEditContext.ownerId = currentUser.buddy_id;
            dreamEditContext.viewerId = currentUser.id;
            try {
                var res = await fetch(API_BASE_URL + '/dreams?user_id=' + currentUser.buddy_id + '&viewer_id=' + currentUser.id, { cache: 'no-store' });
                if (res.status === 401) { clearSessionAndShowLogin('Сессия истекла. Войдите снова.'); return; }
                if (!res.ok) {
                    var errData = await res.json().catch(function() { return {}; });
                    errEl.textContent = errData.detail || 'Ошибка загрузки мечт бадди';
                    errEl.classList.remove('hidden');
                    return;
                }
                var data = await res.json();
                buddyDreamsCache = data.dreams || [];
                var fulfilled = Number(data.dreams_fulfilled_count) || 0;
                buddyStatsCache = { ratio: fulfilled + '/' + buddyDreamsCache.length };
                if (headerView === 'buddy') applyHeaderView();
                tableEl.classList.remove('hidden');
                applyDreamsFilterUI();
                refreshBuddyDreamsDisplay();
            } catch (e) {
                console.error('loadBuddyDreams', e);
                errEl.textContent = 'Ошибка загрузки';
                errEl.classList.remove('hidden');
                buddyDreamsCache = [];
                renderDreamsMobileList([], 'buddy');
                applyDreamsViewMode();
            }
        }
        function renderBuddyDreamsTable(dreams) {
            var tbodyEl = document.getElementById('buddy-dreams-tbody');
            if (!tbodyEl) return;
            tbodyEl.innerHTML = '';
            dreams.forEach(function(d, i) {
                var text = typeof d === 'string' ? d : (d.title || d.dream || '').trim() || '—';
                var statusId = d.status_id != null ? d.status_id : 1;
                var deadline = formatDeadlineDisplay((d.deadline || '').toString().slice(0, 10) || '');
                var dreamId = d.id;
                var price = d.price != null && d.price !== '' ? (Math.round(Number(d.price))).toLocaleString('ru-RU') : '—';
                var statusList = getStatusList();
                var statusObj = statusList.find(function(o) { return o.id === statusId; }) || statusList[0];
                var statusIconOnly = (statusObj.icon || '').trim();
                var statusTitle = (statusObj.label_ru || statusObj.code || '').trim();
                var tr = document.createElement('tr');
                tr.className = 'dream-row buddy-dream-row';
                tr.dataset.dreamId = dreamId;
                tr.innerHTML = '<td class="dream-num-td">' + (i + 1) + '</td><td class="dream-steps-td" style="' + buildDreamStepsCellStyle(d) + '" title="' + escapeAttr(buildDreamStepsCellTitle(d)) + '">' + buildDreamStepsLabel(d) + '</td><td class="dream-text">' + escapeHtml(text) + '</td><td class="dream-deadline">' + escapeHtml(deadline) + '</td><td class="dream-price">' + escapeHtml(price) + '</td><td class="dream-status-cell" title="' + escapeAttr(statusTitle) + '">' + escapeHtml(statusIconOnly) + '</td>';
                tbodyEl.appendChild(tr);
                var steps = sortStepsByDeadline((d.steps || []).filter(function(s) { return !s.deleted; }));
                var titleCounterMap = buildStepTitleCounterMap(steps);
                if (steps.length > 0) {
                    var accTr = document.createElement('tr');
                    accTr.className = 'accordion-row hidden';
                    accTr.id = 'buddy-accordion-' + dreamId;
                    accTr.dataset.dreamId = dreamId;
                    var stepsHtml = '<div class="steps-list" data-dream-id="' + dreamId + '">' + buildDreamStepsCompactHtml(dreamId, steps, titleCounterMap, { canManage: false, isReadOnly: true, compactSeries: true }) + '</div>';
                    accTr.innerHTML = '<td colspan="6">' + stepsHtml + '</td>';
                    tbodyEl.appendChild(accTr);
                }
                tr.addEventListener('click', function(ev) {
                    var acc = document.getElementById('buddy-accordion-' + dreamId);
                    if (acc) acc.classList.toggle('hidden');
                });
            });
        }
        function renderBuddyDreamsTableEditable(dreams) {
            var tbodyEl = document.getElementById('buddy-dreams-tbody');
            if (!tbodyEl) return;
            tbodyEl.innerHTML = '';
            dreams.forEach(function(d, i) {
                var text = typeof d === 'string' ? d : (d.title || d.dream || '').trim() || '—';
                var statusId = d.status_id != null ? d.status_id : 1;
                var deadline = formatDeadlineDisplay((d.deadline || '').toString().slice(0, 10) || '');
                var dreamId = d.id;
                var price = d.price != null && d.price !== '' ? (Math.round(Number(d.price))).toLocaleString('ru-RU') : '—';
                var isPublic = d.is_public !== false;
                var eyeIcon = isPublic ? '👁️' : '🙈';
                var eyeTitle = isPublic ? 'Открытая' : 'Приватная';
                var tr = document.createElement('tr');
                tr.className = 'dream-row buddy-dream-row';
                tr.dataset.dreamId = dreamId;
                var ownerIdBuddy = (dreamEditContext.ownerId != null && dreamEditContext.ownerId !== 0) ? dreamEditContext.ownerId : (currentUser && currentUser.id);
                tr.innerHTML = '<td class="dream-num-td">' + (i + 1) + '</td><td class="dream-steps-td" style="' + buildDreamStepsCellStyle(d) + '" title="' + escapeAttr(buildDreamStepsCellTitle(d)) + '">' + buildDreamStepsLabel(d) + '</td><td class="dream-text">' + escapeHtml(text) + '</td><td class="dream-deadline">' + escapeHtml(deadline) + '</td><td class="dream-price">' + escapeHtml(price) + '</td><td class="dream-status-cell" data-dream-id="' + dreamId + '"><div class="dream-status-cell-inner"><button type="button" class="dream-eye" data-dream-id="' + dreamId + '" data-public="' + (isPublic ? '1' : '0') + '" data-owner-id="' + (ownerIdBuddy || '') + '" title="' + escapeAttr(eyeTitle) + '">' + eyeIcon + '</button>' + buildStatusPickerHtml(dreamId, statusId) + '<button type="button" class="dream-edit-btn" title="Редактирование">✏️</button></div></td>';
                tbodyEl.appendChild(tr);
                tr.querySelector('.dream-edit-btn').addEventListener('click', function(ev) { ev.stopPropagation(); openEditDreamModal(d); });
                var eyeBtn = tr.querySelector('.dream-eye');
                eyeBtn.addEventListener('click', function(ev) { ev.preventDefault(); ev.stopPropagation(); var nowPublic = this.getAttribute('data-public') === '1'; var oid = this.getAttribute('data-owner-id'); saveDreamPrivacy(dreamId, !nowPublic, oid ? parseInt(oid, 10) : undefined); });
                var picker = tr.querySelector('.status-picker');
                if (picker) {
                    var currentSpan = picker.querySelector('.status-picker-current');
                    var dropdown = picker.querySelector('.status-picker-dropdown');
                    currentSpan.addEventListener('click', function(ev) { ev.stopPropagation(); dropdown.classList.toggle('open'); });
                    picker.querySelectorAll('.status-picker-option').forEach(function(btn) {
                        btn.addEventListener('click', function(ev) { ev.stopPropagation(); var id = parseInt(btn.dataset.statusId, 10); var icon = btn.dataset.statusIcon || ''; var label = btn.dataset.statusLabel || btn.textContent.trim(); currentSpan.textContent = icon; currentSpan.title = (icon + ' ' + label).trim() || 'Статус'; dropdown.classList.remove('open'); saveDreamStatus(dreamId, id); });
                    });
                }
                tr.addEventListener('click', function(ev) {
                    if (!ev.target.closest('.status-picker') && !ev.target.closest('.dream-edit-btn') && !ev.target.closest('input')) {
                        document.querySelectorAll('#buddy-dreams-tbody tr.accordion-row[id^="buddy-accordion-"]').forEach(function(acc) {
                            if (acc.id !== 'buddy-accordion-' + dreamId) acc.classList.add('hidden');
                        });
                        var acc = document.getElementById('buddy-accordion-' + dreamId);
                        if (acc) acc.classList.toggle('hidden');
                    }
                });
                var accTr = document.createElement('tr');
                accTr.className = 'accordion-row hidden';
                accTr.id = 'buddy-accordion-' + dreamId;
                accTr.dataset.dreamId = dreamId;
                var steps = sortStepsByDeadline((d.steps || []).filter(function(s) { return !s.deleted; }));
                var titleCounterMap = buildStepTitleCounterMap(steps);
                var stepsHtml = buildDreamStepsCompactHtml(dreamId, steps, titleCounterMap, { canManage: true, isReadOnly: false, compactSeries: true });
                var addRowBuddy = '<div class="add-step-row" data-dream-id="' + dreamId + '"><button type="button" class="link add-step-btn">+ Добавить шаг</button></div>';
                accTr.innerHTML = '<td colspan="6">' + addRowBuddy + '<div class="steps-list" data-dream-id="' + dreamId + '">' + stepsHtml + '</div>' + addRowBuddy + '</td>';
                tbodyEl.appendChild(accTr);
                var isFinCatBuddy = !!(d.category_obj && d.category_obj.code === 'finance');
                accTr.querySelectorAll('.add-step-btn').forEach(function(btn) {
                    btn.addEventListener('click', function(ev) { ev.stopPropagation(); if (ENABLE_SPECIAL_STEPS_BOOKS_FINANCE && isFinCatBuddy) openAddStepFinanceModal(dreamId, d); else openAddStepModal(dreamId); });
                });
                var listRootBuddy = accTr.querySelector('.steps-list');
                wireDreamStepsCompact(listRootBuddy, dreamId, steps, {
                    canManage: true,
                    isReadOnly: false,
                    useAccordionDelete: true,
                    onRefresh: function() {
                        dreamIdToRestoreAfterRefresh = dreamId;
                        refreshAfterDreamChange();
                    }
                });
            });
        }
        function renderBuddyDreamsMobileCards(dreams, editable) {
            var block = document.getElementById('buddy-mobile-swipe');
            var track = block && block.querySelector('.dreams-mobile-track');
            var counterEl = block && block.querySelector('.dreams-mobile-counter');
            if (!track || !counterEl) return;
            track.innerHTML = '';
            track.dataset.currentIndex = '0';
            track.style.transform = 'translateX(0)';
            if (!dreams || dreams.length === 0) {
                var emptyCard = document.createElement('div');
                emptyCard.className = 'dreams-mobile-card dreams-mobile-card-empty';
                emptyCard.innerHTML = '<p>У бадди пока нет записанных мечт.</p>';
                track.appendChild(emptyCard);
                counterEl.textContent = '0 / 0';
                return;
            }
            dreams.forEach(function(d) {
                var text = (d.title || d.dream || '').trim() || '—';
                var deadline = formatDeadlineDisplay((d.deadline || '').toString().slice(0, 10) || '');
                var dreamId = d.id;
                var categoryIcon = (d.category_obj && (d.category_obj.icon || '').trim()) || '';
                var categoryLabel = (d.category_obj && (d.category_obj.label_ru || d.category_obj.code || '').trim()) || '';
                var categoryDisplay = categoryIcon || categoryLabel || '—';
                var categoryTitle = categoryLabel || 'Категория';
                var price = d.price != null && d.price !== '' ? (Math.round(Number(d.price))).toLocaleString('ru-RU') : '—';
                var steps = sortStepsByDeadline((d.steps || []).filter(function(s) { return !s.deleted; }));
                var titleCounterMap = buildStepTitleCounterMap(steps);
                var stepsHtml = '<div class="steps-list" data-dream-id="' + dreamId + '">' + buildDreamStepsCompactHtml(dreamId, steps, titleCounterMap, { canManage: false, isReadOnly: true, compactSeries: true }) + '</div>';
                var card = document.createElement('div');
                card.className = 'dreams-mobile-card';
                card.dataset.dreamId = dreamId;
                if (editable) {
                    var statusId = d.status_id != null ? d.status_id : 1;
                    var isPublic = d.is_public !== false;
                    var eyeIcon = isPublic ? '👁️' : '🙈';
                    var stepsEditableHtml = '<div class="steps-list" data-dream-id="' + dreamId + '">' + buildDreamStepsCompactHtml(dreamId, steps, titleCounterMap, { canManage: true, isReadOnly: false, compactSeries: true }) + '</div>';
                    var cardOwnerId = (dreamEditContext.ownerId != null && dreamEditContext.ownerId !== 0) ? dreamEditContext.ownerId : (currentUser && currentUser.id) || '';
                    var addRowBuddyCard = '<div class="add-step-row" data-dream-id="' + dreamId + '"><button type="button" class="link add-step-btn">+ Добавить шаг</button></div>';
                    var prBuddyC = buildDreamStepProgressInlineHtml(d);
                    card.innerHTML = '<div class="card-dream-text">' + escapeHtml(text) + '</div><div class="card-progress">' + prBuddyC + '</div><div class="card-row2"><span class="card-deadline">' + escapeHtml(deadline) + '</span><span class="card-sep">|</span><span class="card-price">' + escapeHtml(price) + ' руб.</span><span class="card-sep">|</span><div class="card-actions"><button type="button" class="dream-eye" data-dream-id="' + dreamId + '" data-public="' + (isPublic ? '1' : '0') + '" data-owner-id="' + cardOwnerId + '">' + eyeIcon + '</button>' + buildStatusPickerHtml(dreamId, statusId) + '<button type="button" class="dream-edit-btn" title="Редактирование">✏️</button></div></div><div class="card-steps"><div class="card-steps-title">Серии шагов</div>' + addRowBuddyCard + stepsEditableHtml + addRowBuddyCard + '</div>';
                    card.querySelector('.dream-edit-btn').addEventListener('click', function(ev) { ev.stopPropagation(); openEditDreamModal(d); });
                    card.querySelector('.dream-eye').addEventListener('click', function(ev) { ev.preventDefault(); ev.stopPropagation(); var oid = this.getAttribute('data-owner-id'); saveDreamPrivacy(dreamId, this.getAttribute('data-public') !== '1', oid ? parseInt(oid, 10) : undefined); });
                    var picker = card.querySelector('.status-picker');
                    if (picker) {
                        var currentSpan = picker.querySelector('.status-picker-current');
                        var dropdown = picker.querySelector('.status-picker-dropdown');
                        currentSpan.addEventListener('click', function(ev) { ev.stopPropagation(); dropdown.classList.toggle('open'); });
                        picker.querySelectorAll('.status-picker-option').forEach(function(btn) {
                            btn.addEventListener('click', function(ev) { ev.stopPropagation(); var id = parseInt(btn.dataset.statusId, 10); currentSpan.textContent = btn.dataset.statusIcon || ''; dropdown.classList.remove('open'); saveDreamStatus(dreamId, id); });
                        });
                    }
                    var isFinCatCard = !!(d.category_obj && d.category_obj.code === 'finance');
                    card.querySelectorAll('.add-step-btn').forEach(function(btn) {
                        btn.addEventListener('click', function(ev) { ev.stopPropagation(); if (ENABLE_SPECIAL_STEPS_BOOKS_FINANCE && isFinCatCard) openAddStepFinanceModal(dreamId, d); else openAddStepModal(dreamId); });
                    });
                    var buddySwipeList = card.querySelector('.steps-list');
                    wireDreamStepsCompact(buddySwipeList, dreamId, steps, {
                        canManage: true,
                        isReadOnly: false,
                        useAccordionDelete: true,
                        onRefresh: function() {
                            dreamIdToRestoreAfterRefresh = dreamId;
                            refreshAfterDreamChange();
                        }
                    });
                } else {
                    var prBuddyR = buildDreamStepProgressInlineHtml(d);
                    card.innerHTML = '<div class="card-dream-text">' + escapeHtml(text) + '</div><div class="card-progress">' + prBuddyR + '</div><div class="card-row2"><span class="card-deadline">' + escapeHtml(deadline) + '</span><span class="card-sep">|</span><span class="card-price">' + escapeHtml(price) + ' руб.</span></div><div class="card-steps"><div class="card-steps-title">Серии шагов</div>' + stepsHtml + '</div>';
                }
                track.appendChild(card);
            });
            counterEl.textContent = '1 / ' + dreams.length;
            var fcBuddy = document.getElementById('app-footer-counter'); if (fcBuddy) fcBuddy.textContent = counterEl.textContent;
            var viewport = block.querySelector('.dreams-mobile-viewport');
            if (!viewport.dataset.swipeSetup) {
                viewport.dataset.swipeSetup = '1';
                var touchStartX = 0;
                viewport.addEventListener('touchstart', function(ev) { if (ev.touches.length) touchStartX = ev.touches[0].clientX; }, { passive: true });
                viewport.addEventListener('touchend', function(ev) {
                    if (!ev.changedTouches.length) return;
                    var touchEndX = ev.changedTouches[0].clientX;
                    var delta = touchEndX - touchStartX;
                    var total = track.children.length;
                    if (total <= 1) return;
                    var idx = parseInt(track.dataset.currentIndex || 0, 10);
                    if (delta < -50 && idx < total - 1) idx++;
                    else if (delta > 50 && idx > 0) idx--;
                    track.dataset.currentIndex = String(idx);
                    track.style.transform = 'translateX(-' + (idx * 100) + '%)';
                    counterEl.textContent = (idx + 1) + ' / ' + total;
                    var fc = document.getElementById('app-footer-counter'); if (fc) fc.textContent = counterEl.textContent;
                }, { passive: true });
            }
        }
        function updateStickySpacer() {
            var sticky = document.querySelector('#profile-view .app-sticky-top');
            var spacer = document.getElementById('app-sticky-spacer');
            if (sticky && spacer) {
                var h = sticky.offsetHeight;
                spacer.style.height = (h > 0 ? h : 180) + 'px';
            }
        }
        document.getElementById('menu-my-dreams').addEventListener('click', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); headerView = 'me'; applyHeaderView(); switchMenu('dreams'); });
        document.getElementById('menu-buddy').addEventListener('click', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); headerView = 'buddy'; applyHeaderView(); switchMenu('buddy'); });
        document.getElementById('menu-my-steps').addEventListener('click', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); switchMenu('steps'); });
        document.querySelectorAll('.dreams-filter-btn').forEach(function(btn) {
            btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                dreamsFilter = this.dataset.filter || 'all';
                applyDreamsFilterUI();
                if (!document.getElementById('buddy-block').classList.contains('hidden')) refreshBuddyDreamsDisplay();
                else refreshDreamsDisplay();
            });
        });
        document.getElementById('header-buddy-slot').addEventListener('click', function(e) {
            if (e.target.closest('.buddy-slot-link-me')) return;
            if (!currentUser || !currentUser.buddy_id) return;
            if (headerView === 'buddy') return;
            headerView = 'buddy';
            applyHeaderView();
            switchMenu('buddy');
        });
        document.getElementById('header-buddy-slot').addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
            if (e.key !== 'Enter' && e.key !== ' ') return;
            e.preventDefault();
            if (!currentUser || !currentUser.buddy_id) return;
            if (headerView === 'buddy') return;
            headerView = 'buddy';
            applyHeaderView();
            switchMenu('buddy');
        });
        document.getElementById('menu-steps-buddy').addEventListener('click', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); switchMenu('steps-buddy'); });
        var headerLinkDreams = document.getElementById('header-link-dreams');
        var headerLinkSteps = document.getElementById('header-link-steps');
        var headerLinkShowcase = document.getElementById('header-link-showcase');
        if (headerLinkDreams) {
            headerLinkDreams.addEventListener('click', function() {
                if (!currentUser) return;
                dreamsViewMode = 'slider';
                if (headerView === 'buddy') { switchMenu('buddy'); } else { switchMenu('dreams'); }
            });
            headerLinkDreams.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
                if ((e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') && currentUser) {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    dreamsViewMode = 'slider';
                    if (headerView === 'buddy') switchMenu('buddy'); else switchMenu('dreams');
                }
            });
        }
        var footerCounter = document.getElementById('app-footer-counter');
        if (footerCounter) {
            footerCounter.addEventListener('click', function() {
                openDreamsListFromFooterCounter();
            });
            footerCounter.setAttribute('role', 'button');
            footerCounter.setAttribute('tabindex', '0');
            footerCounter.setAttribute('title', 'Открыть список мечт');
            footerCounter.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
                if (e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    openDreamsListFromFooterCounter();
                }
            });
        }
        if (headerLinkSteps) {
            headerLinkSteps.addEventListener('click', function() { if (headerView === 'buddy') switchMenu('steps-buddy'); else switchMenu('steps'); });
            headerLinkSteps.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) { if (e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') { e.preventDefault(); if (headerView === 'buddy') switchMenu('steps-buddy'); else switchMenu('steps'); } });
        }
        if (headerLinkShowcase) {
            headerLinkShowcase.addEventListener('click', function() { if (!currentUser) return; switchMenu('showcase'); });
            headerLinkShowcase.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) { if ((e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') && currentUser) { e.preventDefault(); switchMenu('showcase'); } });
        }
        var headerLinkDiary = document.getElementById('header-link-diary');
        if (headerLinkDiary) {
            headerLinkDiary.addEventListener('click', function() { if (!currentUser) return; switchMenu('diary'); });
            headerLinkDiary.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
                if ((e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') && currentUser) { e.preventDefault(); switchMenu('diary'); }
            });
        }
        var stepWaivedSkip = document.getElementById('step-waived-skip');
        var stepWaivedSave = document.getElementById('step-waived-save');
        var stepWaivedCancel = document.getElementById('step-waived-cancel');
        var stepWaivedNoteTa = document.getElementById('step-waived-note-text');
        if (stepWaivedNoteTa) stepWaivedNoteTa.addEventListener('input', updateStepWaivedSaveButtonState);
        if (stepWaivedCancel) stepWaivedCancel.addEventListener('click', function() { closeStepWaivedModal(); });
        if (stepWaivedSkip) stepWaivedSkip.addEventListener('click', function() {
            if (!stepWaivedModal.dreamId) { closeStepWaivedModal(); return; }
            var did = stepWaivedModal.dreamId;
            patchStep(stepWaivedModal.dreamId, stepWaivedModal.stepId, { waived: true }).then(function() {
                var row = stepsFlatCache.find(function(x) { return x.dream_id === stepWaivedModal.dreamId && x.id === stepWaivedModal.stepId; });
                if (row) row.waived = true;
                closeStepWaivedModal();
                dreamIdToRestoreAfterRefresh = did;
                refreshAfterDreamChange();
            }).catch(function() { alert('Не удалось сохранить'); });
        });
        if (stepWaivedSave) stepWaivedSave.addEventListener('click', function() {
            if (!stepWaivedModal.dreamId) { closeStepWaivedModal(); return; }
            if (stepWaivedSave.disabled) return;
            var note = (document.getElementById('step-waived-note-text') && document.getElementById('step-waived-note-text').value || '').trim();
            if (!note) return;
            var did = stepWaivedModal.dreamId;
            patchStep(stepWaivedModal.dreamId, stepWaivedModal.stepId, { waived: true, note: note }).then(function() {
                var row = stepsFlatCache.find(function(x) { return x.dream_id === stepWaivedModal.dreamId && x.id === stepWaivedModal.stepId; });
                if (row) row.waived = true;
                closeStepWaivedModal();
                dreamIdToRestoreAfterRefresh = did;
                refreshAfterDreamChange();
            }).catch(function() { alert('Не удалось сохранить'); });
        });
        var modalStepWaived = document.getElementById('modal-step-waived');
        if (modalStepWaived) modalStepWaived.addEventListener('click', function(e) { if (e.target === modalStepWaived) closeStepWaivedModal(); });
        var stepCommentTa = document.getElementById('step-comment-note-text');
        if (stepCommentTa) stepCommentTa.addEventListener('input', updateStepCommentSaveState);
        document.getElementById('step-comment-cancel') && document.getElementById('step-comment-cancel').addEventListener('click', closeStepCommentModal);
        document.getElementById('step-comment-skip') && document.getElementById('step-comment-skip').addEventListener('click', closeStepCommentModal);
        document.getElementById('step-comment-save') && document.getElementById('step-comment-save').addEventListener('click', function() {
            if (!stepCommentModal.dreamId || document.getElementById('step-comment-save').disabled) return;
            var note = (document.getElementById('step-comment-note-text') && document.getElementById('step-comment-note-text').value || '').trim();
            if (!note) return;
            var did = stepCommentModal.dreamId;
            patchStep(stepCommentModal.dreamId, stepCommentModal.stepId, { note: note }).then(function() {
                closeStepCommentModal();
                dreamIdToRestoreAfterRefresh = did;
                refreshAfterDreamChange();
            }).catch(function() { alert('Не удалось сохранить'); });
        });
        var modalStepComment = document.getElementById('modal-step-comment');
        if (modalStepComment) modalStepComment.addEventListener('click', function(e) { if (e.target === modalStepComment) closeStepCommentModal(); });
        var stepMoveDateIn = document.getElementById('step-move-deadline');
        var stepMoveNoteTa = document.getElementById('step-move-note-text');
        if (stepMoveDateIn) stepMoveDateIn.addEventListener('input', updateStepMoveButtonsState);
        if (stepMoveNoteTa) stepMoveNoteTa.addEventListener('input', updateStepMoveButtonsState);
        document.getElementById('step-move-cancel') && document.getElementById('step-move-cancel').addEventListener('click', closeStepMoveModal);
        document.getElementById('step-move-skip') && document.getElementById('step-move-skip').addEventListener('click', function() {
            if (!stepMoveModal.dreamId) { closeStepMoveModal(); return; }
            var iso = uiDateToIso((document.getElementById('step-move-deadline') && document.getElementById('step-move-deadline').value || '').trim());
            if (!iso) { alert('Укажите дату в формате дд.мм.гг'); return; }
            var did = stepMoveModal.dreamId;
            patchStep(stepMoveModal.dreamId, stepMoveModal.stepId, { deadline: iso }).then(function(data) {
                var row = stepsFlatCache.find(function(x) { return x.dream_id === stepMoveModal.dreamId && x.id === stepMoveModal.stepId; });
                if (row && data.step && data.step.deadline) row.deadline = data.step.deadline;
                closeStepMoveModal();
                dreamIdToRestoreAfterRefresh = did;
                refreshAfterDreamChange();
            }).catch(function() { alert('Не удалось перенести'); });
        });
        document.getElementById('step-move-save') && document.getElementById('step-move-save').addEventListener('click', function() {
            if (!stepMoveModal.dreamId) { closeStepMoveModal(); return; }
            var saveBtn = document.getElementById('step-move-save');
            if (saveBtn && saveBtn.disabled) return;
            var iso = uiDateToIso((document.getElementById('step-move-deadline') && document.getElementById('step-move-deadline').value || '').trim());
            if (!iso) { alert('Укажите дату'); return; }
            var noteTrim = (document.getElementById('step-move-note-text') && document.getElementById('step-move-note-text').value || '').trim();
            var body = { deadline: iso };
            if (noteTrim) body.note = noteTrim;
            var did = stepMoveModal.dreamId;
            patchStep(stepMoveModal.dreamId, stepMoveModal.stepId, body).then(function(data) {
                var row = stepsFlatCache.find(function(x) { return x.dream_id === stepMoveModal.dreamId && x.id === stepMoveModal.stepId; });
                if (row && data.step && data.step.deadline) row.deadline = data.step.deadline;
                closeStepMoveModal();
                dreamIdToRestoreAfterRefresh = did;
                refreshAfterDreamChange();
            }).catch(function() { alert('Не удалось перенести'); });
        });
        var modalStepMove = document.getElementById('modal-step-move');
        if (modalStepMove) modalStepMove.addEventListener('click', function(e) { if (e.target === modalStepMove) closeStepMoveModal(); });
        var stepDoneLateTa = document.getElementById('step-done-late-note-text');
        if (stepDoneLateTa) stepDoneLateTa.addEventListener('input', updateStepDoneLateSaveState);
        document.getElementById('step-done-late-cancel') && document.getElementById('step-done-late-cancel').addEventListener('click', closeStepDoneLateModal);
        document.getElementById('step-done-late-skip') && document.getElementById('step-done-late-skip').addEventListener('click', function() {
            if (!stepDoneLateModal.dreamId) { closeStepDoneLateModal(); return; }
            var dId = stepDoneLateModal.dreamId, sId = stepDoneLateModal.stepId, btn = stepDoneLateModal.doneBtn;
            patchStep(dId, sId, { completed: true }).then(function() {
                var row = stepsFlatCache.find(function(x) { return x.dream_id === dId && x.id === sId; });
                if (row) { row.completed = true; if (row.completed_late !== undefined) row.completed_late = true; }
                if (btn) btn.classList.add('step-done-on');
                closeStepDoneLateModal();
                dreamIdToRestoreAfterRefresh = dId;
                refreshAfterDreamChange();
            }).catch(function() { alert('Не удалось сохранить'); });
        });
        document.getElementById('step-done-late-save') && document.getElementById('step-done-late-save').addEventListener('click', function() {
            if (!stepDoneLateModal.dreamId) { closeStepDoneLateModal(); return; }
            if (document.getElementById('step-done-late-save').disabled) return;
            var note = (document.getElementById('step-done-late-note-text') && document.getElementById('step-done-late-note-text').value || '').trim();
            if (!note) return;
            var dId = stepDoneLateModal.dreamId, sId = stepDoneLateModal.stepId, btn = stepDoneLateModal.doneBtn;
            patchStep(dId, sId, { completed: true, note: note }).then(function() {
                var row = stepsFlatCache.find(function(x) { return x.dream_id === dId && x.id === sId; });
                if (row) { row.completed = true; if (row.completed_late !== undefined) row.completed_late = true; }
                if (btn) btn.classList.add('step-done-on');
                closeStepDoneLateModal();
                dreamIdToRestoreAfterRefresh = dId;
                refreshAfterDreamChange();
            }).catch(function() { alert('Не удалось сохранить'); });
        });
        var modalStepDoneLate = document.getElementById('modal-step-done-late');
        if (modalStepDoneLate) modalStepDoneLate.addEventListener('click', function(e) { if (e.target === modalStepDoneLate) closeStepDoneLateModal(); });
        document.getElementById('step-series-confirm-cancel') && document.getElementById('step-series-confirm-cancel').addEventListener('click', closeStepSeriesConfirmModal);
        document.getElementById('step-series-confirm-ok') && document.getElementById('step-series-confirm-ok').addEventListener('click', confirmStepSeriesConfirmModal);
        document.getElementById('step-series-delete-cancel') && document.getElementById('step-series-delete-cancel').addEventListener('click', closeStepSeriesDeleteModal);
        document.getElementById('step-series-delete-all') && document.getElementById('step-series-delete-all').addEventListener('click', function() { runStepSeriesDeleteScope('all'); });
        document.getElementById('step-series-delete-past') && document.getElementById('step-series-delete-past').addEventListener('click', function() { runStepSeriesDeleteScope('past'); });
        document.getElementById('step-series-delete-future') && document.getElementById('step-series-delete-future').addEventListener('click', function() { runStepSeriesDeleteScope('future'); });
        var modalStepSeriesConfirm = document.getElementById('modal-step-series-confirm');
        if (modalStepSeriesConfirm) modalStepSeriesConfirm.addEventListener('click', function(e) { if (e.target === modalStepSeriesConfirm) closeStepSeriesConfirmModal(); });
        var modalStepSeriesDelete = document.getElementById('modal-step-series-delete');
        if (modalStepSeriesDelete) modalStepSeriesDelete.addEventListener('click', function(e) { if (e.target === modalStepSeriesDelete) closeStepSeriesDeleteModal(); });
        var showcaseBackLink = document.getElementById('showcase-back-link');
        if (showcaseBackLink) showcaseBackLink.addEventListener('click', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); switchMenu(lastCabinetSection); });
        var headerBell = document.getElementById('header-bell');
        if (headerBell) headerBell.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
            e.preventDefault();
            if (!currentUser) return;
            if (!document.getElementById('dreams-block').classList.contains('hidden')) lastCabinetSection = 'dreams';
            else if (!document.getElementById('buddy-block').classList.contains('hidden')) lastCabinetSection = 'buddy';
            else if (!document.getElementById('steps-block').classList.contains('hidden')) lastCabinetSection = stepsViewIsBuddy ? 'steps-buddy' : 'steps';
            else if (document.getElementById('diary-block') && !document.getElementById('diary-block').classList.contains('hidden')) lastCabinetSection = 'diary';
            else if (document.getElementById('showcase-block') && !document.getElementById('showcase-block').classList.contains('hidden')) lastCabinetSection = 'showcase';
            switchMenu('notifications');
        });
        var profileAvatarEl = document.getElementById('profile-avatar');
        if (profileAvatarEl) profileAvatarEl.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
            if (!currentUser || headerView !== 'me') return;
            if (!document.getElementById('dreams-block').classList.contains('hidden')) lastCabinetSection = 'dreams';
            else if (!document.getElementById('buddy-block').classList.contains('hidden')) lastCabinetSection = 'buddy';
            else if (!document.getElementById('steps-block').classList.contains('hidden')) lastCabinetSection = stepsViewIsBuddy ? 'steps-buddy' : 'steps';
            else if (document.getElementById('diary-block') && !document.getElementById('diary-block').classList.contains('hidden')) lastCabinetSection = 'diary';
            else if (document.getElementById('showcase-block') && !document.getElementById('showcase-block').classList.contains('hidden')) lastCabinetSection = 'showcase';
            switchMenu('profile-edit');
        });
        var notificationsBackLink = document.getElementById('notifications-back-link');
        if (notificationsBackLink) notificationsBackLink.addEventListener('click', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); switchMenu(lastCabinetSection); });
        var profileEditBack = document.getElementById('profile-edit-back');
        if (profileEditBack) profileEditBack.addEventListener('click', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); switchMenu(lastCabinetSection); });
        var profileEditSave = document.getElementById('profile-edit-save');
        function parseApiErrorResponse(resp, fallbackMessage) {
            var contentType = (resp && resp.headers && resp.headers.get('content-type')) || '';
            if (contentType.indexOf('application/json') !== -1) {
                return resp.json().then(function(d) {
                    return (d && (d.detail || d.message)) || fallbackMessage || 'Ошибка запроса';
                }).catch(function() {
                    return fallbackMessage || 'Ошибка запроса';
                });
            }
            return resp.text().then(function(txt) {
                var raw = (txt || '').trim();
                if (!raw) return fallbackMessage || 'Ошибка запроса';
                var noTags = raw.replace(/<[^>]*>/g, ' ').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
                return noTags || fallbackMessage || ('HTTP ' + resp.status);
            }).catch(function() {
                return fallbackMessage || 'Ошибка запроса';
            });
        }
        if (profileEditSave) profileEditSave.addEventListener('click', function() {
            if (!currentUser || !currentUser.id) return;
            var curPw = document.getElementById('profile-edit-current-password');
            var newPw = document.getElementById('profile-edit-new-password');
            var telegramEl = document.getElementById('profile-edit-telegram');
            var vkEl = document.getElementById('profile-edit-vk');
            var phoneEl = document.getElementById('profile-edit-phone');
            var fileInput = document.getElementById('profile-edit-avatar-file');
            var errEl = document.getElementById('profile-edit-error');
            var currentPassword = (curPw && curPw.value) ? curPw.value : null;
            var newPassword = (newPw && newPw.value) ? newPw.value : null;
            var telegram = telegramEl ? (telegramEl.value || '').trim() : '';
            var vk = vkEl ? (vkEl.value || '').trim() : '';
            var phone = phoneEl ? (phoneEl.value || '').trim() : '';
            if (errEl) { errEl.classList.add('hidden'); errEl.textContent = ''; }
            function doPatch() {
                var body = { user_id: currentUser.id, telegram: telegram || null, vk: vk || null, phone: phone || null };
                if (newPassword) { body.current_password = currentPassword; body.new_password = newPassword; }
                return fetch(API_BASE_URL + '/users/me', {
                    method: 'PATCH',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                    body: JSON.stringify(body)
                }).then(function(r) {
                    if (!r.ok) return parseApiErrorResponse(r, 'Ошибка сохранения профиля').then(function(msg) { throw new Error(msg); });
                    return r.json();
                });
            }
            function onSuccess() {
                currentUser.telegram = telegram || null;
                currentUser.vk = vk || null;
                currentUser.phone = phone || null;
                applyHeaderView();
                showToast('Настройки сохранены.');
                switchMenu(lastCabinetSection);
            }
            function onErr(msg) { if (errEl) { errEl.classList.remove('hidden'); errEl.textContent = msg || 'Ошибка сохранения.'; } }
            var file = fileInput && fileInput.files && fileInput.files[0];
            if (file) {
                var fd = new FormData();
                fd.append('file', file);
                fetch(API_BASE_URL + '/avatar?user_id=' + currentUser.id, { method: 'POST', body: fd })
                    .then(function(r) {
                        if (!r.ok) return parseApiErrorResponse(r, 'Ошибка загрузки аватара').then(function(msg) { throw new Error(msg); });
                        return r.json();
                    })
                    .then(function(data) {
                        currentUser.avatar_path = data.avatar_path;
                        currentUser.avatar_url = API_BASE_URL + '/media/' + (data.avatar_path || '').replace(/^\//, '') + '?t=' + Date.now();
                        return doPatch();
                    })
                    .then(onSuccess)
                    .catch(function(e) { onErr(e.message); });
            } else {
                doPatch().then(onSuccess).catch(function(e) { onErr(e.message); });
            }
        });
        window.addEventListener('resize', updateStickySpacer);

        var avatarFileEl = document.getElementById('avatar-file');
        if (avatarFileEl) {
            avatarFileEl.addEventListener('change', function() {
                var input = this;
                var file = input.files && input.files[0];
                if (!file || !currentUser) return;
                var fd = new FormData();
                fd.append('file', file);
                fetch(API_BASE_URL + '/avatar?user_id=' + currentUser.id, { method: 'POST', body: fd })
                    .then(function(r) { return r.ok ? r.json() : Promise.reject(new Error(r.statusText)); })
                    .then(function(data) {
                        currentUser.avatar_path = data.avatar_path;
                        currentUser.avatar_url = API_BASE_URL + '/media/' + data.avatar_path + '?t=' + Date.now();
                        var avatarEl = document.getElementById('profile-avatar');
                        avatarEl.innerHTML = '';
                        var img = document.createElement('img');
                        img.src = currentUser.avatar_url;
                        img.alt = 'Аватар';
                        avatarEl.appendChild(img);
                    })
                    .catch(function() { alert('Не удалось загрузить фото. Разрешены jpg, png, webp, gif (в т.ч. анимированный) до 20 МБ.'); });
                input.value = '';
            });
        }

        function getStatusList() {
            if (dreamStatusesList.length) return dreamStatusesList;
            return [
                { id: 1, code: 'planned', label_ru: 'Запланировано', icon: '💡' },
                { id: 2, code: 'in_progress', label_ru: 'В работе', icon: '☭' },
                { id: 3, code: 'done', label_ru: 'Выполнено', icon: '✅' }
            ];
        }
        function getStatusOptionsHtml(selectedStatusId) {
            var list = getStatusList();
            return list.map(function(o) {
                var label = (o.icon || '') + ' ' + (o.label_ru || o.code || '');
                return '<option value="' + o.id + '"' + (o.id === selectedStatusId ? ' selected' : '') + '>' + escapeHtml(label.trim()) + '</option>';
            }).join('');
        }
        function buildStatusPickerHtml(dreamId, selectedStatusId) {
            var list = getStatusList();
            var current = list.find(function(o) { return o.id === selectedStatusId; }) || list[0];
            var iconOnly = (current.icon || '').trim();
            var optionsHtml = list.map(function(o) {
                var label = (o.icon || '') + ' ' + (o.label_ru || o.code || '');
                return '<button type="button" class="status-picker-option" data-status-id="' + o.id + '" data-status-icon="' + escapeAttr(o.icon || '') + '">' + escapeHtml(label.trim()) + '</button>';
            }).join('');
            return '<div class="status-picker" data-dream-id="' + dreamId + '"><span class="status-picker-current" title="' + escapeAttr(current.label_ru || current.code || '') + '">' + escapeHtml(iconOnly) + '</span><div class="status-picker-dropdown">' + optionsHtml + '</div></div>';
        }
        function formatDeadlineDisplay(s) {
            var raw = (s || '').toString().trim();
            if (!raw || raw === '—') return '—';
            var m = raw.match(/^(\d{4})-(\d{2})-(\d{2})/);
            if (m) return m[3] + '.' + m[2] + '.' + m[1].slice(-2);
            return raw;
        }
        function formatTimeHM(s) {
            var raw = (s || '').toString().trim();
            if (!raw) return '';
            if (raw.indexOf('T') !== -1) raw = raw.split('T')[1] || '';
            var m = raw.match(/^(\d{2}):(\d{2})/);
            return m ? (m[1] + ':' + m[2]) : '';
        }
        function normalizeTime24Input(s) {
            var raw = (s || '').toString().trim();
            if (!raw) return '';
            var m = raw.match(/^(\d{1,2}):(\d{2})$/);
            if (!m) return null;
            var h = parseInt(m[1], 10);
            var mm = parseInt(m[2], 10);
            if (isNaN(h) || isNaN(mm) || h < 0 || h > 23 || mm < 0 || mm > 59) return null;
            return String(h).padStart(2, '0') + ':' + String(mm).padStart(2, '0');
        }
        function isoToUiDate(iso) {
            var raw = (iso || '').toString().trim();
            var m = raw.match(/^(\d{4})-(\d{2})-(\d{2})$/);
            if (!m) return '';
            return m[3] + '.' + m[2] + '.' + m[1].slice(-2);
        }
        function uiDateToIso(ui) {
            var raw = (ui || '').toString().trim();
            if (!raw) return '';
            var iso = raw.match(/^(\d{4})-(\d{2})-(\d{2})$/);
            if (iso) return iso[0];
            var m = raw.match(/^(\d{1,2})\.(\d{1,2})\.(\d{2}|\d{4})$/);
            if (!m) return null;
            var dd = parseInt(m[1], 10);
            var mm = parseInt(m[2], 10);
            var yStr = m[3];
            var yNum = parseInt(yStr, 10);
            if (isNaN(dd) || isNaN(mm) || isNaN(yNum) || mm < 1 || mm > 12 || dd < 1 || dd > 31) return null;
            var yyyy = yStr.length === 4 ? yNum : (yNum < 70 ? 2000 + yNum : 1900 + yNum);
            var dt = new Date(yyyy, mm - 1, dd);
            if (dt.getFullYear() !== yyyy || dt.getMonth() !== (mm - 1) || dt.getDate() !== dd) return null;
            return String(yyyy) + '-' + String(mm).padStart(2, '0') + '-' + String(dd).padStart(2, '0');
        }
        function isoToDate(iso) {
            var m = (iso || '').match(/^(\d{4})-(\d{2})-(\d{2})$/);
            if (!m) return null;
            var d = new Date(parseInt(m[1], 10), parseInt(m[2], 10) - 1, parseInt(m[3], 10));
            return isNaN(d.getTime()) ? null : d;
        }
        var islandDateCalPop = null;
        var islandDateCalInput = null;
        var islandDateCalViewY = 2026;
        var islandDateCalViewM = 1;
        var ISLAND_CAL_MONTH_LONG = ['Январь', 'Февраль', 'Март', 'Апрель', 'Май', 'Июнь', 'Июль', 'Август', 'Сентябрь', 'Октябрь', 'Ноябрь', 'Декабрь'];
        var ISLAND_CAL_MONTH_SHORT = ['Янв', 'Фев', 'Мар', 'Апр', 'Май', 'Июн', 'Июл', 'Авг', 'Сен', 'Окт', 'Ноя', 'Дек'];
        function islandCalEnsurePop() {
            if (!islandDateCalPop) islandDateCalPop = document.getElementById('island-date-calendar-popover');
            return islandDateCalPop;
        }
        function islandCalDaysInMonth(y, m0) {
            return new Date(y, m0 + 1, 0).getDate();
        }
        function islandCalClose() {
            var pop = islandCalEnsurePop();
            if (pop) {
                pop.classList.add('hidden');
                pop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
            }
            islandDateCalInput = null;
        }
        function islandCalPosition() {
            var pop = islandCalEnsurePop();
            var inp = islandDateCalInput;
            if (!pop || !inp || pop.classList.contains('hidden')) return;
            var r = inp.getBoundingClientRect();
            var ph = pop.offsetHeight || 270;
            var spaceBelow = window.innerHeight - r.bottom - 8;
            var below = spaceBelow >= ph || spaceBelow >= (r.top - 8);
            var top = (below && spaceBelow >= Math.min(ph, 120)) ? (r.bottom + 6) : Math.max(4, r.top - ph - 6);
            var pw = pop.offsetWidth || 300;
            var left = Math.min(Math.max(4, r.left), window.innerWidth - pw - 4);
            pop.style.left = left + 'px';
            pop.style.top = top + 'px';
        }
        function islandCalSetViewFromValue() {
            var inp = islandDateCalInput;
            if (!inp) return;
            var iso = uiDateToIso((inp.value || '').trim());
            var now = new Date();
            if (iso) {
                var q = iso.match(/^(\d{4})-(\d{2})-(\d{2})$/);
                islandDateCalViewY = parseInt(q[1], 10);
                islandDateCalViewM = parseInt(q[2], 10);
            } else {
                islandDateCalViewY = now.getFullYear();
                islandDateCalViewM = now.getMonth() + 1;
            }
        }
        function islandCalEnsureMonthOptions() {
            var sel = document.getElementById('island-cal-month');
            if (!sel) return;
            if (sel._islandMonthOptsVersion === 2) return;
            sel._islandMonthOptsVersion = 2;
            sel.innerHTML = '';
            for (var i = 1; i <= 12; i++) {
                var opt = document.createElement('option');
                opt.value = String(i);
                opt.textContent = ISLAND_CAL_MONTH_SHORT[i - 1];
                opt.title = ISLAND_CAL_MONTH_LONG[i - 1];
                sel.appendChild(opt);
            }
        }
        function islandCalSyncMonthSelect() {
            var sel = document.getElementById('island-cal-month');
            if (!sel) return;
            islandCalEnsureMonthOptions();
            sel.value = String(islandDateCalViewM);
        }
        function islandCalFillYearSelect() {
            var sel = document.getElementById('island-cal-year');
            if (!sel) return;
            var cur = new Date().getFullYear();
            var vy = islandDateCalViewY;
            var minY = Math.min(vy - 25, cur - 5);
            var maxY = Math.max(vy + 25, cur + 15);
            minY = Math.max(1980, minY);
            maxY = Math.min(2120, maxY);
            if (vy < minY) minY = vy;
            if (vy > maxY) maxY = vy;
            sel.innerHTML = '';
            for (var yr = minY; yr <= maxY; yr++) {
                var opt = document.createElement('option');
                opt.value = String(yr);
                opt.textContent = String(yr);
                sel.appendChild(opt);
            }
            sel.value = String(vy);
        }
        function islandCalRender() {
            islandCalEnsurePop();
            var grid = document.getElementById('island-cal-grid');
            if (!islandDateCalPop || !grid) return;
            var y = islandDateCalViewY;
            var m = islandDateCalViewM;
            islandCalSyncMonthSelect();
            islandCalFillYearSelect();
            var m0 = m - 1;
            var dim = islandCalDaysInMonth(y, m0);
            var first = new Date(y, m0, 1);
            var startPad = (first.getDay() + 6) % 7;
            var curIso = islandDateCalInput ? uiDateToIso((islandDateCalInput.value || '').trim()) : null;
            grid.innerHTML = '';
            var dNum = 0;
            for (var row = 0; row < 6; row++) {
                for (var col = 0; col < 7; col++) {
                    var idx = row * 7 + col;
                    var btn = document.createElement('button');
                    btn.type = 'button';
                    btn.className = 'island-cal-day';
                    if (idx < startPad || dNum >= dim) {
                        btn.classList.add('island-cal-day-empty');
                        btn.disabled = true;
                        btn.textContent = '';
                    } else {
                        dNum++;
                        btn.textContent = String(dNum);
                        var isoCell = String(y) + '-' + String(m).padStart(2, '0') + '-' + String(dNum).padStart(2, '0');
                        btn.dataset.iso = isoCell;
                        if (curIso && curIso === isoCell) btn.classList.add('island-cal-day-selected');
                        (function(isoVal) {
                            btn.addEventListener('click', function(ev) {
                                ev.preventDefault();
                                if (islandDateCalInput) {
                                    islandDateCalInput.value = isoToUiDate(isoVal);
                                    islandDateCalInput.classList.remove('island-date-field-invalid');
                                    islandCalRender();
                                }
                            });
                        })(isoCell);
                    }
                    grid.appendChild(btn);
                }
            }
        }
        function islandCalOpenForInput(inputEl) {
            islandCalEnsurePop();
            if (!islandDateCalPop) return;
            islandDateCalInput = inputEl;
            islandCalSetViewFromValue();
            islandCalRender();
            islandDateCalPop.classList.remove('hidden');
            islandDateCalPop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
            requestAnimationFrame(function() {
                islandCalPosition();
                requestAnimationFrame(islandCalPosition);
            });
        }
        function islandCalRefreshFromTyping(inputEl) {
            islandCalEnsurePop();
            if (!islandDateCalPop || islandDateCalInput !== inputEl || islandDateCalPop.classList.contains('hidden')) return;
            var iso = uiDateToIso((inputEl.value || '').trim());
            if (iso) {
                var q = iso.match(/^(\d{4})-(\d{2})-(\d{2})$/);
                islandDateCalViewY = parseInt(q[1], 10);
                islandDateCalViewM = parseInt(q[2], 10);
            } else {
                var now = new Date();
                islandDateCalViewY = now.getFullYear();
                islandDateCalViewM = now.getMonth() + 1;
            }
            islandCalRender();
            islandCalPosition();
        }
        function islandCalOnDocMouseDown(ev) {
            var pop = islandDateCalPop;
            if (!pop || pop.classList.contains('hidden')) return;
            if (islandDateCalInput && (ev.target === islandDateCalInput || islandDateCalInput.contains(ev.target))) return;
            if (pop.contains(ev.target)) return;
            if (ev.target.closest && ev.target.closest('.modal-deadline-hints')) return;
            islandCalClose();
        }
        function islandDateFieldBlur(ev) {
            var inp = ev.target;
            if (!inp || !inp.classList.contains('island-date-field')) return;
            setTimeout(function() {
                var ae = document.activeElement;
                if (islandDateCalPop && !islandDateCalPop.classList.contains('hidden') && ae && islandDateCalPop.contains(ae)) return;
                islandCalClose();
                var raw = (inp.value || '').trim();
                if (!raw) {
                    inp.classList.remove('island-date-field-invalid');
                    return;
                }
                var iso = uiDateToIso(raw);
                if (iso) {
                    inp.value = isoToUiDate(iso);
                    inp.classList.remove('island-date-field-invalid');
                } else inp.classList.add('island-date-field-invalid');
            }, 200);
        }
        function initIslandDateCalendar() {
            islandCalEnsurePop();
            if (!islandDateCalPop) return;
            var prev = document.getElementById('island-cal-prev');
            var next = document.getElementById('island-cal-next');
            if (prev && !prev._islandCalBound) {
                prev._islandCalBound = true;
                prev.addEventListener('click', function(ev) {
                    ev.preventDefault();
                    islandDateCalViewM--;
                    if (islandDateCalViewM < 1) { islandDateCalViewM = 12; islandDateCalViewY--; }
                    islandCalRender();
                    islandCalPosition();
                });
            }
            if (next && !next._islandCalBound) {
                next._islandCalBound = true;
                next.addEventListener('click', function(ev) {
                    ev.preventDefault();
                    islandDateCalViewM++;
                    if (islandDateCalViewM > 12) { islandDateCalViewM = 1; islandDateCalViewY++; }
                    islandCalRender();
                    islandCalPosition();
                });
            }
            islandCalEnsureMonthOptions();
            var monthSel = document.getElementById('island-cal-month');
            if (monthSel && !monthSel._islandCalBound) {
                monthSel._islandCalBound = true;
                monthSel.addEventListener('change', function() {
                    var v = parseInt(monthSel.value, 10);
                    if (!isNaN(v) && v >= 1 && v <= 12) {
                        islandDateCalViewM = v;
                        islandCalRender();
                        islandCalPosition();
                    }
                });
            }
            var yearSel = document.getElementById('island-cal-year');
            if (yearSel && !yearSel._islandCalBound) {
                yearSel._islandCalBound = true;
                yearSel.addEventListener('change', function() {
