                    var v = parseInt(yearSel.value, 10);
                    if (!isNaN(v)) {
                        islandDateCalViewY = v;
                        islandCalRender();
                        islandCalPosition();
                    }
                });
            }
            if (!window._islandDateGlobalListeners) {
                window._islandDateGlobalListeners = true;
                document.addEventListener('mousedown', islandCalOnDocMouseDown, true);
                window.addEventListener('resize', function() {
                    if (islandDateCalPop && !islandDateCalPop.classList.contains('hidden')) islandCalPosition();
                });
            }
            ['modal-new-dream', 'modal-edit-dream', 'modal-add-step', 'modal-add-step-finance', 'modal-step-move', 'modal-step-comment', 'modal-step-done-late'].forEach(function(mid) {
                var ov = document.getElementById(mid);
                if (ov && !ov._islandCalScroll) {
                    ov._islandCalScroll = true;
                    ov.addEventListener('scroll', function() {
                        if (islandDateCalPop && !islandDateCalPop.classList.contains('hidden')) islandCalPosition();
                    }, true);
                    var modal = ov.querySelector('.modal');
                    if (modal) modal.addEventListener('scroll', function() {
                        if (islandDateCalPop && !islandDateCalPop.classList.contains('hidden')) islandCalPosition();
                    }, true);
                }
            });
            document.querySelectorAll('.island-date-field').forEach(function(inp) {
                if (inp._islandCalInpBound) return;
                inp._islandCalInpBound = true;
                inp.addEventListener('focus', function() { islandCalOpenForInput(inp); });
                inp.addEventListener('input', function() {
                    var raw = (inp.value || '').trim();
                    if (raw && uiDateToIso(raw)) inp.classList.remove('island-date-field-invalid');
                    islandCalRefreshFromTyping(inp);
                });
                inp.addEventListener('blur', islandDateFieldBlur);
            });
        }
        function formatStepsListDayDivider(iso) {
            var m = (iso || '').toString().match(/^(\d{4})-(\d{2})-(\d{2})$/);
            if (!m) return '';
            return m[3] + '.' + m[2] + '.';
        }
        function buildStepDateTimeHtml(stepObj, opts) {
            opts = opts || {};
            var dl = formatDeadlineDisplay(stepObj && stepObj.deadline ? stepObj.deadline : '—');
            var from = formatTimeHM(stepObj && stepObj.start_time ? stepObj.start_time : '');
            var to = formatTimeHM(stepObj && stepObj.end_time ? stepObj.end_time : '');
            var timeLabel = '';
            var isPlaceholder = false;
            var timeKindClass = '';
            if (from && to) {
                timeLabel = from + '-' + to;
                timeKindClass = ' step-time-interval';
            } else if (from) {
                timeLabel = 'с ' + from;
                timeKindClass = ' step-time-single';
            } else if (to) {
                timeLabel = to;
                timeKindClass = ' step-time-single';
            } else if (opts.omitEmptyTimePlaceholder) {
                return '<span class="step-date-text">' + escapeHtml(dl) + '</span>';
            } else {
                timeLabel = 'с --:-- по --:--';
                isPlaceholder = true;
            }
            var html = '<span class="step-date-text">' + escapeHtml(dl) + '</span>';
            html += '<span class="step-time-range' + (isPlaceholder ? ' placeholder' : '') + timeKindClass + '">' + escapeHtml(timeLabel) + '</span>';
            return html;
        }
        /** Только время под названием шага (без даты дня — она в заголовке группы). */
        function buildStepTimeUnderTitleHtml(stepObj) {
            var from = formatTimeHM(stepObj && stepObj.start_time ? stepObj.start_time : '');
            var to = formatTimeHM(stepObj && stepObj.end_time ? stepObj.end_time : '');
            var timeLabel = '';
            var timeKindClass = '';
            var isPlaceholder = false;
            if (from && to) {
                timeLabel = from + '–' + to;
                timeKindClass = ' step-time-interval';
            } else if (from) {
                timeLabel = 'с ' + from;
                timeKindClass = ' step-time-single';
            } else if (to) {
                timeLabel = to;
                timeKindClass = ' step-time-single';
            } else {
                timeLabel = '—';
                isPlaceholder = true;
            }
            return '<div class="step-time-under"><span class="step-time-range' + (isPlaceholder ? ' placeholder' : '') + timeKindClass + '">' + escapeHtml(timeLabel) + '</span></div>';
        }
        function buildStepTimeInlineHtml(stepObj) {
            var from = formatTimeHM(stepObj && stepObj.start_time ? stepObj.start_time : '');
            var to = formatTimeHM(stepObj && stepObj.end_time ? stepObj.end_time : '');
            var timeLabel = '';
            var cls = '';
            if (from && to) timeLabel = from + '–' + to;
            else if (from) timeLabel = from;
            else if (to) timeLabel = to;
            else return '';
            return '<span class="step-time-inline' + cls + '">' + escapeHtml(timeLabel) + '</span>';
        }
        function formatSeriesRangeRu(fromIso, toIso) {
            function toDm(iso) {
                var m = (iso || '').toString().match(/^(\d{4})-(\d{2})-(\d{2})$/);
                if (!m) return '';
                return m[3] + '.' + m[2];
            }
            var a = toDm(fromIso), b = toDm(toIso);
            if (a && b) return a + ' по ' + b;
            return a || b || 'без даты';
        }
        function compactSeriesKeyForStep(stepObj) {
            if (stepObj && stepObj.series_id) return 'sid:' + String(stepObj.series_id);
            var t = stripStepTitleCounterSuffix(((stepObj && stepObj.title) || '').toString().trim()).toLowerCase();
            var st = ((stepObj && stepObj.start_time) || '').toString().slice(0, 5);
            var et = ((stepObj && stepObj.end_time) || '').toString().slice(0, 5);
            return 'f:' + t + '|' + st + '|' + et;
        }
        function buildDreamCompactSeriesData(sortedSteps, dreamId) {
            var map = {};
            var list = [];
            (sortedSteps || []).forEach(function(s) {
                if (!s || s.deleted) return;
                normalizeStepForUi(s);
                var key = compactSeriesKeyForStep(s);
                var g = map[key];
                if (!g) {
                    g = {
                        key: key,
                        title: (s.title || '').toString().trim(),
                        start_time: s.start_time || null,
                        end_time: s.end_time || null,
                        dream_id: s.dream_id || dreamId || null,
                        series_id: s.series_id || null,
                        firstStep: s,
                        steps: [],
                        minDate: null,
                        maxDate: null,
                        total: 0,
                        completedCount: 0,
                        waivedCount: 0,
                        overdueCount: 0
                    };
                    map[key] = g;
                    list.push(g);
                }
                g.steps.push(s);
                g.total += 1;
                if (s.completed) g.completedCount += 1;
                if (s.waived) g.waivedCount += 1;
                if (stepIsOverdueUtc(s) && !s.completed && !s.waived) g.overdueCount += 1;
                var d = (s.deadline || '').toString().slice(0, 10);
                if (/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/.test(d)) {
                    if (!g.minDate || d < g.minDate) g.minDate = d;
                    if (!g.maxDate || d > g.maxDate) g.maxDate = d;
                }
            });
            list.forEach(function(g) {
                var icon = '◻';
                if (g.waivedCount === g.total) icon = '−';
                else if (g.completedCount === g.total) icon = '✓';
                else if (g.overdueCount > 0) icon = '⏰';
                g.qualityIcon = icon;
                g.rangeLabel = formatSeriesRangeRu(g.minDate, g.maxDate);
            });
            list.sort(function(a, b) {
                var ad = a.minDate || '9999-12-31';
                var bd = b.minDate || '9999-12-31';
                if (ad !== bd) return ad.localeCompare(bd);
                return String(a.title || '').localeCompare(String(b.title || ''), 'ru');
            });
            return list;
        }
        function buildCompactSeriesStepView(seriesObj) {
            return {
                id: seriesObj.firstStep && seriesObj.firstStep.id,
                dream_id: seriesObj.dream_id,
                title: seriesObj.title || 'Шаг',
                completed: seriesObj.completedCount === seriesObj.total,
                waived: seriesObj.waivedCount === seriesObj.total,
                completed_late: false,
                start_time: seriesObj.start_time || null,
                end_time: seriesObj.end_time || null,
                deadline: seriesObj.maxDate || null,
                series_range_label: seriesObj.rangeLabel,
                series_quality_icon: seriesObj.qualityIcon,
                series_count_label: String(seriesObj.total),
                series_overdue_count: seriesObj.overdueCount
            };
        }
        function compactSeriesBulkTargetSteps(seriesObj, action) {
            var all = (seriesObj && seriesObj.steps) ? seriesObj.steps.slice() : [];
            if (action === 'done_on' || action === 'waive_on') {
                return all.filter(function(st) {
                    normalizeStepForUi(st);
                    return stepIsOverdueUtc(st) && !st.completed && !st.waived;
                });
            }
            return all;
        }
        function doCompactSeriesBulkAction(seriesObj, action, dreamId) {
            if (!seriesObj || !seriesObj.steps || !seriesObj.steps.length) return Promise.resolve();
            var steps = (action === 'done_on' || action === 'waive_on')
                ? compactSeriesBulkTargetSteps(seriesObj, action)
                : seriesObj.steps.slice();
            if ((action === 'done_on' || action === 'waive_on') && !steps.length) return Promise.resolve();
            if (action === 'done_on' || action === 'done_off') {
                return Promise.all(steps.map(function(st) {
                    var did = st.dream_id || seriesObj.dream_id || dreamId;
                    return saveStepCompleted(did, st.id, action === 'done_on').then(function() {
                        st.completed = action === 'done_on';
                        if (action === 'done_on') st.waived = false;
                    });
                }));
            }
            if (action === 'waive_on' || action === 'waive_off') {
                return Promise.all(steps.map(function(st) {
                    var did = st.dream_id || seriesObj.dream_id || dreamId;
                    return patchStep(did, st.id, { waived: action === 'waive_on' }).then(function() {
                        st.waived = action === 'waive_on';
                        if (action === 'waive_on') st.completed = false;
                    });
                }));
            }
            if (action === 'delete_on') {
                return Promise.all(steps.map(function(st) {
                    var did = st.dream_id || seriesObj.dream_id || dreamId;
                    return patchStep(did, st.id, { deleted: true }).then(function() {
                        st.deleted = true;
                    });
                }));
            }
            return Promise.resolve();
        }
        function buildDreamStepsCompactHtml(dreamId, sortedSteps, titleCounterMap, opts) {
            var series = buildDreamCompactSeriesData(sortedSteps || [], dreamId);
            if (!series.length) return '';
            var html = '';
            series.forEach(function(g) {
                var v = buildCompactSeriesStepView(g);
                var rowClass = 'step-item-plain step-unified-line step-compact-series-row';
                html += '<div class="' + rowClass + '" data-dream-id="' + dreamId + '" data-series-key="' + escapeAttr(g.key) + '" data-step-id="' + v.id + '">' + buildUnifiedStepRowHtml(dreamId, v, {}, opts) + '</div>';
            });
            return html;
        }
        /**
         * Единая разметка строки шага (эталон temp). opts: canManage, isReadOnly, useAccordionDelete, omitRight (buddy view).
         */
        function buildUnifiedStepRowHtml(dreamId, s, titleCounterMap, opts) {
            opts = opts || {};
            var canManage = !!opts.canManage;
            var isReadOnly = !!opts.isReadOnly;
            var omitRight = !!opts.omitRight;
            var compactSeries = !!opts.compactSeries;
            var isDreamStepsContext = !!opts.useAccordionDelete || compactSeries;
            var seriesOd = (compactSeries && typeof s.series_overdue_count === 'number') ? s.series_overdue_count : null;
            var hideSeriesBulkDoneWaive = compactSeries && seriesOd !== null && seriesOd === 0 && !s.completed && !s.waived;
            var fin = !!s.isFinStep;
            var displayTitle = stepTitleWithCounter(s, titleCounterMap || {});
            var overdue = stepIsOverdueUtc(s);
            var badges = '';
            if (compactSeries && typeof s.series_overdue_count === 'number' && s.series_overdue_count > 0) {
                badges += '<span class="step-badge step-badge-overdue">просрочено ' + escapeHtml(String(s.series_overdue_count)) + '</span>';
            } else if (!compactSeries && overdue && !s.completed && !s.waived) {
                badges += '<span class="step-badge step-badge-overdue">просрочен</span>';
            }
            if (isDreamStepsContext && s.completed) badges += '<span class="step-badge step-badge-completed">выполнено</span>';
            if (s.waived) badges += '<span class="step-badge step-badge-waived">не выполнен</span>';
            if (s.completed && s.completed_late) badges += '<span class="step-badge step-badge-late">с опозданием</span>';
            var seriesPrefix = s.series_quality_icon ? '<span class="step-series-quality" title="Состояние серии">' + escapeHtml(s.series_quality_icon) + '</span>' : '';
            var seriesRange = s.series_range_label ? '<span class="step-series-range" title="Интервал серии">' + escapeHtml(s.series_range_label) + '</span>' : '';
            var seriesCount = s.series_count_label ? '<span class="step-series-count" title="Количество шагов в серии">(' + escapeHtml(String(s.series_count_label)) + ')</span>' : '';
            var left = '';
            var right = '';
            var mobileItems = [];
            var innerExtraClass = '';
            if (!isReadOnly && canManage) {
                if (compactSeries && !omitRight && !fin) {
                    innerExtraClass = ' step-compact-series-inner';
                    var doneOnC = s.completed ? ' step-done-on' : '';
                    if (s.completed) doneOnC += ' step-done-locked';
                    var doneDisC = s.waived ? ' disabled' : '';
                    if (s.completed) doneDisC = ' disabled';
                    var doneTitleC = 'Выполнено';
                    if (seriesOd !== null && seriesOd > 0 && !s.completed && !s.waived)
                        doneTitleC = overdueSeriesMarkDoneTitleRu(seriesOd);
                    if (s.completed) doneTitleC = 'Серия шагов уже выполнена';
                    if (!hideSeriesBulkDoneWaive || s.completed) {
                        right += '<button type="button" class="step-done-btn' + doneOnC + '" title="' + escapeAttr(doneTitleC) + '"' + doneDisC + '>✓</button>';
                        var doneML = (seriesOd !== null && seriesOd > 0 && !s.completed && !s.waived) ? 'Выполнить просроченные' : 'Выполнил';
                        if (s.completed) doneML = 'Серия уже выполнена';
                        mobileItems.push('<button type="button" class="step-mobile-action step-mobile-action-done" data-action="done"' + (s.completed ? ' disabled title="' + escapeAttr('Серия шагов уже выполнена') + '"' : '') + '><span class="step-mobile-action-icon">✓</span><span>' + escapeHtml(doneML) + '</span></button>');
                    }
                    if (!s.completed && !s.waived) {
                        if (!hideSeriesBulkDoneWaive) {
                            var wtitleC = (seriesOd !== null && seriesOd > 0) ? overdueSeriesMarkWaiveTitleRu(seriesOd) : 'Не выполнен';
                            right += '<button type="button" class="step-waived-btn" title="' + escapeAttr(wtitleC) + '">−</button>';
                        }
                        right += '<button type="button" class="step-comment-btn" title="Комментарий в дневник">💬</button>';
                        if (!hideSeriesBulkDoneWaive) {
                            var wML = (seriesOd !== null && seriesOd > 0) ? 'Не выполнил просроченные' : 'Не выполнил';
                            mobileItems.push('<button type="button" class="step-mobile-action step-mobile-action-waived" data-action="waived"><span class="step-mobile-action-icon">−</span><span>' + escapeHtml(wML) + '</span></button>');
                        }
                        mobileItems.push('<button type="button" class="step-mobile-action step-mobile-action-comment" data-action="comment"><span class="step-mobile-action-icon">💬</span><span>Прокомментировать</span></button>');
                    } else if (s.waived) {
                        right += '<button type="button" class="step-waived-clear" title="Снять отметку «не выполнен»">↩</button>';
                        mobileItems.push('<button type="button" class="step-mobile-action step-mobile-action-waived-clear" data-action="waived-clear"><span class="step-mobile-action-icon">↩</span><span>Снять «не выполнил»</span></button>');
                    }
                    right += '<button type="button" class="step-edit" title="Редактировать">✏️</button>';
                    right += '<button type="button" class="step-series-remove" title="Убрать шаги серии из расписания">✕</button>';
                    mobileItems.push('<button type="button" class="step-mobile-action step-mobile-action-edit" data-action="edit"><span class="step-mobile-action-icon">✏️</span><span>Редактировать</span></button>');
                    mobileItems.push('<button type="button" class="step-mobile-action step-mobile-action-series-remove" data-action="series-remove"><span class="step-mobile-action-icon">✕</span><span>Убрать из расписания…</span></button>');
                } else {
                    var doneOn = s.completed ? ' step-done-on' : '';
                    if (isDreamStepsContext && s.completed) doneOn += ' step-done-locked';
                    var doneDis = (!fin && s.waived) ? ' disabled' : '';
                    if (isDreamStepsContext && s.completed && !fin) doneDis = ' disabled';
                    var doneTitle = 'Выполнено';
                    if (compactSeries && seriesOd !== null && seriesOd > 0 && !s.completed && !s.waived)
                        doneTitle = overdueSeriesMarkDoneTitleRu(seriesOd);
                    if (isDreamStepsContext && s.completed) doneTitle = 'Шаг уже выполнен';
                    if (!hideSeriesBulkDoneWaive || s.completed) {
                        left += '<button type="button" class="step-done-btn' + doneOn + '" title="' + escapeAttr(doneTitle) + '"' + doneDis + '>✓</button>';
                        var doneMobileLabel = (compactSeries && seriesOd !== null && seriesOd > 0 && !s.completed && !s.waived) ? 'Выполнить просроченные' : 'Выполнил';
                        if (isDreamStepsContext && s.completed) doneMobileLabel = 'Шаг уже выполнен';
                        mobileItems.push('<button type="button" class="step-mobile-action step-mobile-action-done" data-action="done"' + (isDreamStepsContext && s.completed && !fin ? ' disabled title="' + escapeAttr('Шаг уже выполнен') + '"' : '') + '><span class="step-mobile-action-icon">✓</span><span>' + escapeHtml(doneMobileLabel) + '</span></button>');
                    } else {
                        left += '<span class="step-waived-spacer" aria-hidden="true" style="display:inline-block;width:1.75em;height:1px;"></span>';
                    }
                    if (!fin) {
                        if (!s.completed && !s.waived) {
                            if (!hideSeriesBulkDoneWaive) {
                                var wtitle = (compactSeries && seriesOd !== null && seriesOd > 0) ? overdueSeriesMarkWaiveTitleRu(seriesOd) : 'Не выполнен';
                                left += '<button type="button" class="step-waived-btn" title="' + escapeAttr(wtitle) + '">−</button>';
                            } else {
                                left += '<span class="step-waived-spacer" aria-hidden="true" style="display:inline-block;width:1.75em;height:1px;"></span>';
                            }
                        } else if (s.waived)
                            left += '<button type="button" class="step-waived-clear" title="Снять отметку «не выполнен»">↩</button>';
                        else
                            left += '<span class="step-waived-spacer" style="display:inline-block;width:1.75em;height:1px;"></span>';
                        if (!s.completed && !s.waived)
                            left += '<button type="button" class="step-comment-btn" title="Комментарий в дневник">💬</button>';
                        else
                            left += '<span class="step-comment-spacer" style="display:inline-block;width:1.75em;height:1px;"></span>';
                        if (!s.completed && !s.waived) {
                            if (!hideSeriesBulkDoneWaive) {
                                var waiveMobileLabel = (compactSeries && seriesOd !== null && seriesOd > 0) ? 'Не выполнил просроченные' : 'Не выполнил';
                                mobileItems.push('<button type="button" class="step-mobile-action step-mobile-action-waived" data-action="waived"><span class="step-mobile-action-icon">−</span><span>' + escapeHtml(waiveMobileLabel) + '</span></button>');
                            }
                            mobileItems.push('<button type="button" class="step-mobile-action step-mobile-action-comment" data-action="comment"><span class="step-mobile-action-icon">💬</span><span>Прокомментировать</span></button>');
                        } else if (s.waived) {
                            mobileItems.push('<button type="button" class="step-mobile-action step-mobile-action-waived-clear" data-action="waived-clear"><span class="step-mobile-action-icon">↩</span><span>Снять «не выполнил»</span></button>');
                        }
                    }
                    if (!omitRight && !fin) {
                        if (!compactSeries) right += '<button type="button" class="step-move-btn" title="Перенос даты">⇢</button>';
                        right += '<button type="button" class="step-edit" title="Редактировать">✏️</button>';
                        right += '<button type="button" class="step-delete" title="Удалить">🗑️</button>';
                        if (!compactSeries) mobileItems.push('<button type="button" class="step-mobile-action step-mobile-action-move" data-action="move"><span class="step-mobile-action-icon">⇢</span><span>Перенести</span></button>');
                        mobileItems.push('<button type="button" class="step-mobile-action step-mobile-action-edit" data-action="edit"><span class="step-mobile-action-icon">✏️</span><span>Редактировать</span></button>');
                        mobileItems.push('<button type="button" class="step-mobile-action step-mobile-action-delete" data-action="delete"><span class="step-mobile-action-icon">🗑️</span><span>Удалить</span></button>');
                    } else if (!omitRight && fin) {
                        right += '<button type="button" class="step-edit" title="Редактировать">✏️</button>';
                        right += '<button type="button" class="step-delete" title="Удалить">🗑️</button>';
                        mobileItems.push('<button type="button" class="step-mobile-action step-mobile-action-edit" data-action="edit"><span class="step-mobile-action-icon">✏️</span><span>Редактировать</span></button>');
                        mobileItems.push('<button type="button" class="step-mobile-action step-mobile-action-delete" data-action="delete"><span class="step-mobile-action-icon">🗑️</span><span>Удалить</span></button>');
                    }
                }
            }
            var inlineTime = buildStepTimeInlineHtml(s);
            var main = '<span class="step-title-wrap">' + inlineTime + seriesPrefix + '<span class="step-title-text">' + escapeHtml(displayTitle) + '</span>' + seriesCount + badges + seriesRange + '</span>';
            var mobileMenu = '';
            if (!isReadOnly && canManage && mobileItems.length) {
                mobileMenu = '<div class="step-mobile-menu-wrap">' +
                    '<button type="button" class="step-mobile-menu-toggle" aria-expanded="false" title="Действия шага">⋮</button>' +
                    '<div class="step-mobile-menu">' + mobileItems.join('') + '</div>' +
                    '</div>';
            }
            return '<div class="step-unified-inner' + innerExtraClass + '">' +
                '<div class="step-actions-left">' + left + '</div>' +
                '<div class="step-main-col">' + main + '</div>' +
                '<div class="step-actions-right">' + right + '</div>' +
                mobileMenu +
                '</div>';
        }
        function wireUnifiedStepRow(el, dreamId, s, opts) {
            opts = opts || {};
            var canManage = !!opts.canManage;
            var isReadOnly = !!opts.isReadOnly;
            var onRefresh = opts.onRefresh || function() {};
            var useAccordionDelete = !!opts.useAccordionDelete;
            if (isReadOnly || !canManage) return;
            var toggle = el.querySelector('.step-mobile-menu-toggle');
            var closeMobileMenu = function() {
                el.classList.remove('step-mobile-menu-open');
                if (toggle) toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
            };
            if (toggle) {
                toggle.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    var wasOpen = el.classList.contains('step-mobile-menu-open');
                    document.querySelectorAll('.step-unified-inner.step-mobile-menu-open').forEach(function(openEl) {
                        openEl.classList.remove('step-mobile-menu-open');
                        var openToggle = openEl.querySelector('.step-mobile-menu-toggle');
                        if (openToggle) openToggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
                    });
                    if (!wasOpen) {
                        el.classList.add('step-mobile-menu-open');
                        toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
                    } else {
                        toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
                    }
                });
            }
            if (!window._stepMobileMenuGlobalBind) {
                window._stepMobileMenuGlobalBind = true;
                document.addEventListener('click', function(ev) {
                    if (ev.target.closest('.step-mobile-menu-wrap')) return;
                    document.querySelectorAll('.step-unified-inner.step-mobile-menu-open').forEach(function(openEl) {
                        openEl.classList.remove('step-mobile-menu-open');
                        var t = openEl.querySelector('.step-mobile-menu-toggle');
                        if (t) t.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
                    });
                });
            }
            var fin = !!s.isFinStep;
            var doneBtn = el.querySelector('.step-done-btn');
            var bindStepAction = function(selector, handler) {
                el.querySelectorAll(selector).forEach(function(btn) {
                    btn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                        closeMobileMenu();
                        handler.call(btn, e);
                    });
                });
            };
            bindStepAction('.step-done-btn, .step-mobile-action-done', function(e) {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    if (this.disabled) return;
                    if (useAccordionDelete && !fin && s.completed) return;
                    if (fin) {
                        if (!s.completed) openFinStepConfirmModal(s, null, doneBtn);
                        else {
                            saveStepCompleted(dreamId, s.id, false).then(function() {
                                s.completed = false;
                                doneBtn.classList.remove('step-done-on');
                                onRefresh();
                            }).catch(function() {});
                        }
                        return;
                    }
                    if (s.completed) {
                        saveStepCompleted(dreamId, s.id, false).then(function() {
                            s.completed = false;
                            doneBtn.classList.remove('step-done-on');
                            onRefresh();
                        }).catch(function() {});
                        return;
                    }
                    if (stepIsOverdueUtc(s)) {
                        openStepDoneLateModal(dreamId, s.id, doneBtn);
                        return;
                    }
                    saveStepCompleted(dreamId, s.id, true).then(function() {
                        s.completed = true;
                        doneBtn.classList.add('step-done-on');
                        onRefresh();
                    }).catch(function() {});
            });
            bindStepAction('.step-waived-btn, .step-mobile-action-waived', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); openStepWaivedModal(dreamId, s.id); });
            bindStepAction('.step-waived-clear, .step-mobile-action-waived-clear', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();
                patchStep(dreamId, s.id, { waived: false }).then(function() {
                    s.waived = false;
                    onRefresh();
                }).catch(function() { alert('Не удалось снять отметку'); });
            });
            bindStepAction('.step-comment-btn, .step-mobile-action-comment', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); openStepCommentModal(dreamId, s.id); });
            bindStepAction('.step-move-btn, .step-mobile-action-move', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); openStepMoveModal(dreamId, s.id, s.deadline); });
            bindStepAction('.step-edit, .step-mobile-action-edit', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();
                e.stopPropagation();
                openEditStepModal({ dream_id: dreamId, id: s.id, title: s.title, deadline: s.deadline, start_time: s.start_time, end_time: s.end_time, series_id: s.series_id, series_index: s.series_index, series_total: s.series_total });
            });
            bindStepAction('.step-delete, .step-mobile-action-delete', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();
                e.stopPropagation();
                if (useAccordionDelete) deleteStepFromAccordion(dreamId, s.id);
                else setStepDeleted(dreamId, s.id, true);
            });
        }
        function normalizeStepForUi(s) {
            if (!s) return s;
            if (s.waived === undefined) s.waived = false;
            if (s.completed_late === undefined) s.completed_late = false;
            return s;
        }
        /** HTML блока шагов с заголовками дней (для аккордеонов и карточек, не для ul.steps-list-plain). */
        function buildDreamStepsListGroupedHtml(dreamId, sortedSteps, titleCounterMap, opts) {
            if (!sortedSteps || !sortedSteps.length) return '';
            var html = '';
            var lastDividerIso = null;
            sortedSteps.forEach(function(raw) {
                var s = raw;
                normalizeStepForUi(s);
                var dayKey = (s.deadline || '').toString().slice(0, 10);
                if (/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/.test(dayKey) && dayKey !== lastDividerIso) {
                    html += '<div class="step-day-divider" role="separator">' + escapeHtml(formatStepsListDayDivider(dayKey)) + '</div>';
                    lastDividerIso = dayKey;
                }
                var rowClass = 'step-item-plain step-unified-line' + (s.completed ? ' completed' : '') + (s.waived ? ' step-waived' : '');
                html += '<div class="' + rowClass + '" data-dream-id="' + dreamId + '" data-step-id="' + s.id + '">' + buildUnifiedStepRowHtml(dreamId, s, titleCounterMap, opts) + '</div>';
            });
            return html;
        }
        function wireDreamStepsList(listRoot, dreamId, stepsArray, opts) {
            if (!listRoot) return;
            listRoot.querySelectorAll('.step-unified-line').forEach(function(row) {
                var sid = parseInt(row.dataset.stepId, 10);
                var s = (stepsArray || []).find(function(x) { return Number(x.id) === sid; });
                if (!s) return;
                normalizeStepForUi(s);
                var inner = row.querySelector('.step-unified-inner');
                if (inner) wireUnifiedStepRow(inner, dreamId, s, opts);
            });
        }
        function wireDreamStepsCompact(listRoot, dreamId, stepsArray, opts) {
            if (!listRoot) return;
            opts = opts || {};
            var canManage = !!opts.canManage;
            var isReadOnly = !!opts.isReadOnly;
            var onRefresh = opts.onRefresh || function() {};
            if (isReadOnly || !canManage) return;
            if (!window._stepMobileMenuGlobalBind) {
                window._stepMobileMenuGlobalBind = true;
                document.addEventListener('click', function(ev) {
                    if (ev.target.closest('.step-mobile-menu-wrap')) return;
                    document.querySelectorAll('.step-unified-inner.step-mobile-menu-open').forEach(function(openEl) {
                        openEl.classList.remove('step-mobile-menu-open');
                        var t = openEl.querySelector('.step-mobile-menu-toggle');
                        if (t) t.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
                    });
                });
            }
            var series = buildDreamCompactSeriesData(stepsArray || [], dreamId);
            var byKey = {};
            series.forEach(function(g) { byKey[g.key] = g; });
            listRoot.querySelectorAll('.step-compact-series-row').forEach(function(row) {
                var key = row.dataset.seriesKey || '';
                var g = byKey[key];
                if (!g) return;
                var viewStep = buildCompactSeriesStepView(g);
                var inner = row.querySelector('.step-unified-inner');
                if (!inner) return;
                var confirmRun = function(text, action) {
                    openStepSeriesConfirmModal(text, function() {
                        doCompactSeriesBulkAction(g, action, dreamId).then(function() { onRefresh(); }).catch(function() { alert('Не удалось сохранить серию'); });
                    });
                };
                var doneBtn = inner.querySelector('.step-done-btn');
                if (doneBtn && !viewStep.completed) doneBtn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    if (g.overdueCount > 0) confirmRun('Отметить выполненными ' + overdueStepsPhraseRu(g.overdueCount) + ' серии «' + (g.title || '') + '»?', 'done_on');
                });
                var wbtn = inner.querySelector('.step-waived-btn');
                if (wbtn) wbtn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    if (g.overdueCount > 0) confirmRun('Отметить ' + overdueStepsPhraseRu(g.overdueCount) + ' серии «' + (g.title || '') + '» как не выполненные?', 'waive_on');
                });
                var wclr = inner.querySelector('.step-waived-clear');
                if (wclr) wclr.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    confirmRun('Снять отметку «не выполнен» со всей серии «' + (g.title || '') + '»?', 'waive_off');
                });
                var cbtn = inner.querySelector('.step-comment-btn');
                if (cbtn) cbtn.addEventListener('click', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); openStepCommentModal(dreamId, g.firstStep.id); });
                var ebtn = inner.querySelector('.step-edit');
                if (ebtn) ebtn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    var st = g.firstStep;
                    var did = st.dream_id != null ? st.dream_id : (g.dream_id != null ? g.dream_id : dreamId);
                    openEditStepModal(Object.assign({}, st, { dream_id: did, _seriesSteps: g.steps }));
                });
                var xbtn = inner.querySelector('.step-series-remove');
                if (xbtn) xbtn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    openStepSeriesDeleteModal(g, dreamId, onRefresh);
                });
                inner.querySelectorAll('.step-mobile-action-done').forEach(function(btn) {
                    btn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                        e.preventDefault();
                        if (btn.disabled) return;
                        if (doneBtn && !doneBtn.disabled) doneBtn.click();
                    });
                });
                inner.querySelectorAll('.step-mobile-action-waived').forEach(function(btn) {
                    btn.addEventListener('click', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); wbtn && wbtn.click(); });
                });
                inner.querySelectorAll('.step-mobile-action-waived-clear').forEach(function(btn) {
                    btn.addEventListener('click', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); wclr && wclr.click(); });
                });
                inner.querySelectorAll('.step-mobile-action-comment').forEach(function(btn) {
                    btn.addEventListener('click', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); cbtn && cbtn.click(); });
                });
                inner.querySelectorAll('.step-mobile-action-edit').forEach(function(btn) {
                    btn.addEventListener('click', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); ebtn && ebtn.click(); });
                });
                inner.querySelectorAll('.step-mobile-action-series-remove').forEach(function(btn) {
                    btn.addEventListener('click', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); xbtn && xbtn.click(); });
                });
                var toggle = inner.querySelector('.step-mobile-menu-toggle');
                if (toggle) {
                    toggle.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                        e.preventDefault();
                        e.stopPropagation();
                        var wasOpen = inner.classList.contains('step-mobile-menu-open');
                        document.querySelectorAll('.step-unified-inner.step-mobile-menu-open').forEach(function(openEl) {
                            openEl.classList.remove('step-mobile-menu-open');
                            var openToggle = openEl.querySelector('.step-mobile-menu-toggle');
                            if (openToggle) openToggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
                        });
                        if (!wasOpen) {
                            inner.classList.add('step-mobile-menu-open');
                            toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
                        } else {
                            toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
                        }
                    });
                }
            });
        }
        function formatMoney(n) {
            if (n == null || isNaN(n)) return '—';
            return Math.round(Number(n)).toLocaleString('ru-RU');
        }
        function getFinResultText(plan, fact) {
            if (plan == null || plan === '' || isNaN(plan)) return '—';
            var p = Number(plan);
            var f = fact == null || fact === '' ? 0 : Number(fact);
            if (isNaN(f)) f = 0;
            if (f > p) return 'Профицит ' + formatMoney(f - p) + ' ₽';
            if (f < p) return 'Нужно ещё ' + formatMoney(p - f) + ' ₽';
            return 'По плану';
        }
        function getFinResultClass(plan, fact) {
            if (plan == null || isNaN(plan)) return '';
            var f = fact == null || fact === '' ? 0 : Number(fact);
            if (isNaN(f)) f = 0;
            if (f > plan) return 'surplus';
            if (f < plan) return 'deficit';
            return 'ok';
        }
        function getFinResultTextForMonth(plan, fact, cumPlan, cumFact, totalGoal, isCurrentMonth, isFutureMonth) {
            if (isFutureMonth) return '';
            if (isCurrentMonth) {
                if (cumFact < cumPlan) return 'Внеси ' + Math.round((cumPlan - cumFact) / 1000) + ' т.р.';
                if (cumFact > cumPlan) return 'Профицит ' + Math.round((cumFact - cumPlan) / 1000) + ' т.р.';
                return 'По плану';
            }
            /* Прошедшие месяцы: по накопительному итогу к концу того месяца */
            if (cumFact < cumPlan) return 'Нужно ещё ' + Math.round(cumPlan / 1000) + ' т.р.';
            if (cumFact > cumPlan) return 'Профицит ' + Math.round((cumFact - cumPlan) / 1000) + ' т.р.';
            return 'По плану';
        }
        function dreamStepProgressMeta(d) {
            var steps = (d && d.steps) ? d.steps.filter(function(s) { return s && !s.deleted; }) : [];
            var total = steps.length;
            var done = steps.filter(function(s) { return s.completed; }).length;
            var pct = total > 0 ? Math.min(100, (done / total) * 100) : 0;
            return { done: done, total: total, pct: pct };
        }
        function buildDreamStepsLabel(d) {
            var m = dreamStepProgressMeta(d);
            return m.total > 0 ? (m.done + '/' + m.total) : '0';
        }
        function buildDreamStepsCellTitle(d) {
            var m = dreamStepProgressMeta(d);
            return 'Выполнено шагов: ' + m.done + (m.total > 0 ? (' из ' + m.total) : ' (шаги не заданы)');
        }
        function buildDreamStepsCellStyle(d) {
            var m = dreamStepProgressMeta(d);
            return 'background: linear-gradient(90deg, #dbeafe 0%, #dbeafe ' + m.pct + '%, #f1f5f9 ' + m.pct + '%, #f1f5f9 100%)';
        }
        function buildDreamStepProgressInlineHtml(d) {
            var t = buildDreamStepsCellTitle(d);
            return '<div class="dream-step-inline" style="' + buildDreamStepsCellStyle(d) + '" title="' + escapeAttr(t) + '">' + buildDreamStepsLabel(d) + '</div>';
        }
        function renderDreamsTable(dreams) {
            const tbodyEl = document.getElementById('dreams-tbody');
            if (!tbodyEl) return;
            tbodyEl.innerHTML = '';
            dreams.forEach(function(d, i) {
                const text = typeof d === 'string' ? d : (d.title || d.dream || '').trim() || '—';
                const statusId = d.status_id != null ? d.status_id : (d.status_obj && d.status_obj.id) || 1;
                const deadline = formatDeadlineDisplay((d.deadline || '').toString().slice(0, 10) || '');
                const dreamId = d.id;
                const price = d.price != null && d.price !== '' ? (Math.round(Number(d.price))).toLocaleString('ru-RU') : '—';
                const tr = document.createElement('tr');
                tr.className = 'dream-row';
                tr.dataset.dreamId = dreamId;
                var isPublic = d.is_public !== false;
                var eyeIcon = isPublic ? '👁️' : '🙈';
                var eyeTitle = isPublic ? 'Открытая (в витрине). Клик — сделать приватной' : 'Приватная (анонимно). Клик — открыть';
                var ownerId = (dreamEditContext.ownerId != null && dreamEditContext.ownerId !== 0) ? dreamEditContext.ownerId : (currentUser && currentUser.id);
                tr.innerHTML = '<td class="dream-num-td">' + (i + 1) + '</td><td class="dream-steps-td" style="' + buildDreamStepsCellStyle(d) + '" title="' + escapeAttr(buildDreamStepsCellTitle(d)) + '">' + buildDreamStepsLabel(d) + '</td><td class="dream-text" data-dream-id="' + dreamId + '">' + escapeHtml(text) + '</td><td class="dream-deadline" data-dream-id="' + dreamId + '">' + escapeHtml(deadline) + '</td><td class="dream-price" data-dream-id="' + dreamId + '">' + escapeHtml(price) + '</td><td class="dream-status-cell" data-dream-id="' + dreamId + '"><div class="dream-status-cell-inner"><button type="button" class="dream-eye" data-dream-id="' + dreamId + '" data-public="' + (isPublic ? '1' : '0') + '" data-owner-id="' + (ownerId || '') + '" title="' + escapeAttr(eyeTitle) + '" aria-label="Приватность">' + eyeIcon + '</button>' + buildStatusPickerHtml(dreamId, statusId) + '<button type="button" class="dream-edit-btn" title="Редактирование">✏️</button></div></td>';
                tbodyEl.appendChild(tr);
                tr.querySelector('.dream-edit-btn').addEventListener('click', function(ev) { ev.stopPropagation(); openEditDreamModal(d); });
                var eyeBtn = tr.querySelector('.dream-eye');
                eyeBtn.addEventListener('click', function(ev) {
                    ev.preventDefault();
                    ev.stopPropagation();
                    var nowPublic = this.getAttribute('data-public') === '1';
                    var oid = this.getAttribute('data-owner-id');
                    saveDreamPrivacy(dreamId, !nowPublic, oid ? parseInt(oid, 10) : undefined);
                });
                var picker = tr.querySelector('.status-picker');
                var currentSpan = picker.querySelector('.status-picker-current');
                var dropdown = picker.querySelector('.status-picker-dropdown');
                currentSpan.addEventListener('click', function(ev) { ev.stopPropagation(); dropdown.classList.toggle('open'); });
                picker.querySelectorAll('.status-picker-option').forEach(function(btn) {
                    btn.addEventListener('click', function(ev) {
                        ev.stopPropagation();
                        var id = parseInt(btn.dataset.statusId, 10);
                        var icon = btn.dataset.statusIcon || '';
                        var label = btn.dataset.statusLabel || btn.textContent.trim();
                        currentSpan.textContent = icon;
                        currentSpan.title = (icon + ' ' + label).trim() || 'Статус';
                        dropdown.classList.remove('open');
                        saveDreamStatus(dreamId, id);
                    });
                });
                tr.addEventListener('click', function(ev) { if (!ev.target.closest('.status-picker') && !ev.target.closest('.dream-edit-btn') && !ev.target.closest('input')) toggleAccordion(dreamId); });
                var accTr = document.createElement('tr');
                accTr.className = 'accordion-row hidden';
                accTr.id = 'accordion-' + dreamId;
                accTr.dataset.dreamId = dreamId;
                var steps = sortStepsByDeadline((d.steps || []).filter(function(s) { return !s.deleted; }));
                var isFinanceCategory = !!(d.category_obj && d.category_obj.code === 'finance');
                var isFinGoal = ENABLE_SPECIAL_STEPS_BOOKS_FINANCE && (
                    (steps.length > 0 && steps[0].plan_amount != null) ||
                    (isFinanceCategory && steps.length >= 12)
                );
                var showAddStepBtn = !isFinGoal || (isFinanceCategory && steps.length < 12);
                var defaultPlan = 17000;
                var titleCounterMap = buildStepTitleCounterMap(steps);
                var stepsContent = '';
                if (isFinGoal) {
                    var currentMonth0 = new Date().getMonth();
                    var totalGoal = (d.price != null && d.price > 0) ? Number(d.price) : (steps.length * defaultPlan);
                    var totalGoalTh = Math.round(totalGoal / 1000);
                    var cumPlan = 0, cumFact = 0;
                    var rows = steps.map(function(s, idx) {
                        var plan = s.plan_amount != null ? s.plan_amount : defaultPlan;
                        var fact = s.fact_amount != null ? s.fact_amount : '';
                        var factNum = (fact === '' || fact == null) ? 0 : (typeof fact === 'number' ? fact : parseFloat(String(fact)));
                        if (isNaN(factNum)) factNum = 0;
                        cumPlan += plan;
                        cumFact += factNum;
                        var isCurrentMonth = (idx === currentMonth0);
                        var isFutureMonth = (idx > currentMonth0);
                        var resultText = getFinResultTextForMonth(plan, fact, cumPlan, cumFact, totalGoal, isCurrentMonth, isFutureMonth);
                        var resultClass = isFutureMonth ? '' : (isCurrentMonth ? getFinResultClass(cumPlan, cumFact) : 'past');
                        var sumPlanStr = Math.round(cumPlan / 1000) + ' т.р.';
                        var sumFactStr = Math.round(cumFact / 1000) + ' т.р.';
                        return '<tr data-step-id="' + s.id + '" data-step-idx="' + idx + '"><td class="fin-month-col">' + escapeHtml(s.title || '') + '</td><td>' + formatMoney(plan) + ' ₽</td><td><input type="number" min="0" step="1000" class="fin-fact-input" data-step-id="' + s.id + '" value="' + (fact !== '' ? fact : '') + '" placeholder="0"></td><td>' + sumPlanStr + '</td><td class="fin-cum-fact" data-step-id="' + s.id + '">' + sumFactStr + '</td><td class="fin-step-result ' + resultClass + '" data-step-id="' + s.id + '">' + escapeHtml(resultText) + '</td></tr>';
                    });
                    stepsContent = '<table class="fin-steps-table"><thead><tr><th class="fin-month-col">Месяц</th><th colspan="2" class="fin-group-header">ВЗНОС</th><th colspan="2" class="fin-group-header">СУММА</th><th>Итог</th></tr><tr><th class="fin-month-col"></th><th class="fin-subheader">План</th><th class="fin-subheader">Факт</th><th class="fin-subheader">План</th><th class="fin-subheader">Факт</th><th></th></tr></thead><tbody>' + rows.join('') + '</tbody></table>';
                } else {
                    stepsContent = buildDreamStepsCompactHtml(dreamId, steps, titleCounterMap, { canManage: true, isReadOnly: false, compactSeries: true });
                }
                var addStepRowHtml = showAddStepBtn ? '<div class="add-step-row" data-dream-id="' + dreamId + '"><button type="button" class="link add-step-btn">+ Добавить шаг</button></div>' : '';
                accTr.innerHTML = '<td colspan="6">' + addStepRowHtml + '<div class="steps-list" data-dream-id="' + dreamId + '">' + stepsContent + '</div>' + addStepRowHtml + '</td>';
                tbodyEl.appendChild(accTr);
                if (showAddStepBtn) {
                    accTr.querySelectorAll('.add-step-btn').forEach(function(btn) {
                        btn.addEventListener('click', function(ev) {
                            ev.stopPropagation();
                            if (ENABLE_SPECIAL_STEPS_BOOKS_FINANCE && isFinanceCategory) openAddStepFinanceModal(dreamId, d); else openAddStepModal(dreamId);
                        });
                    });
                    if (!isFinGoal) {
                        var listRootDream = accTr.querySelector('.steps-list');
                        wireDreamStepsCompact(listRootDream, dreamId, steps, {
                            canManage: true,
                            isReadOnly: false,
                            useAccordionDelete: true,
                            onRefresh: function() {
                                dreamIdToRestoreAfterRefresh = dreamId;
                                refreshAfterDreamChange();
                            }
                        });
                    }
                } else {
                    var currentMonth0 = new Date().getMonth();
                    var totalGoal = (d.price != null && d.price > 0) ? Number(d.price) : (steps.length * defaultPlan);
                    var totalGoalTh = Math.round(totalGoal / 1000);
                    function updateAllFinCells() {
                        var inputs = accTr.querySelectorAll('.fin-fact-input');
                        var cumPlan = 0, cumFact = 0;
                        inputs.forEach(function(input, idx) {
                            var stepId = parseInt(input.dataset.stepId, 10);
                            var s = steps.find(function(x) { return x.id === stepId; });
                            var plan = (s && s.plan_amount != null) ? s.plan_amount : defaultPlan;
                            var factVal = input.value.trim();
                            var factNum = factVal === '' ? 0 : parseFloat(factVal.replace(/\s/g, '').replace(',', '.'));
                            if (isNaN(factNum)) factNum = 0;
                            cumPlan += plan;
                            cumFact += factNum;
                            var sumFactStr = Math.round(cumFact / 1000) + ' т.р.';
                            var cumFactCell = accTr.querySelector('.fin-cum-fact[data-step-id="' + stepId + '"]');
                            if (cumFactCell) cumFactCell.textContent = sumFactStr;
                            var isCurrentMonth = (idx === currentMonth0);
                            var isFutureMonth = (idx > currentMonth0);
                            var resultText = getFinResultTextForMonth(plan, factVal, cumPlan, cumFact, totalGoal, isCurrentMonth, isFutureMonth);
                            var resultClass = isFutureMonth ? '' : (isCurrentMonth ? getFinResultClass(cumPlan, cumFact) : 'past');
                            var resultCell = accTr.querySelector('.fin-step-result[data-step-id="' + stepId + '"]');
                            if (resultCell) {
                                resultCell.textContent = resultText;
                                resultCell.className = 'fin-step-result ' + resultClass;
                            }
                        });
                    }
                    accTr.querySelectorAll('.fin-fact-input').forEach(function(input) {
                        var stepId = parseInt(input.dataset.stepId, 10);
                        var s = steps.find(function(x) { return x.id === stepId; });
                        input.addEventListener('blur', function() {
                            var val = input.value.trim();
                            var num = val === '' ? 0 : parseFloat(val.replace(/\s/g, '').replace(',', '.'));
                            if (isNaN(num)) num = 0;
                            fetch(API_BASE_URL + '/dreams/' + dreamId + '/steps/' + stepId + '?' + dreamApiUserParams(), { method: 'PATCH', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ fact_amount: num }) })
                                .then(function(r) { if (r.ok && s) s.fact_amount = num; updateAllFinCells(); })
                                .catch(function() {});
                        });
                        input.addEventListener('input', updateAllFinCells);
                    });
                }
            });
        }
        async function deleteStepFromAccordion(dreamId, stepId) {
            if (!confirm('Удалить этот шаг?')) return;
            try {
                var res = await fetch(API_BASE_URL + '/dreams/' + dreamId + '/steps/' + stepId + '?' + dreamApiUserParams(), { method: 'PATCH', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ deleted: true }) });
                if (res.ok) { dreamIdToRestoreAfterRefresh = dreamId; refreshAfterDreamChange(); } else alert('Ошибка удаления');
            } catch (e) { alert('Ошибка сети'); }
        }
        function renderDreamsMobileCards(dreams) {
            var block = document.getElementById('dreams-mobile-swipe');
            var track = block && block.querySelector('.dreams-mobile-track');
            var counterEl = block && block.querySelector('.dreams-mobile-counter');
            if (!track || !counterEl) return;
            track.innerHTML = '';
            track.dataset.currentIndex = '0';
            track.style.transform = 'translateX(0)';
            if (!dreams || dreams.length === 0) {
                var emptyCard = document.createElement('div');
                emptyCard.className = 'dreams-mobile-card dreams-mobile-card-empty';
                emptyCard.innerHTML = '<p style="margin-bottom:12px;">Пока нет записанных мечт.</p>';
                track.appendChild(emptyCard);
                counterEl.textContent = '0 / 0';
                return;
            }
            dreams.forEach(function(d) {
                var text = typeof d === 'string' ? d : (d.title || d.dream || '').trim() || '—';
                var statusId = d.status_id != null ? d.status_id : (d.status_obj && d.status_obj.id) || 1;
                var deadline = formatDeadlineDisplay((d.deadline || '').toString().slice(0, 10) || '');
                var dreamId = d.id;
                var categoryIcon = (d.category_obj && (d.category_obj.icon || '').trim()) || '';
                var categoryLabel = (d.category_obj && (d.category_obj.label_ru || d.category_obj.code || '').trim()) || '';
                var categoryDisplay = categoryIcon || categoryLabel || '—';
                var categoryTitle = categoryLabel || 'Категория';
                var price = d.price != null && d.price !== '' ? (Math.round(Number(d.price))).toLocaleString('ru-RU') : '—';
                var isPublic = d.is_public !== false;
                var eyeIcon = isPublic ? '👁️' : '🙈';
                var steps = sortStepsByDeadline((d.steps || []).filter(function(s) { return !s.deleted; }));
                var titleCounterMap = buildStepTitleCounterMap(steps);
                var stepsHtml = buildDreamStepsCompactHtml(dreamId, steps, titleCounterMap, { canManage: true, isReadOnly: false, compactSeries: true });
                var card = document.createElement('div');
                card.className = 'dreams-mobile-card';
                card.dataset.dreamId = dreamId;
                var mobileOwnerId = (dreamEditContext.ownerId != null && dreamEditContext.ownerId !== 0) ? dreamEditContext.ownerId : (currentUser && currentUser.id) || '';
                var addRowDreamSwipe = '<div class="add-step-row" data-dream-id="' + dreamId + '"><button type="button" class="link add-step-btn">+ Добавить шаг</button></div>';
                var prSwipe = buildDreamStepProgressInlineHtml(d);
                card.innerHTML = '<div class="card-dream-text">' + escapeHtml(text) + '</div><div class="card-progress">' + prSwipe + '</div><div class="card-row2"><span class="card-deadline">' + escapeHtml(deadline) + '</span><span class="card-sep">|</span><span class="card-price">' + escapeHtml(price) + ' руб.</span><span class="card-sep">|</span><div class="card-actions"><button type="button" class="dream-eye" data-dream-id="' + dreamId + '" data-public="' + (isPublic ? '1' : '0') + '" data-owner-id="' + mobileOwnerId + '" aria-label="Приватность">' + eyeIcon + '</button>' + buildStatusPickerHtml(dreamId, statusId) + '<button type="button" class="dream-edit-btn" title="Редактирование">✏️</button></div></div><div class="card-steps"><div class="card-steps-title">Серии шагов</div>' + addRowDreamSwipe + '<div class="steps-list" data-dream-id="' + dreamId + '">' + stepsHtml + '</div>' + addRowDreamSwipe + '</div>';
                track.appendChild(card);
                card.querySelector('.dream-edit-btn').addEventListener('click', function(ev) { ev.stopPropagation(); openEditDreamModal(d); });
                var eyeBtn = card.querySelector('.dream-eye');
                eyeBtn.addEventListener('click', function(ev) {
                    ev.preventDefault();
                    ev.stopPropagation();
                    var nowPublic = this.getAttribute('data-public') === '1';
                    var oid = this.getAttribute('data-owner-id');
                    saveDreamPrivacy(dreamId, !nowPublic, oid ? parseInt(oid, 10) : undefined);
                });
                var picker = card.querySelector('.status-picker');
                var currentSpan = picker.querySelector('.status-picker-current');
                var dropdown = picker.querySelector('.status-picker-dropdown');
                currentSpan.addEventListener('click', function(ev) { ev.stopPropagation(); dropdown.classList.toggle('open'); });
                picker.querySelectorAll('.status-picker-option').forEach(function(btn) {
                    btn.addEventListener('click', function(ev) {
                        ev.stopPropagation();
                        var id = parseInt(btn.dataset.statusId, 10);
                        var icon = btn.dataset.statusIcon || '';
                        currentSpan.textContent = icon;
                        dropdown.classList.remove('open');
                        saveDreamStatus(dreamId, id);
                    });
                });
                var isFinCatMobile = !!(d.category_obj && d.category_obj.code === 'finance');
                card.querySelectorAll('.add-step-btn').forEach(function(btn) {
                    btn.addEventListener('click', function(ev) { ev.stopPropagation(); if (ENABLE_SPECIAL_STEPS_BOOKS_FINANCE && isFinCatMobile) openAddStepFinanceModal(dreamId, d); else openAddStepModal(dreamId); });
                });
                var swipeListRoot = card.querySelector('.steps-list');
                wireDreamStepsCompact(swipeListRoot, dreamId, steps, {
                    canManage: true,
                    isReadOnly: false,
                    useAccordionDelete: true,
                    onRefresh: function() {
                        dreamIdToRestoreAfterRefresh = dreamId;
                        refreshAfterDreamChange();
                    }
                });
            });
            counterEl.textContent = '1 / ' + dreams.length;
            var fc1 = document.getElementById('app-footer-counter'); if (fc1) fc1.textContent = counterEl.textContent;
            var viewport = block.querySelector('.dreams-mobile-viewport');
            if (!viewport.dataset.swipeSetup) {
                viewport.dataset.swipeSetup = '1';
                var touchStartX = 0;
                viewport.addEventListener('touchstart', function(ev) {
                    if (ev.touches.length) touchStartX = ev.touches[0].clientX;
                }, { passive: true });
                viewport.addEventListener('touchend', function(ev) {
                    if (!ev.changedTouches.length) return;
                    var touchEndX = ev.changedTouches[0].clientX;
                    var delta = touchEndX - touchStartX;
                    var total = track.children.length;
                    if (total <= 1) return;
                    var idx = parseInt(track.dataset.currentIndex || 0, 10);
                    if (delta < -50 && idx < total - 1) idx++;
                    else if (delta > 50 && idx > 0) idx--;
                    track.dataset.currentIndex = String(idx);
                    /* Каждая карточка занимает 100% ширины трека, двигаем трек на 100% за шаг */
                    track.style.transform = 'translateX(-' + (idx * 100) + '%)';
                    counterEl.textContent = (idx + 1) + ' / ' + total;
                    var fc2 = document.getElementById('app-footer-counter'); if (fc2) fc2.textContent = counterEl.textContent;
                }, { passive: true });
            }
        }
        function renderDreamsMobileList(dreams, blockId) {
            var listEl = document.getElementById(blockId === 'buddy' ? 'buddy-mobile-list' : 'dreams-mobile-list');
            if (!listEl) return;
            listEl.innerHTML = '';
            if (!dreams || dreams.length === 0) {
                var empty = document.createElement('div');
                empty.className = 'dreams-mobile-list-card';
                empty.innerHTML = '<p style="color:#666;margin:0;">' + (blockId === 'buddy' ? 'У бадди пока нет записанных мечт.' : 'Пока нет записанных мечт.') + '</p>';
                listEl.appendChild(empty);
                return;
            }
            var canEdit = (blockId === 'dreams' && dreamEditContext.viewerId == null) || (blockId === 'buddy' && currentUser && currentUser.buddy_trust);
            dreams.forEach(function(d, i) {
                var text = typeof d === 'string' ? d : (d.title || d.dream || '').trim() || '—';
                var deadline = formatDeadlineDisplay((d.deadline || '').toString().slice(0, 10) || '');
                var dreamId = d.id;
                var categoryIcon = (d.category_obj && (d.category_obj.icon || '').trim()) || '';
                var categoryLabel = (d.category_obj && (d.category_obj.label_ru || d.category_obj.code || '').trim()) || '';
                var categoryDisplay = categoryIcon || categoryLabel || '—';
                if (/эльбрус/i.test(text)) categoryDisplay = '🏔️';
                var steps = sortStepsByDeadline((d.steps || []).filter(function(s) { return !s.deleted; }));
                var titleCounterMap = buildStepTitleCounterMap(steps);
                var stepsCount = steps.length;
                var listOptsCompact = { canManage: !!canEdit, isReadOnly: !canEdit, compactSeries: true };
                var stepsBody = '<div class="steps-list" data-dream-id="' + dreamId + '">' + buildDreamStepsCompactHtml(dreamId, steps, titleCounterMap, listOptsCompact) + '</div>';
                var addStepRowTop = canEdit ? '<div class="add-step-accordion-row add-step-accordion-row--top" data-dream-id="' + dreamId + '"><button type="button" class="link add-step-btn">+ Добавить шаг</button></div>' : '';
                var addStepRowBot = canEdit ? '<div class="add-step-accordion-row" data-dream-id="' + dreamId + '"><button type="button" class="link add-step-btn">+ Добавить шаг</button></div>' : '';
                var accordionContent = addStepRowTop + stepsBody + addStepRowBot;
                var card = document.createElement('div');
                card.className = 'dreams-mobile-list-card';
                card.dataset.dreamId = dreamId;
                var progressBarM = buildDreamStepProgressInlineHtml(d);
                card.innerHTML = '<div class="card-row"><div class="card-num-wrap"><span class="card-num-bg" aria-hidden="true">' + escapeHtml(categoryDisplay) + '</span><span class="card-num">' + (i + 1) + '</span></div><span class="card-text">' + escapeHtml(text) + '</span></div><div class="card-progress">' + progressBarM + '</div><div class="card-meta"><span class="card-meta-left">' + escapeHtml(deadline) + '</span><span class="card-meta-center"><span class="card-steps-trigger" data-dream-id="' + dreamId + '">' + stepsCount + ' шаг' + (stepsCount === 1 ? '' : (stepsCount >= 2 && stepsCount <= 4 ? 'а' : 'ов')) + '</span></span><div class="card-meta-right">' + (canEdit ? '<button type="button" class="dream-edit-btn" title="Редактирование">✏️</button><button type="button" class="dream-delete-btn" title="Удалить">✕</button>' : '') + '</div></div><div class="card-accordion hidden" id="list-accordion-' + dreamId + '" data-dream-id="' + dreamId + '">' + accordionContent + '</div>';
                listEl.appendChild(card);
                if (canEdit) {
                    card.querySelector('.dream-edit-btn').addEventListener('click', function(ev) { ev.stopPropagation(); openEditDreamModal(d); });
                    card.querySelector('.dream-delete-btn').addEventListener('click', function(ev) { ev.stopPropagation(); deleteDreamDirect(dreamId); });
                    var isFinCat = !!(d.category_obj && d.category_obj.code === 'finance');
                    card.querySelectorAll('.card-accordion .add-step-btn').forEach(function(addStepBtn) {
                        addStepBtn.addEventListener('click', function(ev) { ev.stopPropagation(); if (ENABLE_SPECIAL_STEPS_BOOKS_FINANCE && isFinCat) openAddStepFinanceModal(dreamId, d); else openAddStepModal(dreamId); });
                    });
                    var listRootMobile = card.querySelector('.card-accordion .steps-list');
                    wireDreamStepsCompact(listRootMobile, dreamId, steps, {
                        canManage: true,
                        isReadOnly: false,
                        useAccordionDelete: true,
                        onRefresh: function() {
                            dreamIdToRestoreAfterRefresh = dreamId;
                            refreshAfterDreamChange();
                        }
                    });
                }
                card.querySelector('.card-steps-trigger').addEventListener('click', function(ev) {
                    ev.stopPropagation();
                    var acc = document.getElementById('list-accordion-' + dreamId);
                    if (acc) acc.classList.toggle('hidden');
                });
            });
        }
        async function deleteDreamDirect(dreamId) {
            if (!confirm('Удалить эту мечту? Шаги мечты тоже будут удалены.')) return;
            var filtered = dreamEditContext.viewerId != null ? filterDreamsByFilter(buddyDreamsCache) : filterDreamsByFilter(currentUserDreamsCache);
            var idx = filtered.findIndex(function(d) { return d.id == dreamId; });
            if (idx >= 0) currentIndexToRestoreAfterRefresh = idx;
            try {
                var res = await fetch(API_BASE_URL + '/dreams/' + dreamId + '?' + dreamApiUserParams(), { method: 'DELETE' });
                if (!res.ok) {
                    var e = await res.json().catch(function() { return {}; });
                    alert(e.detail || 'Ошибка удаления');
                    return;
                }
                refreshAfterDreamChange();
            } catch (e) {
                alert('Ошибка сети');
            }
        }
        function toggleAccordion(dreamId) {
            var el = document.getElementById('accordion-' + dreamId);
            if (!el) return;
            document.querySelectorAll('#dreams-tbody tr.accordion-row[id^="accordion-"]').forEach(function(acc) {
                if (acc.id !== 'accordion-' + dreamId) acc.classList.add('hidden');
            });
            el.classList.toggle('hidden');
        }
        function setDeadlineFromHint(inputId, hint) {
            var el = document.getElementById(inputId);
            if (!el) return;
            if (hint === 'none') {
                el.value = '';
                el.classList.remove('island-date-field-invalid');
                islandCalRefreshFromTyping(el);
                return;
            }
            var d = new Date();
            if (hint === '7days') { d.setDate(d.getDate() + 7); }
            else if (hint === 'eoy') { d.setMonth(11); d.setDate(31); }
            var iso = d.getFullYear() + '-' + String(d.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0') + '-' + String(d.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
            el.value = isoToUiDate(iso);
            el.classList.remove('island-date-field-invalid');
            islandCalRefreshFromTyping(el);
        }
        function setVisibilityToggleState(toggleId, isPrivate) {
            var wrap = document.getElementById(toggleId);
            if (!wrap) return;
            wrap.querySelectorAll('.modal-dream-visibility-option').forEach(function(opt) {
                var optPrivate = opt.getAttribute('data-private') === '1';
                opt.classList.toggle('active', optPrivate === isPrivate);
                opt.setAttribute('aria-pressed', optPrivate === isPrivate ? 'true' : 'false');
            });
        }
        function getVisibilityTogglePrivate(toggleId) {
            var wrap = document.getElementById(toggleId);
            if (!wrap) return true;
            var active = wrap.querySelector('.modal-dream-visibility-option.active');
            return active ? active.getAttribute('data-private') === '1' : true;
        }
        function initVisibilityToggle(toggleId) {
            var wrap = document.getElementById(toggleId);
            if (!wrap) return;
            wrap.querySelectorAll('.modal-dream-visibility-option').forEach(function(opt) {
                opt.onclick = function() {
                    var isPrivate = opt.getAttribute('data-private') === '1';
                    setVisibilityToggleState(toggleId, isPrivate);
                };
            });
        }
        function openNewDreamModal() {
            islandCalClose();
            document.getElementById('new-dream-text').value = '';
            var nd = document.getElementById('new-dream-deadline');
            if (nd) { nd.value = ''; nd.classList.remove('island-date-field-invalid'); }
            var priceEl = document.getElementById('new-dream-price');
            if (priceEl) priceEl.value = '';
            setVisibilityToggleState('new-dream-visibility-toggle', true);
            initVisibilityToggle('new-dream-visibility-toggle');
            document.querySelectorAll('#modal-new-dream .modal-deadline-hints a').forEach(function(a) {
                a.onclick = function(ev) { ev.preventDefault(); setDeadlineFromHint('new-dream-deadline', a.dataset.deadline); };
            });
            var statusSelect = document.getElementById('new-dream-status');
            statusSelect.innerHTML = getStatusOptionsHtml(1);
            var catSelect = document.getElementById('new-dream-category');
            if (catSelect) {
                catSelect.innerHTML = '<option value="">Без категории</option>' + (dreamCategoriesList.map(function(o) {
                    return '<option value="' + o.id + '">' + escapeHtml((o.icon || '') + ' ' + (o.label_ru || o.code || '').trim()) + '</option>';
                }).join(''));
            }
            var btn = document.getElementById('btn-submit-new-dream');
            if (btn) { btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = 'Добавить'; }
            var errDiv = document.getElementById('new-dream-error');
            if (errDiv) { errDiv.classList.add('hidden'); errDiv.textContent = ''; }
            document.getElementById('modal-new-dream').classList.remove('hidden');
            setTimeout(function() { var el = document.getElementById('new-dream-text'); if (el) el.focus(); }, 50);
        }
        function closeNewDreamModal() {
            islandCalClose();
            document.getElementById('modal-new-dream').classList.add('hidden');
        }
        function openEditDreamModal(d) {
            islandCalClose();
            var id = d.id;
            var text = (d.title || d.dream || '').trim();
            var deadline = (d.deadline || '').toString().slice(0, 10);
            var statusId = d.status_id != null ? d.status_id : (d.status_obj && d.status_obj.id) || 1;
            var categoryId = d.category_id != null ? d.category_id : (d.category_obj && d.category_obj.id);
            document.getElementById('edit-dream-id').value = id;
            document.getElementById('edit-dream-text').value = text;
            var edDl = document.getElementById('edit-dream-deadline');
            if (edDl) {
                edDl.value = (deadline && /^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/.test(deadline)) ? isoToUiDate(deadline) : '';
                edDl.classList.remove('island-date-field-invalid');
            }
            var statusSelect = document.getElementById('edit-dream-status');
            statusSelect.innerHTML = getStatusOptionsHtml(statusId);
            var catSelect = document.getElementById('edit-dream-category');
            catSelect.innerHTML = '<option value="">Без категории</option>' + (dreamCategoriesList.map(function(o) {
                return '<option value="' + o.id + '"' + (o.id === categoryId ? ' selected' : '') + '>' + escapeHtml((o.icon || '') + ' ' + (o.label_ru || o.code || '').trim()) + '</option>';
            }).join(''));
            document.querySelectorAll('#modal-edit-dream .modal-deadline-hints a').forEach(function(a) {
                a.onclick = function(ev) { ev.preventDefault(); setDeadlineFromHint('edit-dream-deadline', a.dataset.deadline); };
            });
            var isPrivate = d.is_public === false;
            setVisibilityToggleState('edit-dream-visibility-toggle', isPrivate);
            initVisibilityToggle('edit-dream-visibility-toggle');
            document.getElementById('edit-dream-error').classList.add('hidden');
            document.getElementById('btn-submit-edit-dream').disabled = false;
            document.getElementById('modal-edit-dream').classList.remove('hidden');
        }
        function closeEditDreamModal() {
            islandCalClose();
            document.getElementById('modal-edit-dream').classList.add('hidden');
        }
        async function deleteDreamFromModal() {
            if (!confirm('Удалить эту мечту? Шаги мечты тоже будут удалены.')) return;
            var dreamId = parseInt(document.getElementById('edit-dream-id').value, 10);
            var delBtn = document.getElementById('btn-delete-dream');
            var saveBtn = document.getElementById('btn-submit-edit-dream');
            if (delBtn) delBtn.disabled = true;
            if (saveBtn) saveBtn.disabled = true;
            try {
                var res = await fetch(API_BASE_URL + '/dreams/' + dreamId + '?' + dreamApiUserParams(), { method: 'DELETE' });
                if (!res.ok) {
                    var e = await res.json().catch(function() { return {}; });
                    alert(e.detail || 'Ошибка удаления');
                    return;
                }
                closeEditDreamModal();
                showProfile();
            } catch (e) {
                alert('Ошибка сети');
            } finally {
                if (delBtn) delBtn.disabled = false;
                if (saveBtn) saveBtn.disabled = false;
            }
        }
        async function submitEditDream() {
            var btn = document.getElementById('btn-submit-edit-dream');
            if (btn && btn.disabled) return;
            var dreamId = parseInt(document.getElementById('edit-dream-id').value, 10);
            var text = document.getElementById('edit-dream-text').value.trim();
            if (!text) return;
            var deadlineRaw = (document.getElementById('edit-dream-deadline').value || '').trim();
            var deadline = null;
            if (deadlineRaw) {
                deadline = uiDateToIso(deadlineRaw);
                if (!deadline) {
                    errDiv.textContent = 'Дедлайн: введите дату в формате дд.мм.гг.';
                    errDiv.classList.remove('hidden');
                    if (btn) btn.disabled = false;
                    return;
                }
            }
            var priceEl = document.getElementById('edit-dream-price');
            var priceVal = priceEl && priceEl.value !== '' ? parseFloat(priceEl.value) : null;
            if (priceVal !== null && isNaN(priceVal)) priceVal = null;
